source.notes: Reconstruido desde encabezados y numeración de versículos del PDF; incluye passage_titles detectados heurísticamente. Caps. 17–18: el PDF carece de ocho segmentos numerados (17:53–58 y 18:1–2 en RVR 1960); se insertaron marcadores editoriales para mantener la misma versificación que es_rvr_1960.

verses.text: Merikɨtsɨ 'Epɨrahini kwieyaritsie hɨritsie mana xewitɨ tewi pukatei, Tsupi nuiwarieya Xamatahini kiekame. 'Erikana pɨtitewakai Keruhani nu'ayatɨtɨ, mɨkɨta 'Erihú punu'ayatɨkai, mɨkɨta Tuhu punu'ayatɨkai, mɨkɨta Tsupi punu'ayatɨkai mɨkɨ 'Epɨrahini nuiwarieya hetsie pɨmiemetɨkai.
'Erikana yuhutame yu'ɨitama pɨwarexeiyakai. Xewitɨ Hana pɨtitewakai, xewitɨta Penina. Mɨkɨ tɨɨri pɨwarexeiyakai, peru Hana pɨkaniwekai.

Xeiwiyari 'aye'axekaku 'Erikana yukiekaritsie payeyeikakai Yawé Naimekɨmɨtɨrɨkaɨye nenewieri hepitɨanike, meta mawari heiwewirienike Tsiru mɨrakutewatsie paitɨ, mana 'Eri niwemama yuhutatɨ mepɨte'uximayakai 'Uni meta Pinexi mawari wewiwamete Yawé hetsiemiemekɨ.
Kepauka memɨte'utimawakai, 'ana 'Erikana yu'ɨya Penina yapaɨmeme wai niyetuiriwakaitɨni, yaxeikɨata yuniwema 'ukitsi, 'ukari kepaɨmeme mɨtiwahetsiemiemetɨkai.
Hana matsi 'aixɨa mɨ'anene wai kaniyetuiriwakaitɨni, waɨkawa minaki'eriekaikɨ tsepanetɨ Yawé kaniweweme meyeitɨakai.
Wixieya Penina waɨkawa kani'uximatɨakaitɨni, para ha'atɨ muyeikanikɨ xeikɨa, Yawé kaniweweme meyeitɨakaikɨ.
Xeiwiyari 'aye'axekaku kepauka memeta'axekai Yawé tukita: Hana yaxeikɨa pɨtikuhɨawaruwakai. Waɨkawa kaniutatsuakakaitɨni meta pɨkatikwaimɨkɨkai.
Merikɨtsɨ 'Erikana kɨnaya mɨhɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: «Hana, ¿ketitayari petiutatsuaka? kati'ane keyuri tamamata tɨɨri?»
Heiwa Tsiru me'u'uwatɨ Hana kananukukeni tiukwaiyaku, tukita kaneyani heyutanenewienike, 'Eri mawari wewiwame mɨhɨritɨariekai kanixeiyakaitɨni, mana Yawé tukieya kitenie yu'ɨparitsie pakatei,
hikɨ waɨkawa yuhiwerietɨ kanitsutɨani yunenewietɨ Yawé hetsiemieme, 'utatsuatɨ katihayewatɨ.

Hikɨ yuhɨritɨatɨ mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: «Yawé Naimekɨmɨtɨrɨkaɨye, xɨka ti'uximayatame 'ahetsɨa mɨmieme pexeiyanike haweri mɨyɨane yaketinemaika kenemɨtiuka'eniwa pepɨkanetsihatɨtɨmaiyani, xɨka penetsiyetuirieni nunutsi 'ukitɨme ne matsi nemaniyetuiriemɨkɨ tukarieya naime hepaɨtsita kɨpateya hatsuaku nepɨkakaxini».
Matsi Hana yunenewietɨ kwinimieme katineutere Yawé hahɨawetɨ, 'Eri pixeiyakai tenieyatsie.
Tenieya puyuatɨkatei xeikɨa, Hana yu'axɨkai puyunenewiekai, pɨkayu'eniɨriɨkɨkai kemutainekai, tawetɨ yɨaneme pɨ'eriekai 'Eri.
'Ayumiememɨpaɨ pɨtitahɨawixɨ: —¿Kepaukake pepɨtihayewa pe'ienetɨ? Winuri keneuhayewa.

Hana kanita'eiya: —Neti'aitɨwame, netawekame pepɨka'erieka, ne matsi winu meta nawa nepɨka'anu'iwe, ne matsi 'ukaratsi nemɨhiweritɨarie nepɨhɨkɨ, 'uwa nepeyetɨa ne'ukiyari Yawé hɨxie mɨnetsinɨtɨanikɨ.
'Ukaratsi 'axanemɨtiuka'iyari pepɨkanetsi 'erieka 'ekɨ. Mɨya nepɨreuterixɨ neyunenewietɨ kenemɨtiuka'eniwakɨ kenemɨtiyu'iyaritɨakɨ.
'Eri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kenemie kayuwatɨ pehexeiyatɨ, 'Ixaheri pemɨtitawawiri.
Hana mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Pamɨpariyutsi 'ekɨ pemɨtimate ne kenemɨtiku'eriwa. Hana mɨpaɨ tiutateutaka kaneyani, hikɨ katinekwani yapauka 'ana kwitɨwa katiniyupata kemɨtiyɨkɨhɨawekai.
'Uxa'arieka ximeri Yawé nenewieri me'upitɨaka menekɨne yukie Xama kiekariyaritsie. 'Erikana yɨ'ɨya matɨa Hana kaniukahuni, Yawé Hana kanaye'erieni.
Hana kaniutihukata, xeiwiyari hanuyeyaku xeime nunutsi 'ukitɨme kanayexeiya, Tsamuheri katiniterɨwa, mɨpaɨ 'utayɨka: «Yawé nemutawawirikɨ».
Merikɨtsɨ xeiwiyari 'aye'akuta 'Erikana kaneyani yutɨɨriyama yunaime warawitɨtɨ Yawé tukita mawari mɨwewimiekɨ Tsiru paitɨ meta mɨraye'atɨanikɨ kemutayɨkai.

Matsi Hana wahamatɨa pɨkahetɨa, mɨpaɨ pɨtitahɨawixɨ yɨkɨna: —Hawaikɨ nepɨkayemie, kepaukake mɨtikwaiweni nunutsi, 'anake nepenuwitɨni Yawé nepeyetuirieni, muwa meyuhayewakɨ yuheyemekɨ tukari kepaɨmeme mipitɨani.

Kɨnayata 'Erikana mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Aixɨa pɨ'ane yaketineuyuri kemɨmatinake, keneukunua kepaukake nunutsi yuxaɨta mɨtikwaiweni, Yawé yuniuki kehaye'atɨani. weriyatɨ kepaukake yuxaɨta tikwaiwetɨ matɨa.
Kepauka mihayewaxɨ 'itsitsitɨwatɨ nunutsi, kaneyani Yawé tukita Tsiru paitɨ. Tsikeru haika wiyari hɨkame kanehana meta xeitewiyari kiruyari harina meta winu nawita 'uyemakame.
Hikɨ tsikeru me'utimawakari, nunutsi 'Eri mekaniyetuirieni.
Hana mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: «Neti'aitɨwame, yurikɨ nepɨtayɨni, ne 'ukaratsi nepɨhɨkɨ 'a'aurie nemutikatei 'uwa Yawé nenewieri nepitɨatɨ.
'Ikɨ nunutsi pɨhɨkɨ ne nemitawawiri Yawé, mɨkɨ pɨnetsiyetuiri.
Ne hikɨ 'ayumieme nepiyetuirieni Yawé. 'Ikɨ
Hana kemɨtiukwikaxɨ: «Ne'iyari Yawé hetsie tiwiyatɨ puyutemawie, netɨrɨkariya mana pɨtiwiya. mɨnetsi'utawikweitsitɨakɨ nepɨyɨwe memɨnetsi'aye'unie nemɨwara'iwa.
»Nixewitɨ tɨma 'apɨka'uyeika Yawé hepaɨ patsietɨ, nixewitɨ pumawe tahetsie nunuwame takakaɨyari hepaɨ, xewitɨ hepaɨna 'anetɨ pumawe.
»Xeketeneuhayewa mariwemekɨ xetekuxatatɨ, xetemaiwaweme xeyuxatatɨ. Matsi Yawé Kakaɨyari tanaime pɨtatsimate. Pɨtimate kepauka 'aixɨa temɨteyurie, meta kepauka 'axatemɨteyurie.
»Memɨtɨrɨkawi watupi pɨtimura matsi memɨwerarani tɨrɨkariya pɨwapitɨa.

Meripaitɨ 'ikwai 'anayuhayewame memexeiyakai, hikɨri paa 'etsipemekɨ mepuyutua. hikɨri waɨkawa 'ikwai mehexeiyatɨ mekaniu'uwani. kaniutiniweni, matsi yumɨireme yuniwema mɨwarexeiyakai kawarexeiyatɨ kanayani.
»Yawé tukari pɨtatsipitɨa meta mɨɨya, mɨkɨ yapɨtiyuriene temɨkateukienikɨ peru meta pɨtatsi 'anuku'uitɨwa.
Yawé pɨtatiyetuirie temɨtehexeiyanikɨ meta pɨtatsipitɨa tixaɨ temɨkatehexeiyanikɨ, tixaɨ pɨkatarayeitɨwa 'ariketa mariweme pɨtatsi'ayeitɨwa.

Mɨkɨ tumuanaritsata haweri mɨ'ane kananukuketɨwani, tixaɨ mɨkarexeiya xatsipa kanayehana, miyetuirienikɨ 'uweni mariweme witsi'anekame. »Yawé kwie tsutɨmeyari katinipiinieyatɨni. Mɨkɨ hetsie kwie kaniukamani.
Hetsiena yuri memɨte'erie yamemɨtekahu kaniwa'ɨwiyani, peru 'axateyuruwamete mekaneuyexɨrikuni makuyɨwitsie. yutɨrɨkariyakɨ.

»Yawé memeye'unie kaniwaka'unamɨkɨ, muyuawitsiepaitɨ mimierɨkari kananakanɨ'amɨkɨ wahetsie. Yawé yunaime kwiepa memɨtama pɨwa'itsɨkame, mɨkɨ ti'aitamekɨ manukakeni waɨkawa tɨrɨkaɨyeme payeitɨani meta mɨkɨ menayexei tɨrɨkariya pupitɨa».
'Erikana Xama kiekariyaritsie kaneyani yukie, peru nunutsi kaniukunuani Yawé hetsiemieme mɨtita'uximayatakɨ, 'Eri mawari wewiwame pi'ɨwiyakai.
'Eri niwemama 'axamepɨte'u'iyarikai, Yawé mepɨka'eniekai.
Mɨkɨ mawari wewiwamete 'ipaɨ mepɨtekahukai: Kepauka xewitɨ mawari mɨwewienenitsie, mawari wewiwame parewiwameya tepɨa 'amupa manuxɨtetɨka hakwetɨ mana kani'axekaitɨni, hikɨ kepauka wai mɨ'etsarieka,

xarita tepɨa manuxɨtetɨka neukahatɨwakaitɨni, yatɨni xakɨ 'amɨpatsie, yatɨni katsuweratsie, mawari wewiwame tipiinieya naitɨ pɨrayeikakai, kepaɨmeme mɨtiku'axikekai tepɨa manɨxɨte. Mɨpaɨ mekaniwayuriekaitɨni 'ixaheritsixi Tsiru memeta'axekai.

Metatsiere kepauka xewitɨ mawari taiyariyari mɨwewiekatsie, mawari wewiwame parewiwameya kani'axekaitɨni, 'akuxi wiyari kahaukuniwekaku mɨpaɨ mɨtitahɨawekɨ mawari mɨwewie: «Keneneyetuiri wai mɨtiwarɨkarienikɨ mawari wewiwame hetsiemieme, warikimeri pɨkatanaki'erieni, yuikame xeikɨa».

Xɨka mɨtimawa mɨpaɨ tita'eiya: «Kenekwewieka 'akuxi wiya 'anuyekuneyuke kemɨreuyewetse, 'anake pekanenutuimɨkɨ kemɨmatinake», matsi ti'uximayatame mɨpaɨ pɨtikɨhɨawekai: «Hawaikɨ keneneyetuiri hikɨ yapauka, yapepɨkanetiutuitɨa ne nepɨmatsinawairieni».
Mɨpaɨ 'ayumieme mɨkɨ temari waɨkawa 'axamepɨteyuriekai Yawé hɨxie, mawari hetsiemieme heitserie 'aixɨa memɨkateyuriekaikɨ.
Matsi Tsamuheri nunutsitɨtɨ, yuhetsiemieme mawari wewiwame rinu kamixayari 'anakatɨtɨ katini'uximayakaitɨni Yawé hɨxie.
Xeiwiyari 'aye'axekaku warutsieya kamixaya 'amɨtɨtɨ kanitiwewiriwakaitɨni, kepauka maye'axekai mawari memuyewewietɨkɨkakaitsie yukɨna hamatɨa 'ana kaneihuririwakaitɨni.

Hikɨ heiwa 'ana 'Eri kaniwarutanenewiya mɨwayurienikɨ mɨpaɨ 'utaitɨ: «Yawé kexe'upitɨani waɨkawa tɨɨri xemɨwarayexeiyakɨ, 'ikɨ 'uka nunutsi 'uta'iwauka Yawé mɨyetuirikɨ». Hikɨ 'ana yukie mekanakunuaxɨani.
Yawé Hana 'aixɨa puyuri, tɨɨri yuhaikame 'ukitsi kaniwarayexeiya, meta yuhutame 'ukari. Yawé hɨxie.
'Eri pu'ukiratsitɨkairi, yapɨretima naime niwemama 'ixaheritsixi kememɨwayuriekai meta yapɨretima 'ukarawetsixi tuki kitenie memɨte'uximayakai wahamatɨa memukahipitekai.
Hikɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: «¿Ketitayari mɨyaxeteyurie? Yunaitɨ teɨteri yamepɨnetekuhɨawe ke'axaxemɨteyurie.
Hawaikɨ, neniwema nemɨxenaki'erie, mɨkɨ teɨterimama watsata.

Xɨka xewitɨ 'axatiuyurieni yu'iwa hepaɨtsita, mexeiya yamɨtayɨnikɨ, peru xɨka Yawé hetsɨa 'axatiuyurieni, ¿kemɨ'ane rahetsie pɨratanuani?» kemɨtiwarayemari'itɨwakai, Yawé pinakekai watukari mɨwanawairienikɨ xeikɨari.
Peru, nunutsi Tsamuheri matsi pɨwerekai, Yawé 'aixɨa pɨtixeiyakai meta teɨteri. wahepaɨtsita mieme
Xewitɨ tewi Kakaɨyari mayexeiya 'Eri kaneku'iwata mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: «Yawé mɨpaɨ kanaineni: “'Atewarima wahɨxie nepɨnehekɨataxɨ 'Ekipitu paitɨ ti'aitame Parahuni tiwa'aitɨakaku.

Yunaime 'ixaheritsixi waxiɨyarima watsata 'Aruni nepanayexei para nemawari wewiwame mayanikɨ, para nehɨxie nemawari taiyametsie mɨti'uximayakakɨ, meta 'ɨkwa mutitaiyanikɨ meta mawari wewiwame kamixaya manakatɨkɨnikɨ. Matsi niwemama nepɨwayetuiri mawari memɨtitaiyakɨ 'ixaheritsixi memiyetuaya nehetsiemieme.

¿Ketitayari xeme 'axaxeteyurie mawari meta 'imikieri, ne nemɨti'aita mɨkɨ memɨnete'atɨiriwanikɨ? ¿Ketitayari 'aniwema waɨkawa petiwanaki'erie ne pekanetsinaki'erietɨ, pekaniwawaiyatɨaka xeikɨa nemawari 'aixɨa mɨ'anenekɨ 'ixaheritsixi memɨteyetuaya nehetsiemieme?”

»Mɨya pemɨtiuyurikɨ, hipame 'a'iwama nepɨkawapitɨani, tsepa kenemutayɨkai meripaitɨ 'atewarima kename yunaitɨ 'a'iwama menetsiparewiekakekai yuheyemekɨ. Ne Yawé 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya yanekaniutayɨni. Nekaniwa'enieka memɨnetsi'enie, tixaɨtɨ nepɨkatiwarayeitɨa memɨnetsi'uxie.
Pehurari 'atukari mɨtixɨnitsie, xete'uximayatɨ xepɨka'akɨneri, yaxeikɨa 'atɨɨriyama, nixewitɨ 'anuiwaritsiemieme 'ukiratsi pɨka'ayani.
Pe'uxiwa'atɨ pepɨniereni, 'ixaheritsixi ke'aixɨa memɨ'itɨarieka, nixewitɨ 'anuiwaritsie mieme 'ukiratsi pɨka'ayani.
Xɨka xeime ne'upitɨani mɨti'uximayakakɨ mawari taiyame, mɨkɨ heiwerika xeikɨa nemɨmatsipitɨanikɨ 'a'iyaritsie nepɨtiyurieni, yunaitɨ 'anuiwarima mekanikwikuni metemaritɨtɨ.
'Ikɨ 'inɨari nepɨmatsiyetuirie: yuhutatɨ 'aniwema mekanikwikuni xeitukaritsie, 'Uni, Pinexi matɨa.
»Peru matsi ne xeime nepanukakeni mawari wewiwame yatikamieme, yamɨtiyurieni kemɨnetinake. Hatsuaku nuiwarieya mepɨkaheuyeweni, matsi mɨixa wiyari puyeikani kemɨ'ane nemanayexei ti'aitame hɨxie.
'Atɨɨriyama memuyuhayewatɨweni
Tsamuheri 'akuxi yakɨ puyumaikai, kepauka Yawé mɨti'uximayatsiriekai 'Eri 'i'ɨwiyakaku, 'ana 'ana yuwaɨkawatɨ mɨpaɨ mepɨkatenenierekai.
'Eri kaheunieretɨ kanayeiximekaitɨni. mɨwayehupukaitsie yukiita,
Tsamuheri kanikutsukaitɨni tukita, tɨratu kakuniyari muyekatsie Yawé hetsiemieme, Kakaɨyari kɨxemeya 'akuxi pɨtatɨkatei.
Yawé Tsamuheri kaniutahɨawe, mɨkɨta mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Uwa nepɨyeka.

Mɨkɨ 'unautsarɨmetɨ kaneyani 'Eri muwayekateitsie, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Ena nepuwe, ¿titayari penerahiwiwa 'ekɨ? 'Eri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Nematsi nepɨkamatsihahiwiwa, keneumieni kenekani. Hikɨ Tsamuheri kaneyani yu'itaritsie.

Peru hutarieka Yawé kanitahɨawe: —Tsamuheri. muwayekateitsie mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Ena nepuwe, ¿titayari penerahɨawe 'ekɨ? 'Eri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Neuxei neniwe, ne nepɨkamatsihahɨawe. Kenemie kenekani.
Tsamuheri 'ana 'akuxi Yawé pɨka'eniewekai, hatsuaku yuniukikɨ pɨkatitahekɨatɨawekai.

Yawé hairieka Tsamuheri kaniutahɨawe, mɨkɨ 'anukukeka kaneyani 'Eri mɨwayekateitsie. Mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Ena nepuwe. ¿Ketitakɨ penereuyehɨatɨ penerahɨawe 'ekɨ? Merikɨte 'Eri mɨpaɨ katinetimani, kename Yawé temaikɨ kɨhɨawekai.

'Eri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kenemie kenekani, xɨka xewitɨ tawarita matsihahɨaweni mɨpaɨ ketinetahɨawi: “Yawé yakenetineutahɨawi, mati'uximayatsiriwame pɨmatsi'enie”. Tsamuheri heyaka nekahuni yu'itaritsie.
Hikɨ Yawé tawarita 'ahurawa kanitahɨawe hekwamekɨ: —Tsamuheri. Tsamuheri. Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Keneutaniu, mati'uximayatsiriwame pɨmatsi'enie.
Yawé mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Neuxei, paye'axime 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie kwinimieme tiraunarikɨ nemɨwatimariuta.
Mɨkɨ tukariyaritsie yanetiniyurimɨkɨ naime kenemutayɨ 'Eri yaxeikɨa tɨɨriyamama wahepaɨtsita.
Yanepɨtitahɨawixɨ niwemama 'axamemɨteyuriekaikɨ, wahetsie nepɨrahɨa yuheyemekɨ, mɨkɨ pɨtimaikai ke'axamemutiyuanekai nehepaɨtsita, mɨkɨ matsi 'aixɨa pɨkawaruyuri timaitɨ.
'Ayumiememɨpaɨ nekanaineni ni'imikierikɨ nepɨkatiwareuyehɨwirieni ke'axamemɨte'uyuri 'Eri niwemama.
Tsamuheri kaniukahuni, 'uxa'arieka ximeri 'itupari kaneuyepiexɨani Yawé tukita, pɨkayuwaɨriyakai 'Eri mɨtitaxatɨanikɨ kemɨtiunierekai.
'Ayumieme'Eri kanita'inieni: —Tsamuheri neniwe nemɨmatsinaki'erie. Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Ena nepuwe.
'Eri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Yawé kemeretahɨawixɨ 'aku? Nepɨmatsiwawirie pepɨkaneti'awitsirieka. kematiukwinitɨani, xɨka xeiniukiyari pekanetsi'utaxatɨani naime kemɨmatiutahɨawixɨ.
Tsamuheri katinitaxatɨani naime, tixaɨ karanukanatɨ, 'ana 'Eri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Yawé mɨkɨ kanihɨkɨtɨni, yaketiɨyɨni kemɨtinake.
Tsamuheri mexi werekai Yawé hamatɨana puyeikakai, yatiniuyurieni naime kemɨrehɨawekai.
Naitsarie 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie Rani mɨrakutewatsie meta Weritsewa paitɨ yamepɨtehetima Yawé yamɨtiuyurikɨ Tsamuheri niukame yuhetsiemieme mayeitɨakɨ.
Yawé yaxeikɨa Tsamuheri pɨtikuxaxatɨwakai

Tsamuheri niukieya yunaitɨ 'ixaheritsixi mepɨmaikai. 'Ana 'ixaheritsixi mekanayekɨne mewatakwinike piritsiteutsixi, 'Ewenetsexi 'ehurakaku mekanikuyaxe. Meta piritsiteutsixi 'Apeki mɨrakutewatsie memɨkutekai,

yukuyaxima mekaniwarayewitɨni 'ixaheritsixi memɨwatakwinikɨ. Hikɨ mekanitsutɨani piritsiteutsixi 'ixaheritsixi wahamatɨa meyukwitɨwetɨ, 'ixaheritsixi mekana'iwarieni, mɨkɨ mekaniukwi'iwa nauka miriyari meyupaɨmetɨ.

Kepauka mematitekaitsie kuyaxi memu'axɨa, 'ukirawetsixi 'ixaheritsixi mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuani: «¿Titayari Yawé tara'iwaxɨ, piritsiteutsixi pɨta titayari tiwaruparewi? Hikɨmɨ Yawé tɨratuya kakuniyari tepɨkweiyu Tsiru meka, para tahamatɨa muyeikanikɨ mɨtatsitawikweitsitɨanikɨ, memɨtatsi'aye'unie memɨkatatsi'a'iwakɨ».
'Ana yayupaɨmeme mekaniwarenɨ'ani Tsiru paitɨ tɨratu kakuniyari memɨkweiyukɨ, Yawé yuteɨtamete watsata. 'Eri niwemama yuhutatɨ Kakaɨyari tɨratuya kakuniyari.
Kepauka mɨkɨ mɨ'atɨarie memakuteitsie, mekanitsutɨani 'ixaheritsixi karima me'utihiwatɨ kwie naitɨ kaniutayuanekaitɨni.

Piritsiteutsixi hiwari me'u'enieka mɨpaɨ mekateniyuku'iwawiyakaitɨni: «¿Ketitayari kwinimieme metehehiwa hepɨrayutsixi mematiteitsie?» Matsi mekateniutamarieni kename Yawé tɨratuya kakuniyari he'atɨariekai mematiteitsie,
hikɨ piritsiteutsixi mekaniutimamani mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuani: «Kakaɨyari memakuteitsie kaninuani. Tameri keteyɨaka, hatsuakuri mɨpaɨ pɨkatareyuriwekai.
Neuxei tameri keteyɨaka. ¿Kemɨ'ane pɨtatsiparewieni kakaɨyarixi memɨtɨrɨkawi wahetsɨa, makumawetsie memɨwaruka'unaxɨ
Hikɨmɨtɨka piritsiteutsixi. Xɨka xekayuwaɨriyani waɨriyarika xemɨte'aitɨariekakɨ hepɨrayutsixi wahetsɨa, tame mɨkɨ kememɨte'uximaya tahetsɨa, xepɨka'utimamaweni tepeyutakwini 'ukitsi wahepaɨ».
Hikɨ piritsiteutsixi mekaniwarutakwini 'ixaheritsixi, mekana'iwarieni 'ixaheritsixi mekaniyuta'unaxɨani, kwinie meyupaɨmetɨ mepukwi'iwaxɨ kuyaxi 'ixaheritsixi, xeitewiyari heimana tamamata miriyari.
Meta mekaniunawaiyarieni Kakaɨyari tɨratuya kakuniyari, metatsiere mekaniukwi'iwa 'Eri niwemama yuhutatɨ, 'Uni Pinexi matɨa.
Merikɨtsɨ xewitɨ kuya Wenikamini xiɨyarieya, tiyukwitɨnekaku kaniyuta'una, kwitɨwa mɨkɨ tukaritsie kaneta'ani Tsiru paitɨ, naitɨ heutsanitɨ meta mu'ukwiematɨ tumuanarikɨ.

'Eri mana pukatei, yu'ɨparitsie 'akaitɨ huye'utɨa heutanieretɨ, yu'iyaritɨatɨ waɨkawa peumakai Kakaɨyari tɨratuya kakuniyari hepaɨtsita. Kepauka kiekaritsie kuya mɨye'a katiniwarutaxatɨani kemɨreyɨkai, 'ana yunaitɨ mekanitsutɨani me'utihiwatɨ.
'Eri mɨpaɨ katiniuta'iwauni hiwari 'enietɨ: —¿Titayari kwinimieme hiwari re'ane? mɨtitaxatɨanikɨ.
('Ana 'Eri nauka tewiyari heimana tamamata heimana 'atahaika wiyari pexeiyakai, pɨkaheunierekairi).
Tewi 'Eri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Mɨrayukwitɨnetsie nepeyetɨa, nepeneta'unaxɨ teheyukwitɨwetɨ. 'Eri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Neniwe, kereyɨane?

'Iya mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Ixaheritsixi teɨteriyari mekaneyuta'unaxɨani piritsiteutsixi mewamakatɨ, tekana'iwarieni yemekɨ. Meta 'aniwema yuhutatɨ 'Uni Pinexi matɨa menekwi'iwa, metatsiere Kakaɨyari tɨratuya kakuniyari tekanenawaiyarieni.

Kepauka mɨpaɨ mɨtiu'enaxɨ kename Kakaɨyari tɨratuya kakuniyari hekweiya, 'ana 'Eri yukutama kaniuweni yu'ɨparitsie 'akaitɨ kitenie kaniukaweni. Mɨ'ukiratsitɨkaikɨri meta kwinie mɨrahetekaikɨ, 'ayumieme katutsieya kaneutare kaniumɨni. Huta tewiyari wiyari 'Ixaheri kiekariyaritsie pɨti'aitametɨkai.

Pinexi 'ɨyaya, nayehukakaitɨni 'arikeke kanitiniwenikekaitɨni. Kepauka mɨpaɨ mɨretima kename Kakaɨyari tɨratuya hekweiyakai meta yaxeikɨa mu'eya meta kɨnaya kename me'ukwikai, 'ana 'ayumieme kwitɨwa kwinimieme titakwineka kaniutiniweni waɨriyarika.
Teniweritɨwamete me'ixeiyaka mɨximekaku mɨpaɨ mekatenitahɨawe: «Kene'awaɨriyani, 'ukitɨme pekanayexeiya». Peru mɨkɨ pɨkawaruta'ei, pɨkawaranu'eni.
Peru Kakaɨyari tɨratuya mekweiyakɨ meta mu'eya kɨnaya meta memukwikɨ, 'Ikawuri katiniterɨwa yuniwe, mɨpaɨ mɨtimatsiɨkɨnikɨ kename 'ixaheritsixi Yawé xawatɨriyaya waruku'eiriekai.
Mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: «'Ixaheritsixi watɨrɨkariya
Hikɨ kepauka piritsiteutsixi Kakaɨyari tɨratuya memekwei, 'Ewenetsexi meniyekweni 'Atsiruri mɨrakutewatsie mekani'atɨani,
kakaɨyari muwewiya Rakuhuni hetɨa mekaniteni memeyexeiyanikɨ mɨkɨ tukita.
'Uxa'arieka ximeri, 'Atsiruri kiekatari memanuku'ui, Rakuni kwiepa kaniukateitɨni titawimawetɨ, Yawé tɨratuya hɨxie. Hikɨ me'enukuhanaka muwakawekaitsie mekanekakeni.

Tawarita 'uxa'arieka ximeri, kepauka memanuku'ui mekanitaxeiya yaxeikɨa rekaikame, hutarieka hetiwaritɨ katinikateitɨni, Yawé tɨratuya hɨxie 'ukaikame. Tuki kitenie paitɨ mu'uya kaniukateitɨni, mamateyata pamumurikai 'ateewa pukuhetei.
'Ayumiemehikɨ, 'ikɨ tukariyaritsie Rakuhuni tukieyata memeutahake 'Atsiruri kiekariyaritsie, kitenie mepɨkaha'uwe mepimaiwe'erie nitɨma mawari wewiwamete.
Yawé 'Atsiruri memɨtamakai meta yateewa wa'aurie memɨtamakai, haiya 'amɨnene pɨwareyenɨ'airi memɨte'uka'eniwanikɨ.

'Atsiruri memɨtamakai teɨteri yamepɨtehetima, ketitayari mɨya mɨtiyɨanekai mɨpaɨ meputiyua: «'Ixaheritsixi wakakaɨyari kakunieya 'ena pɨkayuhayewani takiekaritsie, mɨkɨ kakaɨyari yuhaxɨa tahetsie peyenɨ'a meta takakaɨyari Rakuhuni hetsie».

Hikɨ yunaime piritsiteutsixi 'ukirawetsixi mekaniwarukuxeɨrieni mɨpaɨ mekateniwaruta'iwawiya: —¿Kete'iyurieni 'ikɨ 'ixaheritsixi wakakaɨyari kakunieya? Mɨpaɨ mekateniwaruta'eiya wa'ukitsiema: —Kahati kiekariyaritsie xekenetuayu. Hikɨ mɨpaɨ mepɨte'uyuri.
Merikɨte meheikutuaku mɨkɨ kiekaritsie, Yawé 'uximatɨarika kaneyenɨ'ani mɨkɨ kiekaritsie, haiya 'amɨnenekɨ mepɨte'uka'eniwakai mana kiekatari, tɨɨri meta 'ukirawetsixi. Mɨkɨ waɨkawa mepɨmamakai.

Hikɨ Kakaɨyari kakunieya mekanenɨ'ani 'Ekuruni paitɨ, yapauka kakuni mana heta'aku mɨkɨ kiekaritsie, mana kiekatari mekanitsutɨani mɨpaɨ mete'uhiwatɨ: «'Ixaheritsixi wakakaɨyari kakunieya kani'atɨarieni, mɨtatsikwinikɨ tame teyunaime».

Hikɨ 'ukirawetsixi piritsiteutsixi mekaniwarukuxeɨrieni, mɨpaɨ mekateniwarutahɨawe: «Xekenanukwe'i 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya kakunieya. Xekenetuayu hakewa memieme, mɨkatatsikwinikɨ tame yaxeikɨa ta'iwama». Mana waɨkawa memɨmamakaikɨ mekakwikutɨ, Kakaɨyari waɨkawa kwiniya mutatuakɨ wahetsiemieme.
Memɨka'ukwi haiya 'amɨnene xeikɨa
Yawé tɨratuya kakuniyari piritsiteutsixi wakwieyaritsie 'atahuta metseri kaniukateitɨni,
piritsiteutsixi mara'akate mekaniwarukuxeɨrieni meta temaiwawemete mɨpaɨ memɨtewata'iwawiyakɨ: —¿Kete'iyurieni Yawé tɨratuya kakuniyari? hakewa mekatei.

Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mekateniwaruta'eiya: —Xɨka mɨpaɨ xeteku'eriwani xe'iyetuakuni 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya tɨratuya kakunieya, yuxaɨtame xepɨkaheinɨ'awani, kaneuyeweka 'imikieri xemɨte'iyetuirieni Kakaɨyari. Hikɨ 'aixɨa xeteheu'erietɨ xekanakɨnikuni meta mɨpaɨ xekatenetimaikuni ketitayari Kakaɨyari mɨxetikwinitɨakai.

Hikɨ piritsiteutsixi tawarita mɨpaɨ mekateniwaruta'iwawiya: —¿Ketita tete'iyetuirieni? Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuani: —'Auxɨwime xepɨtiwewieni hurukɨ haiya 'etsa hepaɨ 'aneneme, yu'auxɨwimeta naikatsi hurukɨ mewewiyatɨkaime, piritsiteutsixi te'aitamete kememɨyupaɨme kaniwa'inɨaritɨni, mɨkɨ kwiniya yunaime pɨxe'axiya.

Hikɨ 'ayumieme haiya 'amɨnene hepaɨ me'aneneme, memɨtekɨxɨrɨwa 'ikɨ kwieyaritsie meta mɨpaɨ xeketenetimati 'ixaheritsixi wakakaɨyari pɨmariwe. Heiwatɨ tiuhayewa tixekwinitɨatɨ meta xekakaɨyarixi yaxeikɨa xekwietsie.
Parahuni ti'aitakaku 'ekipitutari kememɨkate'anu'enana mɨpaɨ xepɨkayɨaka. ¿Tamɨ xekatemate Kakaɨyari mɨtiwarekwinitɨa

»Hikɨ kaxeta xekeneuta'aita hekwatɨ mɨtawewiyanikɨ. Xekeniwarayehapani yuhutame wakaitsixi memɨniwetɨka, yuku hatsuaku memɨkahanuyetewawe. Wakaitsixi kaxeta xekeniwaranawiri, tsikerutsixita kuraruta xekeniwareuta'ɨna.
Hikɨ Yawé kakunieya xekeneutikweka kaxetatsie xekeneukateka. Xeimeta kakuni xemɨtewarutiwewi haiya meta naikatsi wa'ɨkiyarite, Kakaɨyari xemɨteyetuirienikɨ. Kaxeta xekanihayewakuni yuxaɨta mɨyemiekɨ,

xekenetaxeiyani. Xɨka Weti-Tsemetsi heye'ani yukwieyaritsie paitɨ, mɨpaɨ tepɨtehetimani kename Yawé tiyuriene mɨyamɨtatikwinitɨa. Peru xɨka kaxeta xaɨtsie heukuyune, mɨpaɨ tepɨtehetimani kename mɨkɨ katatsi'uyuri, kename takɨmana tete'utikwikwinixɨ».
Mɨpaɨ mekateniuyurieni yuhutame wakaitsixi meniwetɨkaime kaxeta mekaniwaranawirieni meta tsikerutsixi kuraruta mekaniwareɨ'ɨna.
Hikɨ Yawé kakunieya kaxetatsie mekanikateni meta kakuni naikatsi wa'ɨkiyari hurukɨ memɨwewiyatɨkatei, yaxeikɨa 'etsa hepaɨ mɨ'anene mɨrayepine mana mekanikateni.

Hikɨ wakaitsixi me'utitsuatɨ huyeta mekanekɨne, Weti-Tsemetsi mɨrakutewatsie huyeyari 'utɨma, xaɨtsie tɨma mepɨkaheukuyunixɨ. Piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiyarima kaxeta'utɨa mekanekɨne, Weti-Tsemetsi kwieyaritsie mekaniye'axɨani.
Weti-Tsemetsi kiekatari mana tɨriku mekanihɨatɨwekaitɨni mayeweritsie, kepauka kakuni memuxei meniyukatemamawieni waɨkawa.

Kutsuhexi Weti-Tsemetsi kiekame mati'etsakaitsie paitɨ kaninuani kaxeta mana puyuhayewaxɨ tete manukatei 'anetɨ. Hikɨ mana kiekatari kaxeta kɨyeyarikɨ mekaniutinaini, wakaitsixi meta mawari taiyariyari mekaniwarayeitɨani Yawé hetsiemieme.

Rewitsixi kaxeta memuti'ikapiekai, Yawé tɨratuya tete 'amɨnenatsie paitɨ mekaneteni meta kakuni hurukɨ mɨtiwewiyatɨka mɨrayepine. Mɨkɨ tukaritsie Weti-Tsemetsi kiekatari Yawé mawari taiyariyari minake mekaniuwewirieni.
Hikɨ piritsiteutsixi memɨyu'auxɨwi wa'ukiyarima mekaniuneniere naitɨ kemɨtiuyɨ, 'ana mekanakunuaxɨani 'Ekuruni paitɨ.
Haiya hepaɨ mɨ'anene hurukɨ mɨwewiyatɨka piritsiteutsixi Yawé memɨyetuiri, mɨkɨ pɨ'ayumiemetɨkai xexuitɨ 'ikɨ kiekaritetsie: 'Atsiruri, Kahatsa, 'Atsikaruni, Kahati meta 'Ekuruni.

Yaxeikɨa naikatsi hurukɨ memɨwewiyatɨka mɨkɨ pɨwa'inɨariyaritɨkai piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiyarima yukiekari kememɨtehexeiyakai kiekari 'aixɨa mɨ'anene meta kuraru mɨkahaheitɨka. Tete 'amɨnena Yawé tɨratuya manatekietsie, hikɨ 'akuxi kanehekɨaka, 'inɨari kanehɨkɨtɨni, Kutsuhexi kwieya makumatsie Weti-Tsemetsi kiekame.

Teɨteri mana kiekatari hipatɨ mepuyuwaɨri Yawé tɨratuya kakuniyaritsie memakanenierekɨ, peru mɨkɨ Kakaɨyari pɨwarukwi, haika tewiyari heimana tamamata meyupaɨmetɨ mepukwi. memɨte'uka'eniwakaikɨ, Yawé katiniwarukwinitɨani waɨkawa 'axamemɨte'uyurikɨ.
Weti-Tsemetsi memɨtamakai mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuani: «Kakaɨyari Yawé kanihɨkɨtɨni mɨpatsie. ¿Kemɨ'ane hɨxiena putakewe? ¿Hakewa tepenunɨ'ani kakunieya tahetsɨa mɨkayuhayewanikɨ?»
Hikɨ mɨpaɨ mekateniwarenɨ'airieni
Merikɨtsɨ Kiriati-Yeharini kiekatari, mekanekukweni, 'Awinarawikie mekanihɨani 'ateewa hɨritsie kanikakateitɨni. Manata nu'aya me'ihɨritɨatɨ mi'ɨwiyanikɨ. kemɨtiwara'iwaxɨ
Kiriati-Yeharini kiekariyaritsie mɨixa wiyari puyuri Yawé tɨratuya. Xeitewiyari wiyari Yawé mepɨwautɨwekai yunaitɨ 'ixaheritsixi me'utitsuatɨ meyuhɨawetɨ.

'AyumiemeTsamuheri yunaime 'ixaheritsixi mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: «Xɨka xeme xeyuwaɨriyani Yawé hetsɨa xemɨ'axɨanikɨ yu'iyarikɨ, xekeniwarexɨri kakaɨyarixi xemɨkawamate meta 'Atsitaruti 'ɨkiyarite. Yawé yuxaɨtame xeikɨa xekenayexeiyani mɨkɨ kanixetawikweitsitɨamɨkɨ piritsiteutsixi kememɨtexenanaima».
Hikɨ 'ana 'ixaheritsixi kakaɨyarixi Wahari hetsɨa miemete meta 'Atsitaruti 'ɨkiyarite naime mekateniwarexɨrieni, Yawé xeikɨa mehayexeiyatɨ mekanakɨne.
Hikɨ Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniuta'aita: «Xekeniwarukuxeɨri yunaime 'ixaheritsixi Mitsipa kiekariyaritsie, ne Yawé nemɨtawawirienikɨ xehetsiemieme».

Kepauka memuyukuxeɨri Mitsipa mekanitayeurieni. Meta mekaniuyuhakieni mɨkɨ tukaritsie, hikɨ mɨpaɨ mepɨteyuhekɨatakai yunaime wahɨxie: «Yawé hɨxie 'axatepɨte'uyuri». tiwa'aitɨatɨ Mitsipa kiekariyaritsie.

Piritsiteutsixi kepauka mɨpaɨ memɨtehetima kename 'ixaheritsixi meheyuxeɨriekai Mitsipa, piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiyarima mekanekɨne 'ixaheritsixi wahetsɨa mewatakwinike. Mɨpaɨ metehetimaika 'ixaheritsixi mekaniutimamani piritsiteutsixi wahepaɨtsita,
hikɨ mɨpaɨ Tsamuheri mekateniutahɨawe: «Pepɨkatihayewani Yawé pehahɨawetɨ tahetsiemieme mɨtatsitawikweitsitɨanikɨ piritsiteutsixi memɨkatatsiha'iwanikɨ».
'AyumiemeTsamuheri muxa nunutsi kaniuwiya, mawari taiyariyari kaneyeitɨani Yawé hetsiemieme. Hikɨ 'ana Yawé kaniutahɨawe 'ixaheritsixi wahetsiemieme, Yawé kanita'eiya.

Mexi 'akuxi Tsamuheri mawari wewiekai piritsiteutsixi mekanaye'axɨani 'ixaheritsixi mekaniwarutakwini, peru 'ana Yawé tɨranariya waɨkawa kanenɨ'ani piritsiteutsixi wahetsɨa, 'ana mɨkɨ mekaneuyuyexɨrieni mekana'iwarieni 'ixaheritsixi mekaniwara'iwa.
Hikɨ 'ixaheritsixi mekaniwaranukuweiya piritsiteutsixi, Mitsipa mekaniwayeweiya Weti-Kaxi paitɨ mekaniwarukwini, huyeta mewarukwiximetɨ mekaniuhukaitɨni.
Merikɨte Tsamuheri tete 'utituka mana kanitayeni Mitsipa Tseni wahixɨapa 'Ewenetsexi katiniterɨwa, «Yawé tatsiparewietɨ pɨkatihayewawe».
Tsamuheri kepaɨmexɨa tukari 'amuyeikakai, wahetsie. Tawariri 'ixaheritsixi mepɨkawara'iwaxɨ mepɨkayɨwawekairi wakwie memɨwanawairienikɨ.

Mɨpaɨ mete'uyurieka 'ixaheritsixi yukiekari mehexeiyatɨ mekanakɨne meripaitɨ piritsiteutsixi memɨwarunawairiekai, 'Ekuruni meta Kahati paitɨ ye'atɨkaime, mɨkɨ kwieyari piritsiteutsixi mekaniwarunawairiekaitɨni. 'Ana meta meteyuxeiyatɨ mekanakɨne.
Tsamuheri 'ixaheritsixi wa'itsɨkame kanihɨkɨtɨkaitɨni kepaɨmexɨa wiyari 'amuyeikakai.
Xeiwiyari 'anuyeyeikakaku kiekaritetsie pukayeikakai Weteri, Kirikari meta Mitsipa kwieyaritsie, wa'enietɨ 'ixaheritsixi 'aixɨa tiyurienetɨ kememɨteyu'uximatɨakai.
'Arike pɨ'axekai Xama kiekariyaritsie
Merikɨtsɨ kepauka Tsamuheri mu'ukiratsitɨkairi yuniwema pɨta kaniwaruhɨritɨani, 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie memɨte'aitanikɨ,
Weritsewa kiekariyaritsie metitetɨ. Matɨarieya pɨtitewakai Kuheri, hutarieka mieme 'Awiyaxi.

Perutsɨ mɨkɨ yuhutatɨ nixewitɨ yupaapa hepaɨ tiyurienetɨ pɨka'atɨa, kemɨtiwanake xeikɨa 'axameteyurietɨ mekanakɨne, yuhetsiemieme xeikɨa tumini menaki'erietɨ, ti'itatɨ tumini 'awie mɨnaki'erie, meta hipame 'aixɨa memɨwayurienikɨ yamɨkatiyuriene.
'Ayumieme'ukirawetsixi 'ixaheritsixi mekaniyukuxeɨrieni, Xama kiekariyaritsie mekanekɨne Tsamuheri metehetaxatɨanike.
Mɨpaɨ mekatenitahɨawe: «'Ekɨri 'ari pepu'ukiratsi, peru 'aniwema 'ahepaɨ mepɨkateyurie. 'Aixɨa pɨyɨni xeime ti'aitame ketaneyetuiri mɨtatita'aitɨanikɨ, naitsarie nuiwarite kwiepa memɨtama wahepaɨ».
Kepauka mɨpaɨ memɨte'itahɨawixɨ kename ti'aitame meheuyehɨwa, 'ana Tsamuheri pɨka'inakixɨ. Hikɨ Yawé nenewieri kaniupitɨani,
matsi Yawé mɨpaɨ pɨtitahɨawixɨ: «Heitseriemekɨ keniwa'enieka 'ixaheritsixi kememaitɨka. 'Ekɨ matsi mepɨkamatsixani'erie, nepɨta mepɨkanetsinaki'erie, mepɨkayuwaɨriya nemɨtiwa'aitɨakakɨ.
Kepauka 'Ekipitu nemɨwarayewitɨ kememɨnetsiyuriekai hikɨ mɨpaɨ mekameniyurieka. Mepɨnetsi'uku'eiri hipame kakaɨyarixi mewarayexeiyatɨ mepakɨ.
Merikɨte keniwaranu'eni kememaitɨka, peru keniwarayemari'itɨa hahekɨakamekɨ kemɨtiyurieni mɨkɨ ti'aitame wahetsie tɨrɨkaɨyemekɨ».
Hikɨ Tsamuheri teɨteri ti'aitame memuku'iwawakai katiniwarutaxatɨani Yawé kemɨtitahɨawixɨ.

Mɨpaɨ katiniwarutaxatɨani: —'Ipaɨ katiniyurimɨkɨ ti'aitame, tɨrɨkaɨyemekɨ katinita'aitamɨkɨ xehetsie: Yuniwema xekaninawaiyariekuni para kaxetate memɨwahɨtɨkanikɨ meta kawayutsixi kuyaxi watewama, meta ti'aitame kaxetaya manuyeyeikatsie memɨte'anuyepiwanikɨ.
Kuyaxi tewa'aitɨwamete mekanayeitɨariekuni meta kwietsanamete, 'itsanamete, kuyaxi wa'ixiparate wewiwamete, yaxeikɨa tita naime memɨtekumaɨwa kuyaxi.
Xeniwema 'ukari xeninawaiyariekunita para witsimɨtiu'ɨatɨka memɨtetiwewienikɨ meta 'ikwai wewiwametekɨ, meta paa wewiwametekɨ.
Xekwie 'aixɨa mɨ'anene mekanixenawairiekuni meta xekaxie haraweriyarite 'aixɨa mɨ'anene, huriwa haraweriyari kaniwayetuiriemɨkɨ memiparewie.
Xe'itsanari meta kepaɨmeme xemɨka'inɨni kaxie, xepɨtawawiyarieni tamamatatsiemieme xeime, ti'aitame parewiwametemama memɨyetuiriyarienikɨ.
Metatsiere te'uximayatamete xehetsɨa miemete 'ukitsi meta 'ukari, meta xetuurutsixi kwietsanamete 'aixɨa memɨ'anene, meta xepuxuri xepɨtenawaiyarieni ti'aitame hetsiemieme pɨta memɨteta'uximayatakɨ.
Xekanitawawiyariekuni yutewama tamamatatsiemieme xeime, meta xeme xekaniyɨkuni waɨriyarika xemɨte'ita'uximayatsirieni.
Kepauka mɨkɨ tukari maye'ani xekaniyutihɨawikuni xe'utitsuatɨ ti'aitame hepaɨtsita xe'itahɨawekatɨtɨ, 'anari Yawé pɨkaxe'enieka.
Matsi teɨteri Tsamuheri mepɨka'u'eni yuri mepɨkate'ita'eriri, mɨpaɨ pɨta mekaniutiyuani: —Tsepatsɨ kepemaine, peru tame tati'aitɨwame tepeuyehɨwa mɨtatita'aitɨanikɨ.
Mɨpaɨ matsi hipame nuiwarite wahepaɨ te'anenetɨ tekanakɨnikuni, mɨtati'aitɨakakɨ meta kepauka temɨtakwiyutsie 'anuyekaitɨ meyeikanikɨ.
Merikɨte waru'enieka teɨteri tita memɨteheuyehɨakai, Tsamuheri Yawé yakatiniutaxatɨani.
Yawé mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya:

Merikɨtsɨ xewitɨ tewi kaniuyeikakaitɨni Wenikamini nuiwarieya hetsiemieme, 'aixɨa pɨtixeiyariekai, Kihitsi pɨtitewakai 'Awiheri nu'aya, mɨkɨta Tseruxi nu'ya, mɨkɨta Wekurati nu'aya, mɨkɨta 'Apiha nu'ayatɨtɨ, mɨkɨ Wenikamini pɨxiɨyarieyatɨkai.
Kihitsi yuniwe pexeiyakai Tsahuri titewakame, mɨkɨ temaikɨ witsipɨtiyuxexeiyakai, 'ixaheri tewiyari nixewitɨ mɨpaɨ pɨka'anekai, kwinimieme putewikai hipatɨ xeikɨa naiparieyatsie mepuku'axekai.
Heiwa mekaneuyexɨrieni Kihitsi puxurimama, yuniwe Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Xeime ti'uximayatame kenawitɨtɨ puxuri keniwawaumie».

Tsahuri ti'uximayatame matɨa mekanekɨne, 'Epɨrahini hɨriyaritsie mekaniuyekɨne, meta Tsaritsa kwieyaritsie paitɨ mekaniuyekɨne, peru mepɨkawarutaxei. Tsarini kwieyaritsieta mekaniuyekɨne meta 'arike Wenikamini kwieyaritsie mekaniuti'iwauni, manata yaxeikɨa mepɨkawarutaxei.
Kepauka Tsupi kwieyaritsie memɨye'axɨa, Tsahuri ti'uximayatame mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Hikɨmɨri. Tepakunuaxɨani, nepaapa matsi heyu'iyaritɨaka tahetsiemieme keyuri puxuri wahetsiemieme.

Ti'uximayatame mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Ena kiekaritsie xewitɨ puka tewi Kakaɨyari mayexeiya yunaitɨ 'aixɨa memɨte'imate. Mɨkɨ kemɨtayɨni mɨpaɨ katinaye'axeni. ¿Ketitayari matsi muwa tekateheukɨ? Matsi mɨkɨ huye kataretaxatɨani kemɨ'ane temanukuweiya.
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —Xɨka teheukɨne, ¿ketita teteheimini? Tixaɨtɨri tepɨkate'atɨkɨ takɨtsiurita tikwaiwame, meta 'imikieri tepɨkatehexeiya temɨteheiyetuirienikɨ.
Ti'uximayatame mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Matsi ne nepeixeiya haika kɨramuyari pɨrata, mɨkɨ tepeiyetuirieni tewi Kakaɨyari mayexeiya mɨtaretaxatɨanikɨ ketemɨteheuyune.

(Meripaitɨ kiekatari 'ixaheritsixi kepauka Kakaɨyari memɨta'iwawiya, mɨpaɨ meputiyuanekai: «Tewi mɨtixeiya kemɨtiyɨni hetsɨa tepuhu», mɨpaɨ mepɨtewaruterɨwakai 'anamiemete, hikɨta Kakaɨyari niukametemama mepɨtetetewa).
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —'Aixɨa kani'aneni tekanihuni. mekanekɨne tewi Kakaɨyari mayexeiya manukateitsie.
Mana kiekaritsie meheutahaxɨaximekaku mekuhanɨtɨweme. Mɨpaɨ mekateniwaruta'iwawiya: —¿'Ena tiuka tewi mɨtixeiya kemɨtiyɨni?
Mɨpaɨ mekateniwaruta'eiya: —Huu, peru huma paitɨ 'etsiwa peka. Xeiya xekeneuhuni kiekaritsie kaneye'akake, kiekatari mawari mepewewieni hɨritsie memɨte'atimawatsie.

Kepauka kiekaritsie xemeuye'axɨani xekaneitaxeiyakuni, xɨka xehe'axɨani kahanutiyeiwekaku hɨritsie mɨratimawatɨretsie. Teɨteri mepɨtehekwani mɨkɨ henuayuke, mɨkɨ meri mawari 'aixɨa heyurieyu, 'anake memuta'inierie metenekwaikuni. 'Ayumieme xeiya xekeneuhuni, hikɨ kwitɨwa xekaneitaxeiyakuni.
Hikɨ Tsahuri yuparewiwame matɨa kiekaritsie menekɨne. Meheutahaxɨaximekaku Tsamuheri kaniwaranukunake, tuki manuwe hɨritsie huyeyari 'utɨa.
Meripaitɨ Tsahuri kanuawekaku 'akuxi, Yawé Tsamuheri 'ipaɨ katiniutahekɨatɨakaitɨni:

«'Uxa'a, 'ipaɨ pauka xeime tewi nemenanunɨ'airiemɨkɨ Wenikamini kwieyaritsie kiekame. Pepikawirieni hatseiti para ti'aitame mayanikɨ 'ixaheritsixi mɨtiwata'aitɨanikɨ, mɨwatawikweitsitɨanikɨ piritsiteutsixi memɨwananaimakɨ. Neteɨterima nepɨwarutinenimayataxɨ, wahiwari wa'aiwari nehetsɨapai mɨye'axekɨ».
Kepauka Tsamuheri Tsahuri muxei, Yawé mɨpaɨ pɨtitahɨawixɨ: «Mana tewi mamie kanihɨkɨtɨni nemɨmatsihaxaxatɨwakai, mɨkɨ neteɨterima katiniwata'aitɨamɨkɨ».
Kiekari kitenie mehaye'axɨaximetɨ, Tsahuri 'ahurawa kaniuyani Tsamuheri 'aurie, mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Ketatineutaxatɨa hakewa tewi mɨtixeiya kemɨtiyɨni kiiya pewe?

Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —Ne tewi mɨtixeiya kemɨtiyɨni nepɨhɨkɨ. Xekenenanuweiya hɨritsie paitɨ tuki manuwe, mana xepɨtehekwani nehamatɨa. 'Uxa'ake kepauka nemɨmatsipitɨani pemɨyemiekɨ, 'anake yanepɨmatitahɨawe ketita pemɨrayexeiya.
Mɨkɨta puxuri memeuyexɨri haika tukari manukamie, pepɨka'a'iyaritɨakari mepetaxeiyarie. Tawarita mɨpaɨ katinitaxatɨani: —Matsi 'ixaheritsixi waɨkawa mepɨmatsiheuyehɨwa, meta yunaitɨ 'a'iwama.

Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —¿Titayari mɨya penetikɨhɨawe? Ne nekanihɨkɨtɨni Wenikamini xiɨyarieyatsie mieme, 'etsi mɨyumate 'Ixaheri nu'aya. Meta Wenikamini xiɨyarieyatsie miemete ne'ukiyarima tixaɨtɨ mepɨkatehɨkɨ.
Matsi, Tsamuheri, Tsahuri meta ti'uximayatame mame kaniwarewitɨni tukita mɨrewatikwaiwatsie, yuxaɨtame kaniwarayatsa, memuta'inierie xeitewiyari heimana tamamata meyupaɨmeme wahamatɨa.
Hikɨ Tsamuheri 'ikwai wewiwame mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Wai nematsi'uta'aitɨa pemiti'utakekai kenayekwe'i.

'Ikwai wewiwame naimime teuri kaniwayekweni, Tsahuri kaniumini. Hikɨ Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Kamɨ 'ahetsiemieme nemɨtiuti'utakai ketineukwaka, nekawata'iniwetɨ 'akuxi hipame, miemekɨ. Tsamuheri hamatɨa.
Hikɨ menanakakɨne mɨratimawatɨretsie kiekaritsie meniu'axɨani, Tsamuheri Tsahuri hamatɨa katiniutixata yukii heima.
Ximeri 'ukatareku memanuku'uwetsie, 'utakeka, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kenanukukexiri, pekaniyemieniri. Tsahuri kananukukeni, yunaitɨ kiita mekaniwayekɨne.
Kepauka memanayenexɨaximekai

passage_titles.title: 'Ayumieme'ixaheritsixi Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ Tsamuheri Tsahuri hatseiti kemɨtiukawiri
Mɨpaɨ tiuyɨku mɨkɨ tukaritsie Tsahuri pɨtiukwai

verses.text: Hikɨ Tsamuheri puteyu hatseiti witsimu'ɨa mayema watihanaka Tsahuri mu'uyatsie kanikawirieni. Meta kani'itseni mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Yawé kaniyɨaneni mɨmatiukawiri teɨterimama tiwa'aitɨwame pemayanikɨ.

Hikɨ kwitɨwa pemɨyemietsie Tseritsa peneye'amɨkɨ, Wenikamini kwieyari mata'atɨkatsie, Xakeri makateukie 'aurie, mana teɨteri yuhutame peniwarexeiyamɨkɨ. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mematenetahɨawikuni: “Puxuri mepetaxeiyarie pemɨwawaunekai. Peru 'apaapa puxuri wahekɨ pɨkaheyuhɨawe, hikɨ pɨta xehetsiemieme peyu'iyaritɨa: ‘¿Mɨpaɨ pɨreku'eriwa kenetiyurieneni para neniwe nemɨtaxeiyakɨ?’ ”

»Matsi hukaiwa paitɨ, kepauka Tawuxi xiu manuwe pemeye'ani, peniwaranukunakimɨkɨ yuhaikame teɨteri Weteri meheukɨneka, Kakaɨyari nenewieri meheupitɨayuka. Mɨkɨ xewitɨ yuhaikame tsipuri puwarahapanani, xewitɨta paa haikame pa'ɨka, xewitɨta winu nawita 'uyemakame 'ahanatɨ.
Mematsihetawaɨritɨame, hutame paa mekamene'ɨitɨakuni. Keniwaretanaki'eriri.

»Mana pemɨyeyani Kiweya Kakaɨyari hetsɨa peneye'amɨkɨ, kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi mematiteitsie. Mana kiekaritsie peheutahaximetɨ Kakaɨyari niukametemama peniwaranukunakimɨkɨ tuki manuwe hɨritsie me'akaneikame. Metekuxatatɨ Kakaɨyari yatiwapitɨakaku mekaniyɨakakuni meta mete'ukayuitɨwatɨ mekaniyɨakakuni hipatɨ, kɨrautakɨ, kaitsakɨ, haripa 'amɨpapakɨ meta 'etsimɨpepekɨ.
Hikɨ Yawé 'Iyarieya 'ahetsie kaninuamɨkɨ tɨrɨkaɨyetɨ, 'ekɨta mɨkɨ wahamatɨa pekatinitaxatamɨkɨ yɨkɨ pe'anetɨ pekanayeimɨkɨ,
Kepauka maye'ani 'ikɨ 'inɨari kenemerahɨawe, mɨpaɨ ketineyurieneni kemɨreuyewetse 'ahetsiemieme, Kakaɨyari kamaniparewiekamɨkɨ.

»Kenemie Kirikari 'ekɨ meri. Mana 'ahamatɨa mawari taiyariyari meta 'aixɨa temɨteyuxeiyanikɨ mawariyari nekanewewimɨkɨ, kepauka nemenuani, yanepɨmaretahɨawe kepemɨtiyurieneni. Perutsɨ 'atahuta tukari kenenetakwewieka».
Merikɨte kepauka Tsahuri metɨa Tsamuheri mana 'uku'eirieka, Kakaɨyari 'iyarieya kaniupata, 'ana mɨkɨ tukaritsie naitɨ 'inɨari kanaye'ani.

Kepauka Kiweya memeta'axɨa, Tsahuri tiyu'uximayatame matɨa, mana Kakaɨyari niukametemama yuwaɨkawatɨ mekanayenexɨani mewaranunakeke. Hikɨ Kakaɨyari 'iyarieya tiyukɨhɨawetɨ kanayani, tikuxatatɨ wahamatɨa kaniyuhayewa.
Meripaitɨ memimatekai, me'ixeiyatɨ tikuxatame Kakaɨyari niukametemama wahamatɨa meniyuku'iwawiyakaitɨni: —¿Kekuta'uyɨ Tsahuri Kihitsi nu'aya? ¿Kamɨtsɨta mɨkɨ Kakaɨyari niukameya xewitɨ tihɨkɨ?
Xewitɨ mana kiekametɨtɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —¿Kamɨtsɨ kemɨ'ane pɨtiwa'aitɨa mɨkɨ? Manari hipatɨ mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuanekaitɨni: «¿Kamɨtsɨta Tsahuri Kakaɨyari niukameya tihɨkɨ?»
Kepauka mɨtiutahayewaxɨ Tsahuri tikuxatatɨ, 'anari yemuritsie kanitiyune tuki manuwe.

Hikɨ tatatsieya warukaxeiyaka mana kaniwaruta'iwawiya ti'uximayatameya mame: —¿Xeme hakewa xepe'uwakai? Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Tame puxuri tepɨwarewautɨwekai, peru tekawaretaxeiyawawetɨ, Tsamuheri hetsɨa tekanekukɨnixɨani.
Tsahuri tatatsieya tawarita kanita'iwawiya: —Tsamuheri kexeretahɨawixɨ kenetineutaxatɨa.
—Heitseriemekɨ pɨtaretaxatɨa kenameri puxuri mewaretaxeiyakai. hepaɨtsita.
Mɨpaɨ tiuyɨku 'arike, Tsamuheri 'ixaheritsixi kaniwaruta'inieni, Yawé hɨxie memɨyukuxeɨrienikɨ Mitsipa mɨrakutewatsie.

Mana 'ixaheritsixi mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: «Mɨpaɨ kanaineni Yawé, 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya: “Ne nepɨxe'ayewitɨ 'Ekipitu kwieyaritsie, 'ekipitutari waɨriyarika metexe'aitɨakaku nepɨxe'uxɨnaxɨ, meta hipatɨ te'aitamete mexenanaimakaku”.

Hikɨ matsi xeme yukakaɨyari xepɨkanaki'erie, kemɨ'ane 'aixɨa mɨxe'uyuri naime kexemɨte'uka'eniwakai hepaɨtsita, mɨpaɨ xeikɨa xeputiyɨane: “Hawaikɨ. Ketaneyetuiri tati'aitɨwame, para mɨtati'aitɨakakɨ”. Xekeneyukuxeɨri, Yawé hɨxie keyupaɨmetɨ xemɨnuiwarite meta xemɨxiɨyarimama».
Hikɨ katiniuta'aita Tsamuheri 'ahurawa memɨyuta'iwakɨ, Wenikamini nuiwariyaritsie katiniunake.
Hikɨ katiniuta'aita memawitɨkienikɨ memakɨnekɨ, Matɨri xiɨyarimama hetsie katiniunake, 'imatɨarieka Tsahuri hetsie katiniunake Kihitsi nu'aya. Hikɨ Tsahuri mekaniutiwauni, peru mepɨkaheitaxei.
Hikɨ tawarita Yawé mekaniuta'iwawiya: ¿Kamɨtsɨ mɨkɨ tewi hikɨ 'ena tahamatɨa tiuyeika? Yawé mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Huu, xepiinite mɨratipinetsie kaniyu'awietani.
Hikɨ menekɨne me'unautsaxɨaximetɨ muwa meneyehana. Kepauka Tsahuri teɨteri wahixɨapa mutake, kwinie kaniutewikaitɨni nixewitɨ tɨma naipariena pɨka'uti'axekai.
Tsamuheri kiekatari yunaime mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Xekeneuxeiya tewi Yawé menayexei. watsata. Yunaitɨ mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuanekaitɨni: —Ke'ayeniereni ti'aitame yuheyemekɨ.

Merikɨte Tsamuheri kaniwarutaxatɨani teɨteri, Kakaɨyari 'aitsikaya ti'aitame hepaɨtsita mieme, xapatsie tiwaruta'utɨirieka niti'uta Yawé hɨxie. Meta mɨpaɨ katiniuta'aita memɨtayeixɨanikɨ yunaitɨ yukiekaritetsie.
Tsahuri meta yaxeikɨa kaneyani yukie Kiweya paitɨ, mekaneweiyakaitɨni teɨteri yayupaɨmetɨ yamemɨtekahu, kehate meta Yawé wa'iyari muyuitɨaxɨa.
Peru hipatɨ 'axamemɨte'u'iyari mɨpaɨ
Merikɨtsɨ 'amunitsixi tiwa'aitɨwame Nakaxi kwieyaritsie, yukuyaxima waritana kaniwara'uitɨatɨyani. Mana kiekatari mɨpaɨ mekatenitahɨawe: —Tahamatɨa tɨratu keneuwewi, matsiparewiwamete tepakɨne.

Nakaxi mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya 'amunitanaka: —Tɨratu nepɨwewieni xehamatɨa, xɨkatsɨ xeyuwaɨriyani nemɨxewatitɨkiriexɨani xehɨxite xetserie mieme. Mɨpaɨ netiyurieme 'ixaheritsixi yunaime nepɨwananaimani.

Hikɨ 'ukirawetsixi Kawetsi kiekatari mɨpaɨ mekatenita'eiya: —'Atahuta tukari ketaneupitɨa temɨtewatanɨ'airiexɨanikɨ 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie naitsarie, xɨkari xewitɨ kayɨweni mɨtatsitawikweitsitɨanikɨ, 'ahetsɨari tepɨtayetuani.
Hikɨ kepauka memutanɨ'arie Kiweya memeta'axɨa, Tsahuri kiekariena mɨhɨkɨtɨkai, mɨpaɨ mekateniwarutaxatɨani kememɨte'utahɨawarie, 'ana yunaitɨ mekaniutitsuani.
'Ana kwitɨ Tsahuri hɨritsie kanakaneni tuurutsixi yukwietsanamete wara'arietɨ, hikɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'iwawiya: «¿Kexetehanuyekɨ? Kawetsi kiekatari kememɨtewarutahɨawixɨ.
Hikɨ kepauka Tsahuri mɨkɨ niuki mu'eni, tɨrɨkaɨyetɨ. Ha'atɨ,

yuhutame tuurutsixi kaniwarukwini kaniwarutixiteni 'etsipepeme, tupiritsixi naitsarie 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie kaniwareutanɨ'axɨani wai me'utɨkɨme, mɨpaɨ 'ane niuki warupitɨaka: «Mɨpaɨ mekani'itɨariekuni yunaitɨ túurutsiximama kemɨ'ane Tsahuri meta memɨyukwiyutsie». memɨtimamanikɨ mɨkɨ niuki hepaɨtsita, meyuxewitɨ meheuyukwiyuka.
Tsahuri Wetseki kaniwarukuxeɨrieni muwati'inɨatakɨ, 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie miemete haika tsienituyari miriyari mepɨyupaɨmekai, tamamata miriyari mepɨyupaɨmekai.

Hikɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe niuki memɨ'atɨa: «Xekenehu mɨpaɨ xeketeniwaretahɨawi Kawetsi Karaha kiekatari: “'Uxa'a tuka waɨkawa muxɨkanitsie xekanitawikweitsitɨariekuni”». kiekatari. Mɨkɨ mete'utamarieka mekaniyukatemamawieni waɨkawa.
'Ayumieme'amunitsixi mɨpaɨ mekateniwarutahɨawe: «'Uxa'ari xehetsɨa tepɨtayetuani, xemeri kexemɨtatsiyurieka kemɨtixenake».

'Uxa'arieka ximeri kakahekɨariwekaku, me'ayehaikame. 'Amunitsixi mematiteitsie meniye'axɨani meniwarutakwini, mewakwitɨwetɨ tuka 'uxɨkakakuke mekateniutahayewa. Memutawikwei yuxexuitɨ mekaniyuta'unaxɨani, hipatɨri yunaitɨ mekaniukwi'iwa.
Merikɨtsɨ Tsamuheri kiekatari mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —¿Kemɨ'ane mepɨhɨkɨ Tsahuri memɨkanaki'eriekai tati'aitɨwame mayanikɨ? Xekeniwarahapani temɨwakwinikɨ.
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Xewitɨ pɨkamierieni hikɨ. 'Ikɨ tukaritsie Yawé 'Ixaheri puxɨnaxɨ.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe teɨteri: —Hikɨmɨtɨka. Kirikari tepɨyehu, 'aixɨa temeiyurienikɨ Tsahuri ti'aitame mayanikɨ.
Merikɨte yunaitɨ Kirikari mekanekɨne, mana
Merikɨtsɨ Tsamuheri 'ixaheritsixi yunaime mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Xekeneneu'eni, ne naimekɨ nepɨxeheu'eniekai kexemɨnetekɨhɨawekai, tixe'aitɨwame nepɨxe'anukaketsiri mɨtixe'aitɨakakɨ.
Mɨkɨri kanihɨkɨtɨni mɨxeyewitɨni. Neri nepu'ukiratsi meta nepɨmutuxari meta neniwema kiekatari mekanihɨkɨtɨni. Ne nepɨxeparewie temaikɨyaripai hikɨ tukaritsie 'akuxi.

'Ena xepɨnetsi'uketsa. Yawé hɨxie kexemɨnete'utahɨawe xepɨyɨwawe meta menayexei hɨxie. ¿Kemɨ'ane tuuruya, puxuya nepunawa? ¿Kemɨ'ane nepukwamanaxɨ? nepɨkarakapitɨa? Xekeneneutaxaneta nepɨrayukatuani kexemɨnetetawawirieni.
Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mekatenita'eiya: —Hatsuaku pepɨkatatsihekwamanaxɨ, pepɨkatatsi'uhiweritɨa, nixeimetɨma pepɨkatiunawatsiri.

Tawarita Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Yawé meta mɨkɨ menayexei hamatɨa memunenierixɨ mepɨhɨme, tixaɨtɨ xemɨkate'ukaxeikɨ 'axamɨti'ane nehetsie. Teɨteri mɨpaɨ mekatenita'eiya: —'Aixɨa pɨ'ane, mɨkɨ mekehɨkɨtɨni.
Metatsiere Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Yawé munierixɨ pɨhɨkɨ, Muitsexi 'Aruni mɨwaranayexei memɨwarayewitɨnikɨ xetutsima 'Ekipitutsie.
Hikɨ xekeneneu'eni. Yawé waɨkawa 'aixɨa pɨxeyurie hikɨ yaxeikɨa xetutsima wahepaɨ, ne peru tixaɨtɨ nepɨrexeiya xehetsiemieme nemɨxetaxanetakɨ.
»Kakuwu kepauka 'Ekipitu munua 'arikeke, muwatawikweitsitɨanikɨ. Hikɨ Yawé Muitsexi meta 'Aruni kaniwarenɨ'ani 'Ekipitu, memɨwarayewitɨnikɨ 'ena memɨwa'atɨanikɨ.
Peru Yawé yukakaɨyari mekanatɨmaiya, tiwa'aitɨwame hetsɨa Katsuxi kiekame, meta piritsiteutsixi wahetsɨa meta Muhawi ti'aitame hetsɨa, mɨkɨ mekaniwarutakwini.

'Ayumiemexeme Yawé xeputahɨawixɨ mɨxeparewienikɨ: “Tame 'axatepɨte'uyuri Yawé temuku'eirikɨ meta kakaɨyarixi Wahari hetsɨa miemete meta 'Atsitaruti 'ɨkiyarite tehayexeiyatɨ temakɨkɨ. Peru xɨka hikɨ petatsi'uparewieni memɨtatsi'aye'unie temɨwara'iwakɨ, 'ekɨ xeikɨari tepɨmatsi'ayexeiyani”.
Hikɨ 'ayumieme, Yawé Yeruwahari kaneyenɨ'ani meta Waraki, Ketexi meta Tsamuheri, mɨkɨ wareyenɨ'aka kanixe'utawikweitsitɨani memɨxe'aye'uniekai watsata, kayuwatɨ xemu'uwanikɨ yu'iyarikɨ.

»Neuxei xeme kepauka Nakaxi 'amunitsixi tiwa'aitɨwame xemutamari xe'uniekame, xeme matsi mɨpaɨ xepɨnetekɨhɨawekai: “Pɨkatixaɨtsietɨ. Tame tepeiyehɨwa tati'aitɨwame”. Yawé matsi xekakaɨyari, tixe'aitɨwame hɨkɨtɨkaku.
'Aixɨa kani'aneni, tixe'aitɨwame 'ena kaniuweni xemita'iwau xemenayexei. Peru mɨpaɨ xeketenemaika, Yawé kanihɨkɨtɨni mɨkɨ xeti'aitɨwame mɨxeyetuiri.
Xɨka xeme meta xeti'aitɨwame, Yawé yukakaɨyari xe'eyemakatɨ xe'akɨne, xete'i'uximayatsirieka, xɨka xehei'enieka, yaxetekahutɨ 'aitsikayatsie meta xɨka 'aixɨa xete'u'uwani. Yemekɨ 'aixɨa pɨ'ane.
Peru, xɨka Yawé 'aitsikateya xekahanu'enieni, xɨka xeka'i'enieni, mɨkɨ kaniyeha'amɨkɨ 'axakanixeyurimɨkɨ xetutsima meripaitɨ kemɨwaruyuri hepaɨ.
»Hikɨta xekeneneu'eni, xekeneunenieri yeme hikɨ Yawé mariwemekɨ kemɨtiyurieni.

Hikɨ witarita pɨkahɨkɨ, matsi 'itsanaxa pɨhɨkɨ, peru ne Yawé nenitahɨawimɨkɨ, mɨkɨ menɨ'anikɨ wiyeri meta tɨranari, mɨpaɨ 'ana yaxepɨtehetimani kename Yawé hɨxie 'axaxete'uyuri xemitawawirikɨ xeime ti'aitame».
Tsamuheri Yawé kaniutahɨawe, hikɨ mɨkɨ tukaritsie Yawé wiyeri tɨranari kaneyenɨ'ani, hikɨ yunaitɨ teɨteri mekaniutimamani Yawé hɨxie meta Tsamuheri hɨxie.
'AyumiemeTsamuheri mɨpaɨ mekateniutahɨawe: —Yawé 'akakaɨyari nenewieri keneupitɨa tahetsiemieme mate'uximayatsiriwamete mɨkatatsikwinikɨ. Tame teyunaitɨ temuta'iwaukɨ yemekɨ 'axatepɨte'uyuri.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —Xepɨkaheumamaka. Tsepanetɨ waɨkawamekɨ 'axaxemɨte'uyuri, Yawé xepɨka'uku'e'eiriwani, matsi pɨta naime yu'iyarikɨ xeketene'uximayatsirieka.
Kakaɨyarixi tixaɨtɨ memɨkateyunaki'erie xepɨkawarayexeiyani, mɨkɨ mepɨkayɨwawe memɨxe'uparewieni memɨxe'utawikweitsitɨani, tixaɨtɨ memɨkatehɨkɨkɨ.
Yawé pinake memeitimanikɨ teɨteri yemekɨ, 'ayumieme yuteɨterima pɨkawarexɨrieni, matsi pɨta yuteɨterima pɨxe'ayeitɨa xeme 'aixɨa 'iyarikɨ.
Peru neta Yawé kenetsiparewieka nemɨkatihayewakɨ xehetsiemieme neyunenewietɨ, xɨka ne netiuhayewa Kakaɨyari hetsiemieme 'axanepɨtiyurieni. Meta huye mɨheitserie 'aixɨa mɨ'ane nepɨxe'ɨkitɨaka 'akuxi.
Waɨkawamekɨ nepɨxehayehɨtɨwa Yawé xemayemakaxenikɨ, naime yu'iyarikɨ xekenayexeiyani, xehe'eriwatɨ mariwemekɨ kemɨtiuyuri xehetsiemieme.
Xɨka xekate'uhayewa 'axaxeteyurietɨ,
Merikɨtsɨ Tsahuri xeitewiyari heimana tamamata wiyari kanexeiyakaitɨni kepauka 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie mitsutɨa ti'aitatɨ, huta tewiyari heimana huta wiyari katiniuta'aita.

Tsahuri 'ixaheritsixi haika miriyari kuyaxi kaniwaranayexeiya, hamatɨana mepu'uwakai huta miriyari Mikimatsi mɨrakutewatsie meta Weteri hɨriyaritsie, Kunatani hetsɨata xeimiriyari mepu'uwakai Kiweya Wenikamini kwieyaritsie. kaniwarenɨ'ani.

Kunatani piritsiteutsixi wahetsɨa mekaniye'axɨani mekaniwarutakwini, Kehewa mɨrakutewatsie, peru piritsiteutsixi matsi mekatenetimani. Hikɨ katiniuta'aita Tsahuri 'awa mɨtahɨtsierienikɨ naitsarie 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie mɨpaɨ haitɨ: «Hepɨrayutsixi yunaime tepɨxeheuyehɨwa».

'Ixaheritsixi yamepɨtehetima 'ikɨ niuki hepaɨtsita kemɨtiuyɨ: «Tsahuri kuyaximama piritsiteutsixi mekaniwaretakwini, 'ayumieme matsi waɨkawa piritsiteutsixi metatsixani'erietɨ mekanakɨne». 'AyumiemeTsahuri teɨteri mepi'eni mepuyukuxeɨri Kirikari mɨrakutewatsie.

Meta piritsiteutsixi mekaniyukuha'aritɨani 'ixaheritsixi mewatakwinike. Haika miriyari kaxetate kuyaxa miemete mepuwarahapakai, meta 'ataxewi miriyari kuyaxi kawayutsixi wahetsie me'utetɨ, kuyaxi yu'ɨkama memuhu mepɨyumɨirekai mepɨkayu'inɨatsinɨakai xiekari hepaɨ. Mikimatsi mɨrakutewatsie mekaniye'axɨani, Weti-'Awenimɨrakutewa 'aurie tau manatineika hepa, mana mekaniyuhayewa.

'Ixaheritsixi 'ahurawa memɨti'uitɨariekaikɨ mekanimamakaitɨni, kuyaxi yunaitɨ mɨpaɨ mepɨteku'eriwakai kename piritsiteutsixi mewara'iwakekai. 'Ayumieme mepɨyuti'awietaxɨa terɨta, 'ɨtsita, tetexi warie, kwieta meutaxaxawata, meta putsu muyewawakita.
Metatsiere hepɨrayutsixi hipatɨ menanukɨne memɨyuta'unakɨ, Kahari Karaha kwieyaritsie. Peru Tsahuri puyuhayewaxɨ Kirikari, yunaitɨ kuyaximama memiteɨtakai waɨkawa mekanimamakaitɨni.
Tsamuheri 'atahuta tukari kemɨtitukaritɨakai, Tsahuri mana kanita'ikwewakaitɨni, matsi mɨkɨ pɨkanuawekai, kuyaxi memitsutɨakaikɨ metakɨkatɨ,
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniuta'aita: «Mawari taiyariyari mayani xekenene'atɨiri meta 'aixɨa temɨteyuxeiyanikɨ mawariyari», hikɨ mɨkɨ yukɨmana mawari kaniuwewieni.
Kepauka Tsamuheri munua, Tsahuri katinitahayewarɨmekaitɨni mawari wewietɨ. Tsahuri kanayeyani heinakimieka, hikɨ kanitahɨawe.

Tsamuheri matsi mɨpaɨ pɨtitati: —¿Kepetiuyuri 'ekɨ? Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Nekuyaxima mepuyuta'unakai, 'ekɨta pekatinuawekai kepemɨtiutukaritakai, piritsiteutsixi Mikimatsi mɨrakutewatsie mekaniyuxeɨrieka.
Mɨpaɨ nepɨtiu'eri: “Piritsiteutsixi mepɨyuha'aritɨa Kirikari meye'axɨanike metatsitakwinike, peru ne Yawé mɨnetsiparewienikɨ nepɨka'itawawiriewe 'akuxi”. 'Ayumiemenepɨnewaɨri mawari nemɨwewienikɨ.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Neuxei pepɨka'uka'iyari. Yawé 'akakaɨyari 'aitsikaya pepɨkahaye'atɨawe kemɨmatiuta'aitɨa. yuheyemekɨ 'ixaheritsixi wahetsiemieme.
Hikɨ peru mɨpaɨ nepɨmarahɨawe, pepɨkareutere peti'aitatɨ. Yawé xeime pɨta tewi pukuwaune minaki'atsitɨani, 'ekɨ 'aitsikaya pemɨkahaye'atɨakɨ.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ 'utayɨka Kirikari kaniyeyani, Kiweya Wenikamini kwieyaritsie kaneyani. memu'uwakai, 'ataxewime tsienituyari mepɨyupaɨmekai.
Kehewa Wenikamini kwieyaritsie mekaniyuhayewa Tsahuri yuniwematɨ Kunatani meta wakuyaxima, mexi'akuxi piritsiteutsixi Mikimatsi metitekai.
Piritsiteutsixi mematitekaitsie mekanayekɨne kuyaxi, me'ayehaikatɨ menayuyeitɨani: Mɨkɨ hipatɨ mekanekɨne 'Upɨra huyeyari 'utɨma, Tsuhari kwieyari hepatsie,
hipatɨta Weti-Kuruni mɨrakutewatsie meneutayune, hairieka Tsewuhini 'akiyari manuye'atɨkatsie, makumawe hepatsie.
'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie naitsarie, tepɨate tiwewiwame pumawekai nixewitɨ pɨkatiwewiekai, piritsiteutsixi mepɨkawapitɨakai hepɨrayutsixi memɨtewewiekakɨ 'ixiparate tepɨa pitsikayari.
'Ayumieme'ixaheritsixi yunaitɨ piritsiteutsixi wahetsɨa mekateni'aitakaitɨni mɨratamɨariexɨanikɨ tepɨa kwietsanamete, hatsarunite, hatsate meta huxate 'ɨxa xikamete.
'Atahaika pɨrata kɨramuyari mepɨwiyariekai xeime kwietsanamekɨ yatɨni xeime hatsarunikɨ, nauka kɨramuyarita xeime hatsakɨ meta yaxeikɨa huxa 'ɨxa xikame matamɨarienikɨ.
'Ayumiemekuyaxi 'ixaheritsixi nixewitɨ mepɨkahexeiyatɨkatei, Tsahuri Kunatani matɨa xeikɨa mepi'ɨkai.
Hipatɨ kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi Mikimatsi
Merikɨtsɨ xeitukaritsie, Kunatani Tsahuri nu'aya, yupaapa katiutaxatɨaka, yuparewiwame xeikɨa mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Kenaye'a. 'Anutaɨye hikɨmɨ tekananukɨnikuni piritsiteutsixi mematiteitsie».
Matsi Tsahuri Kiweya mɨrakutewatsie tetsita pukatei, Mikuruni mɨrakutewatsie, xeime kɨranaru kɨyeyari hetɨa, 'ataxewime tsienituyari kuyaxi hamatɨana meniu'uwakaitɨni.

Mawari wewiwame kamixaya 'etsimɨyewa 'Ahiyaxi panakatɨkɨkai 'Akituwi nu'aya, 'Ikawuri 'iwaya kanihɨkɨtɨkaitɨni, Pinexi nu'aya 'Eri teukarieya, Tsiru mɨrakutewatsie mawari wewiwame kanihɨkɨtɨkaitɨni Yawé hetsiemieme. pɨkatimaikai.
Para mɨta'anikɨ piritsiteutsixi wahetsɨa, Kunatani huta 'aiyaritsie hixɨatatsie kaniuyeyani, Wutsexi, Tsene 'aiyaritsie mɨtitetewatsie.
Mexɨakame tayeta Mikimatsi hɨxie pɨti'anekai, xewitɨta tatsutɨa hepatsie Kehewa hɨxie pɨti'anekai.

Hikɨ Kunatani yuparewiwame mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Hikɨmɨ teɨteri Kakaɨyari memɨkamate wahɨxie tekaniuyekɨnikuni, Yawé ketatsiparewieka, mɨkɨ mɨtatsitawikweitsitɨanikɨ pɨkakwaniwe, tsepanetɨ memɨyuwaɨkawa ya'etsimemɨyupaɨme wahepaɨtsita.
'Iparewiwame mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Aixɨa pɨyɨni, naime 'ekɨ yaketineuyuri kepemɨtiku'eriwa, neta nepɨnewaɨriya nemɨmatsiparewienikɨ.
Kunatani mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —'Aixɨa kani'aneni. Para memɨtatsihexeiyakɨ hakewa mematiteitsie mana tekananukɨnikuni.
Xɨka mɨpaɨ metatehetahɨawe: “Temɨxehanuku'axekɨ xeketaneukwewi”, mana tekanitahayewakuni tepɨka'uhuni.
Perutsɨ xɨka mɨpaɨ metatehetahɨawe: “'Ena xekenatikɨni”, matsi tekaniuhukuni, mɨkɨ 'inɨari kanayeimɨkɨ Yawé kemɨtatiparewieni temɨtehayu'iwakɨ.
Hikɨ mɨkɨ yuhutatɨ mekaniyu'eirieni piritsiteutsixi memɨwaxeiyakɨ. Hikɨ piritsiteutsixi mɨpaɨ mekateniuhiwa: —Neuxei hepɨrayutsixi kememɨteheyu'awietatɨkatei terɨta mekanitsutɨakari mewayekɨkatɨ.

Merikɨte kuyaxi tehɨwemete Kunatani mekaniutahiwieni meta 'iparewiwameya: —'Ena xekenatikɨni, tepɨtehayexeiya tepɨtexetaxatɨani. katiniutahɨawe: —Ne'utɨma keneumieni, Yawé 'ixaheritsixi temɨtehayu'iwakɨ kataniupitɨani.
Kunatani 'aitsie pukuwieretɨya meta 'iparewiwameya kaniweiyakaitɨni. Kunatani piritsiteutsixi mɨwaratixɨrɨwakai 'iparewiwameya pɨwatakukuyakairi.
Kunatani yuparewiwame hamatɨa xeitewiyari piritsiteutsixi mekaniwarukwini 'etsimakuyewatsie, matɨari me'uyutakwika mɨya mekateniuyurieni.
Hikɨ Kakaɨyari kwie kaniutayuitɨani. Kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi mekanimamakaitɨni yunaitɨ kememɨyupaɨmekai mana memɨkutekai. Mɨkɨ yunaitɨ mekaniutimamani tehɨwemete meta kuyaxi yukukuyamete.
Kiweya paitɨ Wenikamini kwieyaritsie tehɨwemete mekaniwaruxeiya kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi memakuteitsie, memamatɨ mekaniyuta'unakaitɨni yuxexuitɨ.
Hikɨ 'ayumieme Tsahuri yukuyaxima mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: «Xekeniwaruti'inɨata tame kemɨ'ane mepeuyewetse». Mɨpaɨ mekateniuyurieni, Kunatani meta parewiwameya meheuyewetɨ mekanakɨne.
Hikɨ Tsahuri 'Ahiyaxi kaniuta'aitɨani Kakaɨyari kakunieya memakwenikɨ. ('Ana tɨratu kakuniyari 'ixaheritsixi wahetsɨa kaniukateitɨni).
Mexi 'akuxi tikuxatakai piritsiteutsixi mematiteitsie waɨkawa matsi kwinimieme katiniuyɨni, 'ayumieme Tsahuri mawari wewiwame mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Tsepari matsi keneuhayewa».
Hikɨ Tsahuri yukuyaxima kaniwarukuxeɨrieni yunaitɨ mekanayekɨne meyutakwinike. Piritsiteutsixi mepɨkayumaiwawekai matsi yɨkɨmana mekaniuyutikwitɨkɨne.
Merikɨtsɨ meripaitɨ hipatɨ hepɨrayutsixi piritsiteutsixi memɨwarutinɨkai, 'ana wahamatɨa memɨtitekai piritsiteutsixi memayuxeurietsie, mekanekɨne 'ixaheritsixi mekaniwarutinɨni.
'Epɨrahini hɨriyaritsie memɨyuti'awietakai hipatɨ 'ixaheritsixi, kepauka memɨte'utamari kename piritsiteutsixi meheyuta'unakai, me'uyukuxeɨrieka mekanekɨne mewareparewienike mekaniwarutinɨni.
'Ana tukaritsie Yawé 'ixaheritsixi mɨpaɨ katiniwarutawikweitsitɨani, Weti-'Awenipaitɨ mekaniye'axɨani meyukwitɨwetɨ.

Merikɨtsɨ kuyaxi 'ixaheritsixi waɨkawa mekaneuhakakwikukaitɨni, Tsahuri mɨpaɨ mutayɨkaikɨ Kakaɨyari hɨxie kuyaxi wahetsiemieme: «Kakuyɨriwekaku 'akuxi kemɨ'ane mɨtikwani mɨkɨ Yawé 'axake'iyurieni, memɨnetsi'aye'unie nekawara'iwawekaku 'akuxi». 'Ayumiemexewitɨ tɨma 'ana tukaritsie kuya pɨkatikwakai.
Yeuta me'uye'axɨaka, mɨpaɨ metenetimani kename kwiepa xiete xuawekai.
Kepauka makukɨyexiyatsie hipatɨ memu'axɨa, mɨpaɨ meteniuneniere xiete waɨkawa kanixuawekaitɨni, peru nixewitɨ pɨkayuwaɨri meme'inɨatakɨ mɨyamutayɨkaikɨ Tsahuri memamatɨ.
Merikɨte Kunatani yupaapa pɨka'u'eniekai kemutayɨkai yukuyaxi wahetsiemieme, kɨye makwekai 'utatseraka xiete mayema 'utseka kanekwani. 'Ana yapauka yuhɨxie hayexawatɨtɨ kanayani.

Hikɨ kuya xewitɨ mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Apaapa mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni Kakaɨyari hɨxie kuyaxi tahetsiemieme: “'Axake'u'itɨarieni kemɨ'ane 'ikɨ tukaritsie tixaɨtɨ mɨtitakwani”. 'Ayumiemekuyaxi mekaniyehakakwitɨweni.
Kunatani mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Nepaapa mɨkɨ niukikɨ waɨkawa 'axapɨtatsi'uyuri, neuxei kepauka xiete 'etsiwa nema'inɨataxɨtsie nehayexawatɨtɨ nekanayani nehɨxie.
Matsitsɨ kuyaxi kemeyɨnikekai xɨka memɨtatsi'aye'unie wa'ikwai me'utikwanike, matsi piritsiteutsixi waɨkawa tepɨwakwinikekai.
'Ixaheritsixi mɨkɨ tukaritsie piritsiteutsixi mekaniwarukwini Mikimatsi me'iyetsutɨaka 'Ayarunipaitɨ mekaniye'axɨani, kuyaxi mepɨkayɨwawekairi hakakɨ.
'Ayumiemepiritsiteutsixi watewama mekaniwarutiwiya. Muxatsi, wakaitsixi, tsikerutsixi, mewaratixɨrieka mekaniwaranutixitexɨani, wai mekaniutikwani 'ayexuxureme memɨyumexɨitɨakaikɨ.

Merikɨte hipatɨ Tsahuri mekateniutaxatɨani: —Yawé hepaɨtsita 'akuyaxi 'axamepɨteheyurie, wai mekanekwaka 'ayexuxureme. Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —'Axateyuruwamete xekanihɨkɨtɨni. Hikɨ kwitɨwa tete xekenakurupa 'amɨnena 'ena xekenene'atɨiri.

Mɨpaɨta katiniwarutahɨawe: —Xekenehu yunaime kuyaxi mɨpaɨ xeketenewaretahɨawi yuxexuitɨ tuurutsixi, yumuxatsi mekaniwa'atɨaxɨakuni para temɨwakwinikɨ 'ena tekaniwatikwaikuni, meta 'ari wai xuxureme mepɨkahekwakari, Yawé hɨxie 'axamepɨkateheyuriekari. yuxexuitɨ mekaniwa'atɨaxɨani, mana mekaniwarukwini.
Hikɨ Tsahuri mana mawari taiyame Yawé hetsiemieme kaniutawewieni. 'Ikɨ mawari taiyame mexɨakame mieme kanayani mitawewi.

Mɨpaɨta katiniwarutahɨawe yukuyaxima: —Piritsiteutsixi wa'utɨma hikɨ yɨwikɨta tekaniyehuni. Kakahekɨariwekaku 'akuxi, naime tita memɨtehexeiya tekateniwarenawairiekuni, meta nixeime tepɨkahehayewa 'ayeniereme. Kuyaximama mɨpaɨ mekatenita'eiya: —Kehapaɨ matsi 'aixɨa mɨyɨni yaketineuyuri. Mawari wewiwame mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Kakaɨyari meri matsi teta'iwawiyame.
Merikɨte 'ayumieme Tsahuri Kakaɨyari kaniuta'iwawiya: «¿Piritsiteutsixi netiwaranukuweiya? ¿'Ixaheritsixi wahetsɨa petiwayetuani?» Perutsɨ 'ana Kakaɨyari pɨka'ita'ei.
'AyumiemeTsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Xeme yunaitɨ kuyaxi tewa'aitɨwamete 'ahurawa xekenakɨni, xeme hikɨ xekeneutinieri kemɨ'ane 'axapɨtiuyuri.
Yawé meta 'ixaheritsixi mɨtatsiwikweitsitɨwame munierixɨ kanihɨkɨtɨni tsepa xɨka Kunatani neniwe hetsie tiunake, pɨkatinenimayatsieni kanimɨmɨkɨ. 'Ana nixewitɨ pɨkayuwaɨriyaxɨ yamɨtayɨnikɨ.

'Ayumieme'ixaheritsixi yunaime mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Xeme huma xekeneti'uti, tameta 'ena pɨta tekaniti'uikuni neniwe Kunatani hamatɨa. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mekatenita'eiya: —'Ekɨtsɨ kehepaɨ 'aixɨa mɨyɨni yaketineuyuri.
Hikɨ Tsahuri Yawé kaniutawawirieni 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya, kemɨ'ane wahetsie pɨtinakekai. Kememɨteyuta'iwaxɨ Tsahuri Kunatani wahetsie katiniunake, 'iya matsi mexɨxɨnitɨ meniyuhayewa.
Hikɨ Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Hikɨta neniwe Kunatani matɨa teniyuta'iwakɨni. Matsi Kunatani hetsie katiniunake.
'AyumiemeTsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kepetiuyuri kenetineutaxatɨa. Kunatani mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Puyuri xiete nepa'inɨataxɨ 'etsiwa nekɨye kɨtsie 'ukaime. ¿'Ayumiemeri mɨkɨkɨ netimɨni?
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Xɨka 'ekɨ Kunatani peka'ɨmɨni, Kakaɨyari kenetiukwinitɨani kanetsinenimayatɨ.

Hikɨ kuyaxi Tsahuri mɨpaɨ mekateniutahɨawe: —Kehapaɨtɨtɨ Kunatani pumɨni, mɨkɨ tiuyurieku matsi 'ixaheritsixi tepɨtehayu'iwaxɨ, tepɨtemate Yawé kemɨrayeniere, meta yaxeikɨa tepɨtemate nixewitɨ tɨma kɨpaya kwiepa pɨkakawiwieni, Kakaɨyari 'iparewiekaku ke'aixɨa mɨtiuyuri. menitawikweitsitɨani.
Tsahuri piritsiteutsixi waranukuweiyake katiniuhayewa, 'ayumieme hipatɨ yukwieyaritsie mepakunuaxɨa piritsiteutsixi.

Kepauka Tsahuri 'aixɨa muyuyuri mɨti'aitanikɨ 'ixaheritsixi wahetsie, Tsahuri memaye'unie yunaime kaniwarutikwitɨyani 'ahurawa memɨtitekai, muhawitsixi, 'amunitsixi, 'erumitsixi, Tsuwa kwieyaritsie te'aitamete meta piritsiteutsixi, mɨkɨ yunaime pɨwara'iwakai,
waɨkawa tɨrɨkariya mepexeiyakai. Metatsiere 'amarekitsixi kaniwara'iwa, meta hipame 'ixaheritsixi kaniwarutawikweitsitɨani kepauka metenawatsiyarietɨwekaku.
Merikɨtsɨ Tsahuri yuhaikame yuniwema 'ukitsi kaniwarayexeiya: Kunatani, 'Itsiwi meta Marikitsuha. Yuhutame meta 'ukari kaniwarayexeiya: Merawi 'amɨyumate pɨtitewakai, Mikari 'etsimɨyumate.
'Akinuhani 'ɨyaya pɨhɨkɨtɨkai 'Akimatsi nu'aya. Kuyaxi mutiwa'aitɨakai 'Awinexi pɨhɨkɨtɨkai Nexi nu'aya, Tsahuri tatatsieya.
Kihitsi, Tsahuri paapaya meta Nexi, 'Awinexi 'ukiyarieya, mɨkɨ yuhutatɨ 'Awiheri mepɨniwemamatɨkai.
Kepauka Tsahuri mɨti'aitakai puyumienekai

Merikɨtsɨ Tsamuheri xeitukaritsie Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Yawé kaneniutanɨ'ani hatseiti nemɨmatsikawirienikɨ ti'aitame pemayanikɨ 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie. 'Ayumieme hikɨta keneu'eni 'ikɨ Yawé niukieya.
Mɨpaɨ kanaineni Yawé Naimekɨmɨtɨrɨkaɨye: “Nepɨwarupitɨa 'amarekitsixi nemɨtiwakwinitɨanikɨ 'ixaheritsixi 'axamemɨwaruyurikɨ, kepauka 'Ekipitu memayekɨtsie memɨkawarupitɨakɨ wakwietsie memuyekɨnekɨ.

Merikɨte xekenehu hikɨ kwitɨwa 'amarekitsixi xekenewaretakuya. Naime tita memɨtehexeiya xeketenewareka'uniri, xepɨkawarenenimayaka. Yunaime xekenewarekuya, 'ukitsi, 'ukarawetsixi, tɨɨri meta 'unetsitsixi, watuurutsixi, muxatsi, kameyutsixi meta wapuxurima”».

Merikɨtsɨ Tsahuri yukuyaxima Terahini kaniwarukuxeɨrieni: kaniwaruti'inɨata huta tsienituyari miriyari mekaniyupaɨmekaitɨni memeuyutakwiwawekai, meta tamamata miriyari mepɨyupaɨmekai Kura kwieyaritsie kiekatari.
'Amareki kiekariyaritsie mekanekɨne mana mekaniyuti'awieta 'akitsie.

Kenitsixi 'amarekitsixi mepɨwaruku'eiri Tsahuri mɨpaɨ mɨtiwarutahɨawixɨkɨ: «'Amarekitsixi teɨteriyari wahamatɨa xepɨka'u'uwani xekenehu 'ateewa paitɨ. Kepauka tateɨterima 'ixaheritsixi 'Ekipitu memayekɨ, xeme 'aixɨa xepɨtatexeiyakai, xemɨka'unarienikɨ yanepɨkara'eriwa».
Hikɨ Tsahuri 'amarekitsixi kaniwarutakwini, mepɨye'axɨa, 'Ekipitu kwieyari maka'atɨkatsie yateewa.
'Akaki 'amarekitsixi teɨteriyari tiwa'aitɨwame mekaniuwiya 'ayeniereme mekaniuhayewa. mekaniwarukwini.

'Akaki meka'umieka, Tsahuri yukuyaxima wahamatɨa mekaniwaruhayewata muxatsi 'aixɨa memɨ'anene meta wakaitsixi, tsikerutsixi memɨwaiyatɨarietɨka, meta hipame piinite mɨraye'atɨka xeikɨa. 'Ikɨ naime memɨteheuyehɨani mepɨkayuwaɨri, mɨkatiyunaki'erie 'axamɨti'anene xeikɨa mekateneuyehɨani.
Merikɨte Yawé Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe:

«Hikɨke nepɨne'iyaritɨa titayari Tsahuri ti'aitame nerayeitɨa, pɨkanetsi'enie kenemɨrehɨawe yapɨkatikamie». Tsamuheri waɨkawamekɨ puyutihɨawixɨ, tɨkarikɨ kaniukatariyarieni Yawé hahɨawetɨ mɨreiyehɨwirienikɨ.

Hikɨ meripai ximeri 'anukukeka kaneyani Tsahuri hetsɨa, peru muwa mɨpaɨ pɨretahɨawarie: «Tsahuri Kaximeri kaneyani, mana tete hetakenike mɨpaɨ tiku'eriwatɨ 'inɨari mayanikɨ, manata mɨyetɨa Kirikari kaneyani».
Hikɨ kepauka Tsamuheri munua, Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Yawé 'aixɨa kematsiyurieka. 'Ari nepɨraye'atɨa Yawé kemɨnetiuta'aitɨa.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Merikɨte xɨka yuritɨni peraye'atɨani, ¿Tita mɨkɨ metehamuxatsima nemɨwa'enie? ¿Tita mɨkɨ metehawakaitsixi watsuari nemɨ'enie?
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Amareki kwieyaritsie meteneyepini kuyaxi. mekaniwarehayewa wakaitsixi meta, Yawé 'akakaɨyari mawari pemɨwewirienikɨ, peru hipame yunaime tekateniwareuyehɨani.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe 'akuxi tikuxatakaku: —'Ari ketineuhayewa. Yawé tɨkarikɨ kemɨneretahɨawixɨ nekamatinitaxatɨamɨkɨ. Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Nepɨmatsi'enieni.

Hikɨ Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kaniyuritɨni tsepanetɨ 'ekɨ tixaɨtɨ pemɨkati'a'eriekai, 'ekɨ hikɨ 'ixaheritsixi tiwa'aitɨwame pekanihɨkɨtɨni. Yawé katiniuyurieni mɨmatsi'anayexei 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie ti'aitame pemayanikɨ.
Meta mɨkɨ Yawé kametiutanɨ'a 'aitsikaya pemaye'atɨanikɨ. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ pɨmatiuta'aitɨa: “Kenemie mɨkɨ 'axateyuruwamete 'amarekitsixi keniwareka'una, keniwarekuya yunaime”.
¿Titayaritsɨkamɨ Yawé pekaranu'eni? ¿Titayari piinite yuhetsiemieme xetehayeitɨa, titayari
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Ne Yawé nepanu'eni. Kemɨnetiuta'aitɨa 'aitsikaya nepaye'atɨa. 'Akaki tepewiyaxɨ tepenutahɨa 'amarekitsixi tiwa'aitɨwame, peru 'amarekitsixi yunaime tepɨwarekwi.
Nekuyaxima memɨtatsi'aye'unie wamuxatsima, wawakaitsixima mekateniwareyehapani, Kirikari Yawé pemɨwewirienikɨ.

Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: «¿Tita matsi Yawé tinake: mawari taiyariyari meta hipame 'imikierite, nutsu 'aitsikaya kemaine yatepɨtekahuni? Matsi peuyewetse temi'enieka, keyuri mawari, yatemɨteyurieka peuyewetse, wai wiya matɨa pɨkaheuyewetse.

Yemekɨ 'aixɨa pɨka'ane xɨka yakatikamieni, memɨtehetimamateke wahepaɨ pɨ'aneni, meta muyuta'ɨre, kakaɨyarixi mɨwarayexeiyani hepaɨ pɨtiyurieneni. 'Ekɨ Yawé niukieya pemuku'eirikɨ, mɨkɨta pumatsi'uku'eiri pemɨkati'aitametɨnikɨ».
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Yurikɨ pepaine 'axanepɨtiuyuri. Yawé kepemɨnetiuta'aitɨa. Ne kuyaxi nepɨwaretimaka 'ayumieme nepɨwaranu'eni.
Peru waɨkawamekɨ nepɨmatsiwawirie ke'axanemɨtiuyuri, kenetineuyehɨwiri xɨa, Yawé tepɨtahɨawe tanaitɨ keneukunua.
Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Ne 'ahamatɨa nepɨkamie, Yawé niukieya 'ekɨ pepɨka'anu'eni, mɨkɨta 'ari pɨkamatsinaki'erie, 'ixaheritsixi wahetsie pemɨti'aitanikɨ.
Hikɨ Tsamuheri 'ari heyaka ta'aurie kanaweni, Tsahuri 'ixurikieya kɨtsimeyaritsie kanitiwiere kanetsanirieni.
Merikɨte 'ayumieme Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Yawé hikɨ kwitɨwa mɨpaɨ pɨmatiutsaniri 'Ixaheri kwieyari pemɨra'aitatsie, 'aixɨa tiuka'iyarime pɨyetuiri pɨta.
Yurikɨ Kakaɨyari 'Ixaheri rayu'iwame mayeitɨwa, pɨkati'itawa, pɨkayukupata, tewi kemɨtiuxaxata mɨpaɨ pɨka'ane.
Merikɨte Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Axanepɨtiuyuri. Peru hikɨ nepɨmatsiwawirie 'ixaheritsixi meketemaika kenemɨti'aitame. Meta keneukunua.
Hikɨ Tsamuheri kaniyuwaɨriya mɨkunuanikɨ hamatɨana, Tsahuri 'ana Yawé kaniutahɨawe.
Hikɨ mana Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —'Akaki 'amarekitsixi tiwa'aitɨwame xekenene'atɨiri. Kepauka Tsamuheri hepa muhanieximekai, pɨ'eriekai mɨixa tukari manukamiekaikɨri.

Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'A'ixiparahipame 'ukarawetsixi mekaniwetɨkaime pɨwaruhayewaxɨ, 'ekɨta 'amaama kaniwetɨ kaniyuhayewamɨkɨ. Kirikari mɨrakutewatsie mana Yawé hɨxie, Tsamuheri 'Akaki kaneutixitexɨani.
Tsamuheri Xama mɨrakutewatsie kaneyani, Tsahuri meta Kiweya kaneyani yukie.
Yawé ti'aitame Tsahuri hayeitɨaka 'Ixaheri

Merikɨtsɨ Yawé Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —¿Kepaɨmexɨari pepuyurieka Tsahuri hetsiemieme pe'utatsuatɨ xɨkari ne 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie mɨti'aitametɨnikɨ neka'inaki'erieka? Matsi hatseiti 'a'awata keneutahɨniyaka kenemie. 'Itsahi kie, ne mɨkɨ nu'aya xeime nepanayexei ti'aitame mayanikɨ.

Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —¿Kehapaɨ netiyani? Xɨka Tsahuri mɨpaɨ retimani kanenimiemɨkɨ. Yawé mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Tsikeru kenahanatɨ, mɨpaɨ ketiniwarutahɨawi kename mawari peheuwewimie nehetsiemieme.
'Itsahi keneta'ini mawari pemewewienitsie, hikɨ kepemɨtiyurieni ne nekametinitaxatɨamɨkɨ, kemɨ'ane pemɨtikawirieni nehetsiemieme mɨtita'uximayatakɨ yanekamatinitahɨawimɨkɨ.
Merikɨte Tsamuheri Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨa yakatiniuyurieni. Kepauka Wereni munua, mana kiekatari 'ukirawetsixi me'eyemakatɨ mekanitahɨawe. Mɨpaɨ mekatenita'iwawiya: —¿'Aixɨa 'anemekɨ petikɨyɨane?
—Huu mɨpaɨ pɨ'ane. Ne Yawé mawari newewirienike nepeyetɨa. Xekeneuyu'itieka xekenakɨni nehamatɨa teyunaitɨ yapaɨmeme temɨtikwanikɨ. kaniwaru'itieni, manata mawari mawewienitsie kaniwaruta'inieni.
Hikɨ kepauka memu'axɨa, Tsamuheri 'Eriyawi 'uxeiyaka mɨpaɨ katiniu'erieni: «'Ikɨ xɨari kanihɨkɨtɨni Yawé menayexei yuhetsiemieme».

Peru Yawé Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Pepɨka'aku'ɨwiyani kememutɨtɨ yatɨni kememɨteyuxexeiya herie miemekɨ, ne matsi mɨkɨ nepɨkanaki'erie. Kememɨteyuxexeiyakɨ xeikɨa teɨteri mekaniyukɨ'ɨwiyani, ne matsi 'iyaritsie pɨta nekaniyɨkɨ'ɨwiyani.
Hikɨ 'Itsahi 'Awinarawikaniutahɨawe Tsamuheri hɨxie 'itakenike, peru Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Yawé matsi 'ikɨ pɨka'anayexei.
Tsama titewakameta mana kaniutakeni, yaxeikɨa Tsamuheri kaniutayɨni: —'Ikɨta yaxeikɨa Yawé pɨka'enayexei.
'Itsahi 'atahutame yuniwema mana kaniwati'uitɨani hɨxiena, peru Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Yawé xeime tɨma pɨka'anayexei.

¿'Ikɨri 'aniwema yunaitɨ metehɨkɨ? 'Itsahi mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —'Etsimuyumate peuyewetse, mɨkɨ muxatsi pɨwarehɨne. Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Muwawiemiekɨ ketineutanɨ'a mɨkɨ nuayuke tepɨyɨwawe temiyeweiyani.

Merikɨte 'Itsahi katiniuta'aita mɨwitɨkiemiekɨ, hikɨ kani'atɨarieni. 'Aixɨa pɨti'uximayakai, temaikɨ 'aixɨa katiniyuxexeiyakaitɨni witsirehɨxitɨ. Yawé Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —'Ikɨ kanihɨkɨtɨni, kenanukukeka keneukawiri hatseiti witsimu'ɨa.

Hikɨ Tsamuheri 'awa hatseiti muyema newatihana, 'iwamama wahɨxie temaikɨ kaniukawirieni. Hikɨ Yawé 'iyarieya tɨrɨkaɨyetɨ Rawiri hetsie kaninuani, mana mɨtiyehane hamatɨana 'uyeikatɨ kanayani. Mɨpaɨ tiuyurieka Tsamuheri Xama kanakunuani yukie.
Merikɨtsɨ Yawé 'iyarieya Tsahuri kaniuku'eirieni, mɨkɨ hetsiemieme Yawé kaneiyenɨ'airieni 'iyari 'axamɨ'ane mɨtiuka'eniwanikɨ mi'uximatɨakakɨ.
Te'i'uximayatsiriwamete mɨpaɨ mekatenitahɨawe: —Keperetimani 'ekɨ, Kakaɨyari hetsiemieme 'iyari 'axamɨtiuka'iyari mɨmatsi'uximatɨa.

'Ayumieme'ekɨ te'a'uximayatsiriwamete ketiniwaruta'aitɨa xeime memɨtiwaunikɨ 'aripakɨ reutayuitɨaweme. Merikɨte kepauka 'iyari matsikuwiwiyanitsie mɨkɨ katiniukayuitɨwamɨkɨ, 'ekɨ matsi 'aixɨa pekatineka'erietɨyeikamɨkɨ.
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —'Aixɨa kaniyɨmɨkɨ, 'aixɨa tiuyuitɨwame xekenenekuwawiri xekenene'atɨiri.

Xewitɨ ti'uximayatame mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Ne xeime temaikɨ nepɨmate 'aripakɨ reutayuitɨaweme. Peuyutamiewe pɨkama, kwinimieme rakunieretɨ, heitseriemekɨ pɨtikuxata meta xeimieme pɨrayeitɨwa. Yawé hamatɨana puyeika piparewie. Paapaya 'Itsahi pɨtitewa, Wereni kiekame.
Hikɨ Tsahuri niuki kanenɨ'ani 'Itsahi mɨpaɨ mɨretahɨawarienikɨ: «Rawiri 'aniwe kenenanɨ'airi, muxatsi mɨwarehɨne».
Merikɨte 'Itsahi puxu kaniuwiya Tsahuri ranunɨ'airienike, 'ikwaite, nawi kɨxauriyaritsie kaxie winuyari hɨneme, xeimeta muxa nunutsi, Tsahuri katinenɨ'airieni yuniwe Rawiri 'utɨma.
Rawiri kepauka munua, Tsahuri parewietɨ kanayani meta matsi waɨkawa kaninaki'eriekaitɨni para 'iparewiwameya mayanikɨ kepauka memuyutakwinitsie.
Hikɨ Tsahuri 'Itsahi niuki kanenɨ'airieni: «Rawiri keneupitɨa neti'uximayatsirietɨ muyuhayewakɨ, ne 'aixɨa nepɨtimate».
Kepauka Kakaɨyari meiyenɨ'a 'iyari

Merikɨtsɨ piritsiteutsixi yukuyaxima mekaniwarukuxeɨrieni memɨyukwiyukɨ, mekaniyukuxeɨrieni Tsuku mɨrakutewatsie 'aurie, mɨkɨ kiekari Kura kwieyaritsie pɨmieme. 'Epetsiramini mɨrakutewatsie mekanitiyaxe, mɨkɨ Tsuku meta 'Atseka wahixɨapa katini'anekaitɨni.
Yaxeikɨata Tsahuri kaniwarukuxeɨrieni 'ixaheritsixi, mayeweritsie 'Era mɨrayetewatsie mekaniu'axɨani, 'aixɨa mekateniuyu'uitɨani piritsiteutsixi mewatakwinike.
Piritsiteutsixi xeime hɨritsie mepɨkatekai, xeime hɨritsieta 'ixaheritsixi, wahixɨapa kanayewerikaitɨni 'aki hexeiyatɨ.
Merikɨte xewitɨ kuya yumemiwame piritsiteu tewiyari Kahati kiekame piritsiteutsixi mematiteitsie kanayeneni. Kuriyati pɨtitewakai, meta 'etsiwatɨkaku haika meturuyari putewikai.
Yumu'utsie wurunitse tepɨayari panakekai, kamixaya wurunitse tepɨayari peukamanekai, huta tewiyari heimana tamamata heimana 'auxɨwi kiruyari pɨrahetekai,
yu'ɨkatetsie neikamanakaitɨni wurunitse tepɨayari meta pitsika 'amɨtewi matɨkɨkai wurunitse tepɨayari pɨhɨkɨtɨkai.
'Ɨrɨ 'amɨtɨtɨ yumemiwame makwekai 'ɨkayari 'apupakai, kɨtsimeyaritsie tepɨa manuwekai 'atahuta kiruyari pɨrahetekai. Mɨkɨ hɨxie 'a'ɨtɨ hetsiena nunuwame.

Hikɨ Kuriyati kuyaxi 'ixaheritsixi wahɨxie 'utakeka, mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahiwieni wananaimatɨ: «¿Titayari 'aixɨa xeteyuku'uitɨwa xetatsitakwinike? Ne piritsiteu tewiyari nepɨhɨkɨ, xeme Tsahuri te'uximayatsiriwamete xepɨhɨkɨ. Xeime xekenanayexeiya mɨnetsitamienikɨ.
Xɨka heyutamieweni netsi'umieni, tame xehetsɨa tetenita'uximayatakuni, peru xɨka ne ne'imieni xeme xepɨtateta'uximayatsirieni waɨriyarika».
Piritsiteu tewiyari 'imatɨrieka mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: «Ne hikɨ kuyaxi 'ixaheritsixi nepɨxeta'iwa, xeime xekenanayexeiya nehamatɨa mɨyutamienikɨ».
Hikɨ Tsahuri yaxeikɨa 'ixaheritsixi, piritsiteu tewiyari me'u'enieka mepɨkayuwaɨri yamemɨtiyuanikɨ matsi waɨkawa mekaniutimamani.
Rawiri 'Itsahi kaninu'ayatɨkaitɨni, 'Epɨrata kiekame Wereni kiekame Kura kwieyaritsie. Tsahuri 'amuyeikakaitsie, 'Itsahi 'akaniyumaikaitɨniri, 'atahaikame yuniwema kaniwarexeiyakaitɨni.
Niwemama meyuhaikatɨ 'amepɨyumatekai mekanekɨnekaitɨni Tsahuri hamatɨa meheuyukwiyuka. 'Eriyáwi mexɨakame katinitewakaitɨni, hutarieka mieme, 'Awinarawi meta Tsama hairieka mieme pɨtitewakai.
Tsahuri 'ikɨ yuhaikatɨ mekaneweiya 'amemɨyumatekaikɨ. Matsi Rawiri 'etsimuyumaikai,
Tsahuri manuyeikakai kaneta'axekaitɨni, peru Wereni kani'axekaitɨni yupaapa muxatsimama mɨwahɨnekaikɨ.
Piritsiteu tewiyari Kuriyati, ximeri meta taikai kani'axekaitɨni 'ixaheritsixi wahɨxie yaxeikɨa tiwakuhɨawetɨ wananaimatɨ, huta tewiyari tukari mɨpaɨ kaniyɨanekaitɨni.
Merikɨte heiwa, 'Itsahi yuniwe Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «'Ikɨ kɨtsiɨri tɨriku xarikiyari muyetei kenanuhani meta 'ikɨ tamamata paa, pemɨwareyetɨirienikɨ.
'Ikɨta haikame kexiu kenanu'ɨiri kuyaxi tiwa'aitɨwame. Kenenierimie kememɨtehaka'iyuniwa 'a'iwama, xɨka 'aixɨa meteheu'erieka ya'ane pekaneni'atɨiriemɨkɨ.
'Era 'akiyari mayeweritsie pekaniwaretaxeiyamɨkɨ, Tsahuri kuyaximama memɨwarekwitɨwe».

Hikɨ Rawiri 'Itsahi kemɨtita'aitɨa katinaye'atɨani. Ximeri paitɨ kananukukeni, mana yumuxatsi xeime tihɨweme 'uhɨritɨaka kaneyani huyeta naime ratɨtɨ 'ikwaite. Kuyaxi mematiteitsie kaninuani yemekɨ, meyukuha'aritɨwakaku me'utihiwatɨ 'aixɨa meteku'uwekaku.
Piritsiteutsixi meta 'ixaheritsixi me'anuyutaxeiyatɨ mekateniu'uni.
Hikɨ Rawiri yu'ika tiuku'eirieka 'ikwaite tihɨweme hetsɨa, kaniutanautsa 'iwamama memati'utsie watahɨaweke.

Mexi tikuxatakai yu'iwama wahamatɨa, Kuriyati, piritsiteu tewiyari kuya Kahati kiekame kanayeyani piritsiteutsixi memati'utsie yaxeikɨata tawarita tiwatahɨaweke 'ixaheritsixi, hikɨ Rawiri kani'enieni.
Kepauka 'ixaheritsixi Kuriyati memuxei, waɨkawa mekaniutimamani mekaniyuta'una.

Mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuanekaitɨni hipatɨ: «¿Mɨkɨ tewi xetexeiya 'ixaheritsixi tatsimariutatɨ tatsi'iwamɨtɨ mayeyeika? Kemɨ'ane mimieni me'iwa, ti'aitame waɨkawa katinipitɨamɨkɨ. Meta yuniwe kaniwitɨtɨamɨkɨ waniu meta 'iwamama mepɨkateyutuaka 'ikɨ kwieyaritsie».

Hikɨ Rawiri kaniwaruta'iwawiya hamatɨana memɨti'ukai: —¿Keme'utiyuane xɨka 'ikɨ piritsiteu tewiyari kemɨtatinanaima mɨtihayewakɨ? ¿Ketita 'ikɨ tiyu'erie piritsiteu tewiyari Kakaɨyari mɨkamate, mɨwananaima wakwimɨtɨ?
Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mekatenitahɨawe: —Kemɨ'ane mimieni, tita mɨtiutaxatsie 'imikieri katiniyetuiriyariemɨkɨ.

'Eriyáwi Rawiri matsikaya teɨteri wahamatɨa tikuxatame kaniu'enieni, waɨkawa kaniuyeha'ani mɨkɨ hetsiemieme. Mɨpaɨ katinitatieni: —¿Kepetikuyuriene 'ekɨ 'ena paitɨ? ¿Kepaikɨ rahetsɨa muxatsi 'etsimemuyupaɨme makumawetsie pepɨwarehɨritaxɨ? Ne nekamanimaika. 'Ekɨtsɨ 'axapekatiniuka'iyarini, mɨrayukwitɨnetsie.
Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —¿Kenetiuyuri kuta? Hikɨketɨ nepaniuka.
Hikɨ yu'iwa 'uku'eirieka kaneyani hipameta pɨta yaxeikɨa katiniwaruta'iwawiya, yaxeikɨata mɨkɨ mekatenitahɨawe.
Hipatɨ Rawiri memu'eni kemutainekai, Tsahuri mekateniutaxatɨani, hikɨ mɨwitɨkiemiekɨ katiniuta'aita.
Merikɨte Rawiri Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Pɨkaheuyewetse xemɨmamaka 'ikɨ Piritsiteu tewiyari hepaɨtsita. Ne nekanitamiemɨkɨ.
Hikɨ Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Pepɨkayɨwe pemitamieni 'ekɨ 'axaɨta 'ikɨ piritsiteu tewiyari. Mɨkɨ yumienetɨ kepauka mɨreitsutɨa, 'ekɨ matsi pekaninunutsitɨni 'akuxi.
Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Ne nepaapa muxatsimama nekaniwahɨka. xeime 'uwiyame xɨka heihana,
nematsi nekanenukuweiyamɨkɨ ne'ikuwayatɨ kepaukake mitatuani. Kepauka ne 'ɨrawe netsikwaimɨtɨ mɨnetsi'anukuweiya, nepitiwaxɨani kepaukake nemimieni.
Xɨka ne mati'uximayatsiriwame nehɨkɨtɨtɨ mayetsi hutseri newatakukuyani, 'ikɨta yaxeikɨa piritsiteu tewiyari nepɨyurieni, Kakaɨyari mɨkamate hikɨ Kakaɨyari mayeniere kuyaximama mɨwananaima.

Kepauka maye meta hutse mɨnetsikuwiwiyakaitsie Yawé kemɨnetiutawikweitsitɨa, hikɨta yaxeikɨa 'ikɨ piritsiteu tewiyari hepaɨtsita kaneniparewimɨkɨ. Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kenemietsɨ Yawé kematsihe'ɨwiyani.
Hikɨ Tsahuri Rawiri kaniutikemaritɨani kuya kamixaya kanenakatɨtɨani. Mu'uyatsie miemeta wurunitse tepɨayari kanenaketsirieni meta kɨmana meuyukunama yutawitsie.

Hikɨ Rawiri yu'ixipara kananatatɨni, yeyanike matsi pɨka'uyɨwekaxɨa mɨka'iyamakaikɨ. Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Nepɨkayɨwe 'ikɨ naime neratɨtɨ nemɨyeyani, matsi mɨpaɨ nepɨkati'iyamate. Hikɨ mɨkɨ naime katinanutihɨnaxɨani.
Yu'itsɨ 'utikweka, hatɨa kaneyani 'auxɨwime ha'ute teteyari 'utiteɨxɨka yukɨtsiurita kaneikayatsa, yutexɨpame 'ahurietɨ piritsiteu tewiyari hɨxie 'ahurawa kaniuyani.
Yaxeikɨata Kuriyati 'ahurawa kanayani Rawiri hɨxie, yuparewiwame 'utɨa.
Rawiri kwi kaniuxeiya, mɨtemaikɨtɨkaikɨ kanitanenixeiya, 'aixɨa katiniyuxexeiyakaitɨni witsiraka'erietɨ yuhɨxie.
Mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe 'inanaimatɨ: —¿Nekuta netitsɨkɨ titayari kɨye pe'akwetɨ mana peramie? Rawiri 'axakatinikɨhɨawekaitɨni, yukakaɨyarixima pɨwawawiriekai 'axamemiyurienikɨ.
Mɨpaɨta katinitahɨawe: —Kenaye'a nekamanimiemɨkɨ, wirɨkɨxi meta yeutari 'awaiyari nekaniwatimimɨkɨ.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Ekɨ mana pekanamieni 'ixipara pe'akwetɨ, pitsika 'amɨtewi meta 'ɨrɨ, ne matsi mana nekaniumieni 'ahepa Yawé Naimekɨmɨtɨrɨkaɨye ne'ayexeiyatɨ, 'Ixaheri kuyaxiyari wakakaɨyari pemɨwananaima pewakwimɨtɨ.

Yawé hikɨ kwitɨwa kamaniyetuamɨkɨ, nemɨmatsimienikɨ 'amu'u nekananutixitemɨkɨ. nekaniwatimimɨkɨ wirɨkɨxi meta yeutari, 'ana mɨpaɨ mekatenetimaikuni naitsarie kwiepa memɨtama kename 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie yuri Kakaɨyari 'uyeika.
Mɨpaɨ mekatenetimaikuni yunaitɨ hikɨ 'ena memɨ'uwa, Yawé 'ixipara meta pitsika pɨkaheuyehɨwa mɨtatsitawikweitsitɨanikɨ. Matsi Yawé pɨyumiene, mɨkɨ kanixeyetuamɨkɨ temɨxeha'iwakɨ.
Kepauka piritsiteu mayetɨa Rawiri mienike, mɨkɨta payetɨa yapauka 'unautsarɨmetɨ hepana hɨxiena mɨtakenikɨ.
Hikɨ yukɨtsiurita kaneukameni tete kaniwatituni, yutexupametsie 'ikayeka piritsiteu tewiyari kaniutatuaxa, kanatana tete kaneuyerɨni. Yuhɨximakɨ kwiepa kaneweni piritsiteu tewiyari.
Rawiri mɨpaɨ katine'iwa piritsiteu tewiyari: Kanimieni tete texɨpametsie yekaimekɨ, 'ixipara kahauyehɨatɨ.
Piritsiteu tewiyari manukateitsie kaniutanautsa, 'ixiparaya watihanaka kaniheyetsitɨani mu'uya kananutiwiteni. mauyutamiewe mɨkime memuxei mekaniutinautsa mekaniyuta'unaxɨani.
Hikɨ 'ixaheritsixi kuyaxi yaxeikɨa Kura hetsɨa
