passage_titles.title: Merikɨte kepauka maye yanutsutɨni hutse muxa

verses.text: [Versículo ausente en la extracción del PDF; numeración alineada a Reina-Valera 1960.]
[Versículo ausente en la extracción del PDF; numeración alineada a Reina-Valera 1960.]
Waɨkawa minaki'eriekaikɨ, tɨratu hamatɨana kaniuwewieni:
Yu'ixuriki menakuwiekai 'enakuhurieka Rawiri kaniuhuritɨani, yukamixa kanihuritɨani meta 'ixipara, yuhɨiyame yutupi naime katiniyetuirieni.
Tsepa hakewa Tsahuri Rawiri mutanɨ'awakai, yapɨraye'atɨwakai 'aixɨa 'anemekɨ, 'ayumieme kaneyeitɨani, kuyaxi waɨkawa mekaniyutemamawiekaitɨni hepaɨtsitana, meta Tsahuri kuyaximama tewa'aitɨwamete.

Merikɨte kepauka memakunuaxɨa kuyaxi, Rawiri piritsiteu tewiyari hemiekuri, 'ixaheritsixi yunaitɨ 'ukarawetsixi mekaniwayeyeixɨani ti'aitame Tsahuri me'anunakeke, mete'uyuitɨaximetɨ, mete'ukaye'atɨ, me'utikwitɨ,
waɨkawa meyutemamawietɨ mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuanekaitɨni: «Tsahuri xeikuyaxiyari kaniwarekwini, matsi Rawiri tamamata kuyaxiyari kaniwarekwini».
Tsahuri 'u'eneka kememutiyuanekai hepaɨtsitana kaniuyeha'ani, mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: «Rawiri tamamata kuyaxiyari kaniyetuiriyarɨwani, ne matsi xeihɨkɨa xeikɨa. mɨtita'aitakɨ».
Hikɨ mana mɨtiyetɨa Tsahuri Rawiri 'aixɨa katixeiyatɨ kanayani.
Hikɨ 'uxa'arieka, Rawiri mexi 'aripakɨ tiyuitɨakai kemutiumiekai, 'iyari 'axamɨ'ane tikwinitɨanike, hikɨ Tsahuri yukiita kaniyeyeikakaitɨni mɨtaweka hepaɨ yɨanetɨ, pitsika yakɨ mɨtewi 'akwetɨ,
hutakɨa Rawiri kaniutamɨni, peru mɨkɨ kanikunaukwiwekaitɨni. Tsahuri mɨpaɨ putiku'eriwakai: «'Ikɨ 'ixumeritsie nepikuwieni».
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinimaikaitɨni kename Yawé 'iku'eiri, Rawiri hamatɨa pɨta 'uyeikakai. 'AyumiemeRawiri 'ayemakatɨ kanayani.
'Ayumiemehɨxiena mɨka'uyeikanikɨ 'ateewa kaneinɨ'ani, xeimiriyari kuyaxi tiwa'aitɨwamekɨ 'eyeitɨaka, muwa mɨtiware'aitɨakakɨ.
Rawiri yakatinayu'iwakaitɨni tsepa hakewa memeyutakwi, Yawé hamatɨana 'uyeikatɨ miparewiekaikɨ.
Tsahuri 'ixeiyatɨ Rawiri kemɨrayu'i'iwakai, waɨkawa kanimakaxekaitɨni.
Hikɨ 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie meta Kura kwieyaritsie kiekatari waɨkawa Rawiri mekaninaki'eriekaitɨni, mɨkɨ manuyeka mɨhɨkɨtɨkaikɨ.

Merikɨtsɨ heiwa Tsahuri Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Neniwe 'amɨyumate Merawi 'ena kaniukani, nekamaniyetuirieka pemitiwitɨnikɨ, peru pekamatɨ pekaniyumienemɨkɨ Yawé hetsiemieme, Mɨpaɨ Tsahuri katiniku'eriwakaitɨni: «'Aixɨa pɨyɨni nemamatsie mɨkamɨnikɨ, piritsiteutsixi matsi wahetsɨa mɨmɨnikɨ pɨta».
Hikɨ mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya Rawiri: —¿Ne tita netihɨkɨ? ¿'Ixaheritsie ne'iwama kemɨ'ane mepɨhɨme, yatɨni nepaapa 'iwamama, para ti'aitame munieya ne nemayeikanikɨ?
Hikɨ kepauka maye'a tukari yuniwe Merawi Rawiri mɨwitɨtɨanitsie, Tsahuri 'Ariheri Mekura kiekame kaniyetuirieni 'ɨyaya mayanikɨ.
Xewitɨta Tsahuri niweya, Mikari Rawiri kaniutihiwe'erieni. Tsahuri kepauka yamɨtiutaxatɨarie waɨkawa kaniuyukatemawieni,
mɨpaɨ katiniu'erieni: «Neniwe nepiwitɨtɨani mɨpaɨ nemɨtiwiniyakɨ, piritsiteutsixi memimienikɨ wakwinekaku». Hikɨ Tsahuri Rawiri tawarita mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Hikɨri nemune pekanayeimɨkɨ.

Merikɨtsɨ Tsahuri te'i'uximayatsiriwamete mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'aitɨani: —Rawiri yuxautame mɨpaɨ xeketenetaxatɨa: “Neuxei ti'aitame pɨmatsinenimaya, te'i'uximayatsiriwameteta yunaitɨ mepɨmatsinaki'erie. Yaketineutanaki'eri munieya pemayanikɨ”.
Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ Rawiri mekateniutahɨawe, peru mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —¿Ti'aitame munieya xɨka 'ayani 'aixɨa ti'aneme xete'erie? Nematsi nepɨkarexeiya tixaɨ nepɨkatinenaki'erie.
Tsahuri parewiwametemama mɨpaɨ mekatenitaxatɨani, Rawiri kemɨtiku'eriwakai,

matsi Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Rawiri mɨpaɨ xeketenetahɨawi: “Ne neniwekɨ tixaɨtɨ nepɨkareuyehɨwa mɨnetiyetuirienikɨ hetsiena mieme. Ne 'inɨari pɨta neneuyehɨaka piritsiteutsixi waxieyame mɨnetsi'atɨirienikɨ, xeitsienituyari kename warekwi. Mɨkɨ nepɨtiwarakapitɨani kememɨnetsi'uyuri”. piritsiteutsixi memimienikɨ.
Hikɨ Tsahuri 'iparewiwamete kepauka Rawiri memɨte'utaxatɨa, mɨkɨ matsi yɨkɨ pɨkatiu'eri ti'aitame munieya mayanikɨ, kemɨtiwawiriekai hepaɨtsita meta 'akuxi pɨka'aye'awekai kepauka mitipiniriekai.
Hikɨ Rawiri kaneyani yukuyaxima warawitɨtɨ kaniwarekwini, Tsahuri 'inɨari kaniyetuirieni miwawiriekaikɨ. Hikɨ Tsahuri yuniwe Mikari kaniwitɨtɨani.
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinetimani, Yawé Rawiri hamatɨa muyeikakaikɨ meta niweya Mikari minaki'eriekaikɨ.
'AyumiemeTsahuri Rawiri matsi waɨkawa 'ayemakatɨ kanayani, kemɨreuterixɨ tukarieya hepaɨtsita kaneye'uniekaitɨni.
Hikɨ kepauka piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiyarima
Merikɨtsɨ Tsahuri yuniwe Kunatani katiniutaxatɨani meta te'i'uximayatsiriwamete yunaime Rawiri kememɨtemieni. Peru Kunatani waɨkawa Rawiri mɨnaki'eriekaikɨ,
mɨpaɨ Rawiri katiniutahɨawe: «Keni'akweriwayurieka nepaapa Tsahuri katinikuwauneni kehapaɨ mɨmatimieni. 'Ɨtsita muwa keneyuti'awieta 'uxa'a ximeri.
Ne nepaapa hamatɨa nepayeyani hakewa pemeyu'awietatsie, 'ahepaɨtsita nepɨreitaxatɨani. Kemetayɨni nekamatinitaxatɨamɨkɨ».

Kunatani yupaapa Tsahuri Rawiri hetsiemieme mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —'Ekɨ ti'aitame matsi mati'uximayatsiriwame Rawiri pepɨkatikwinitɨaka. Mɨkɨ matsi 'axapɨkatiyuriene, matsi 'aixɨa pɨtiyuriene 'ekɨ 'ahetsiemieme.

Kena'eriwani yutukari kemɨtiyetua piritsiteu tewiyari mɨmienikɨ, Yawé 'ixaheritsixi kaniwarupitɨani memɨtehayu'iwakɨ. 'Ekɨ matsi peniyutemawiekaitɨni pe'ixeiyatɨ. ¿Titayari Rawiri petimiemɨkɨni 'axapɨkatiyuriene?
Tsahuri kepauka Kunatani mu'eni, mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kaniyuritɨni Yawé kanayeniereni, kenemaine hikɨri Rawiri pɨkamɨni 'aixɨa nepɨtixeiyani.
Merikɨte Kunatani Rawiri 'utahɨaweka naime katinitaxatɨani Tsahuri kemutayɨ meta kaneiwitɨni Tsahuri ti'aitame hetsɨa, meripai kemɨti'uximayakai mɨpaɨ ti'uximayatɨ kanayani.
Hikɨ tawarita mekanayekɨne piritsiteutsixi mewatakwinike, Rawiri wahamatɨata kaneyani. memuyuta'unaxɨakai marikakɨ.
Merikɨtsɨ Tsahuri yuparatsiyu kanayekateitɨni, tepɨa pitsikayari 'akwetɨ. Rawiri mexi tiyuitɨakai 'aripakɨ, yapauka 'iyari kaninuani,
Tsahuri kanitamɨni pitsikakɨ 'ixumeritsie heixunike, peru Rawiri kaniunaukwieni, matsi xeikɨa 'ixumeritsie tepɨa kaneukeni. Mɨkɨ tɨkariyaritsie Rawiri kaniyuta'una.

Hikɨ Tsahuri Rawiri kie teɨteri kaniwarenɨ'ani, tɨkarikɨ memitahɨnikɨ 'uxa'ariekake memimienikɨ. Peru Mikari Rawiri 'ɨyaya mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: «Xɨka 'ikɨ tɨkariyaritsie peka'ata'una, 'uxa'a pekanimieriemɨkɨ».
Hikɨ yukii hixɨapa manenieretsie muwa Rawiri kanatuani, mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katiniyuta'una.
Hikɨ Mikari kɨye kakaɨyariyari hepaɨ 'anekame 'utikweka, tsipu huxarieya mu'uyatsie 'ukawetsitɨaka, Rawiri muwakahupukaitsie kanikateni 'ixurikikɨ kanenuka'eima.
Kepauka Tsahuri teɨteri mɨwarenɨ'a Rawiri memɨwiyakɨ, Mikari mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: «Katinikuyeni».
Peru Tsahuri tawarita kaniwarenɨ'ani Rawiri memanuhanakɨ: «Yu'itaritsie tsepanetɨ mɨrekaka, nemimienikɨ xekenene'atɨiri».
Kiita meheutahaxɨaka, 'itaritsie makatei teɨteri memixei kɨye kakaɨyariyari pɨhɨkɨtɨkai, yumu'utsie tsipu huxarieya kaniuwetsitɨakaitɨni.
Merikɨte Tsahuri Mikari mɨpaɨ katiniutatieni: —¿Titayari penetiu'itai? ¿Titayari nemi'unie muyuta'unakɨ petiupitɨa? Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —Xɨka neka'ipitɨanike waniu pɨnetsimienikekai.

Merikɨte 'utawikweka yuta'unakari, Rawiri kaneyani Xama mɨrakutewatsie Tsamuheri hetsɨa naime reitaxatɨanike Tsahuri kemiyurienekai. 'Ayumiememɨkɨ yuhutatɨ Nayuti mɨrakutewatsie menekɨne mana mehetiyaxeke.
Kepauka Tsahuri mɨpaɨ mɨretima kename Rawiri Nayuti Xama heyeikakai,

yuteɨterima kaniwarenɨ'ani memeiwiyakɨ. mekaniwaretaxeiya, Tsamuheri tiwarekuxaxatɨwame. Hikɨ Kakaɨyari 'iyarieya tɨrɨkaɨyetɨ Tsahuri teɨterimama wahetsie kaninuani, mɨkɨta wahamatɨa Kakaɨyari niukieya mekaniutaxata.
Tsahuri niuki 'u'enieka, hipameta teɨteri kaniwarenɨ'ani, yaxeikɨata mɨkɨ kaniwaruwiya mana meniyuhayewa. Tawarita hairieka kaniwarenɨ'ani, mɨkɨta yaxeikɨa mekaniuyɨni.

Tsahuri 'imatɨrieka yukɨmana kaneyani Xama hetsie, Tseku mɨrakutewatsie putsu matiniere kaniye'ani. Mɨpaɨ katiniuta'iwauni: —¿Tsamuheri meta Rawiri hakewa mepetitei? Xewitɨ mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Nayuti Xamatsie mekanetiteni.
'AyumiemeTsahuri muwaxeikɨa kaneyani, matsi Kakaɨyari 'iyarieya tɨrɨkaɨyetɨ hetsiena kaninuani, 'iyarita Tsahuri kaniwiya huye'utɨa naime tikuxatatɨ kaniuyeyani Nayuti Xama hetsie kaniuye'ani.
Hikɨ yu'ixɨriki kananutihɨna, kwiepa 'ukaitɨ

Merikɨtsɨ Rawiri Nayuti Xama mɨrakutewatsie kanayeyani, Kunatani manukatsie kaneyani. Mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Ne kenetiuyuri? ¿Titakɨ 'axanetiuyuri yanutsɨtɨni nekapɨtiuyumi 'apaapa titayari netimiemɨkɨni?

Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —¿Titayarikuta petimierieni? Pɨkatixaɨ matsi, nepaapa naime kemɨtiyuriene kanetinikuxaxatiwani, tsepanetɨ kwinimieme mɨkati'ane. Pɨkaneti'awitsirie, 'aixɨa pɨka'ane kepemaine.

Hikɨ Rawiri yurikɨ mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Ekɨ pemɨnetsinaki'erie 'apaapa yakatinimaika, 'ayumieme xɨari mɨpaɨ pɨtiu'eri: “Yapɨkaretimani matsi Kunatani, mɨkanutuixiekakɨ”. Peru Yawé mayeniere hɨxie meta 'ekɨ 'ahɨxie mɨpaɨ nekanaineni, kanehuraniri nemɨmɨnikɨ.
Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kenetiyurieni yakenetineutahɨawi, yanekatiniyuriemɨkɨ.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Pepɨtimate metseri mɨhekwa 'ixɨarariyari 'uxa'a mayani, nepɨrekwanikekai 'apaapa hamatɨa mexatsie. 'Aixɨa kaniyɨmɨkɨ nemɨneti'awietakɨ 'ɨtsita keneneupitɨa warie taikaike nemɨnuanikɨ.
Xɨka netsiheku'iwawani 'apaapa, Wereni nemɨmiekɨ kename ne'uyutawau 'ahetsɨa mɨpaɨ ketinetahɨawi, nekiekari meta ne'iwama muwa meheyuxeɨrie mawari mehewewienike metseri mɨhekwa hetsiemieme.
Xɨka mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ hetayɨni 'aixɨa kename 'ane, merikɨte 'ana kanimatsiɨkɨrimɨkɨ kename kanetsimiemɨkɨ. Xɨkata matsi heyeha'ani, mɨpaɨ mɨkɨ petinetimaimɨkɨ kenameri netsimiemɨkɨ.

Metsɨ Yawé hɨxie tɨratu pekaniuwewieni nehamatɨa, kename ti'a'uximayatsiriwame nehɨkɨ, 'ayumieme waɨkawa nepɨmatsiwawirie yurikɨ pemɨnetikuxaxatɨwanikɨ. Xɨka ne 'axanetiuyurieni mɨpaɨ peretimani, 'apaapa hetsɨa pepɨkanetsiyetuayani, 'ekɨ matsi keneneumi'a.
Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Mɨpaɨ pepɨka'utaineni, ne mɨpaɨ nepɨkatiyurieni. Matsi xɨka neretimani nepaapa kename matsimiemɨkɨ, kwitɨwa mɨpaɨ nekamatinitaxatɨamɨkɨ.
Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —Xɨka 'apaapa 'aixɨa kamatiu'eiya, ¿kemɨ'ane pɨnetitaxatɨani?
Hikɨ 'aixɨa mete'uxataka naimekɨ, Kunatani Rawiri kaniuta'inieni hɨritsie memakukɨnekɨ. Hikɨ mana me'u'uwatɨ,

Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Rawiri 'aku Yawé 'ixaheritsixi wakakaɨyari hɨxie yurikɨ yanepɨmarahɨawe, warie yanepɨretimani 'ipaɨ 'upaukakaku nepaapa kemɨreku'eriwa kemɨmatsiyurimɨkɨ. Xɨka kamatsimiemɨkɨni yanepɨmatitaxatɨani.
Peru nepaapa xɨka matsimiemɨkɨni, neta pemɨ'ata'unakɨ xɨka nekamatiutaxatɨani, Yawé 'axakenetsi'uyurieni waɨkawa, 'ekɨta 'ahamatɨa ke'uyeikani nepaapa hamatɨa kemɨtiuyeikakai.
Kepauka Yawé mɨmatsiparewieni xɨka 'akuxi ne'uyeikani, keneneutinenimayata, nehetsie keneutanua nemɨkamierienikɨ.
Hatsuaku pepɨkatihayewani ne'iwama 'aixɨa petiwaxeiyatɨ, Yawé kepauka mɨwaka'una yunaime memɨmatsi'aye'unie.
Yawé ketiwarukwinitɨani memɨmatsi'aye'unie. Rawiri meta 'iwamama wahamatɨa,
kemɨtiyunaki'eriekai yukɨmana Rawiri mɨpaɨ mɨtinaki'eriekaikɨ. Mɨya mɨtinaki'eriekaikɨ, yamɨtayɨnikɨ.
Mɨpaɨta katinitahɨawe: —Metsa mɨhekwa 'ixɨarariyari 'uxa'a kanihɨkɨtɨni. Hikɨ mematsihetɨmaiyatɨ 'a'ɨpari xeikɨa mehexeiyatɨ mekameneta'iwaukuni.
Kahauyewekamekɨ, warie kenemie meripaitɨ hakewa pemeyuti'awietaxɨtsie, tete 'Etseheri mɨtitewa manuka 'aurie keneyuhayewani.
Yuri nemɨyɨaneni hepaɨ haikakɨa nekatinitamɨimɨkɨ 'ɨrɨkɨ.

Hikɨ xeime netsiparewiwame nekanitanɨ'amɨkɨ miwaumiekɨ. Mɨpaɨ xɨka nerehɨaweni: “Neuxei 'ɨrɨ kene'ɨimie 'ena hurawa pukaxɨri”. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ pɨti'inɨaritɨni kename pemɨnuani. Yawé hɨxie yurikɨ nepaineni.
Peru xɨka 'ipaɨ nerehɨaweni: “Neuxei humapaitɨ 'ɨrɨ pekahu”, 'ana Yawé yapɨra'eriwani pemɨ'ata'unakɨ.
Merikɨte Yawé xeikɨa pɨhɨkɨ munierixɨ 'ekɨ matɨa ne ketemɨte'uxa.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'ɨtsita kaniyuti'awieta. Kepauka maye'a metsa mɨhekwa 'ixɨarariyari, ti'aitame tikwanike mexatsie kaniutiyerɨni,
'ixumeri 'aurie muwatiyeixatsie. Kunatani meta hɨxiena kanayerɨni, peru 'Awinexi Tsahuri 'aurie kaniutiyerɨni. Rawiri 'uparieya yuxaɨta kaniyuhayewa.
Hikɨ Tsahuri 'ana tukariyaritsie 'atsipɨka'utayɨ, matsi mɨpaɨ pɨtiu'eri: «Rawiri xɨari yɨkɨ katineiyurieni, 'ayumieme ka'itiyatɨ peyuhayewaxɨ, xɨari pɨkaheyɨwekaxɨa 'aixɨa meyuyurienikɨ».

Hikɨ 'uxa'arieka, hutarieka tukaritsie metseri mɨhekwa 'ixɨarariyari mekaniuwewieni, Rawiri yɨ'ɨparitsie pɨka'ayeixakai, hikɨ Tsahuri Kunatani mɨpaɨ katiniuta'iwawiya: —¿Keri titayari 'Itsahi nu'aya takai meta hikɨ kareukuyeixɨa mɨtikwanikɨ?
Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Rawiri nehetsɨa kaniyutawauni Wereni mɨmiekɨ.

Mɨpaɨ pɨnerahɨawekai: “Keneneupitɨa ximɨxi nemɨmiekɨ. Ne'iwama mawari mepewewieni wiyari mɨhekwa hetsiemieme nekiekaritsie, nemɨmiekɨ ne'iwa mɨpaɨ pɨnerahɨawekai. Ximɨxi keneneupitɨa nemɨkahayewenikɨ, ne'iwama pɨta nemɨwaxeiyamiekɨ”. Merikɨte 'ayumieme Rawiri pɨkahekuyeixɨawe 'ahamatɨa mɨtikwanikɨ.

Hikɨ Tsahuri waɨkawa ha'atɨ, Kunatani mɨpaɨ katiniutatieni: —'Ukaratsi 'axamɨtiuka'iyari pepɨnu'aya. Ne nekatimaikame peti'erie, 'Itsahi nu'aya matɨa kwinimieme xemɨteyunaki'erie, nepɨxeheutewiya 'ekɨ meta 'amaama pɨka'uka'iyari.
'Ayumiememexi 'Itsahi nu'aya 'ena 'uyeikani, heitserie pepɨkahexeiya ti'aitame pemayanikɨ. 'Ayumiememɨwawiemiekɨ ketineutanɨ'a, ke'atɨarieni kaneuyeweka mɨkɨ mɨmierienikɨ.
Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —¿Titayari timierieni? ¿Kekuta tiuyuri?
Hikɨ Tsahuri ka'ita'eiyawetɨ tepɨa pitsikayari kaneihɨwirieni 'imienike. Hikɨ Kunatani mɨpaɨ katinetimani paapaya Rawiri kemɨtimiemɨkɨkai.
Kunatani 'uyeha'aka kananukukeni mexatsie 'utikaitɨ, 'ikwai hutarieka tukaritsie mieme pɨkatiukwai. Waɨkawa pɨyuheiweriekai paapaya 'axamutayɨkɨ Rawiri hepaɨtsita.
Kunatani 'uxa'arieka ximeri kaneyani yeuta Rawiri hamatɨa memeyukaxeiyakɨ. Xewitɨ 'iparewiwameya temaikɨtɨtɨ kaneweiyakaitɨni.
Mɨpaɨ Kunatani katinitahɨawe: «Nekatinitamɨimɨkɨ 'ɨrɨ pekaniwaumieni pe'unautsarɨmetɨ». Temaikɨ kaniutanautsa, hikɨ Kunatani 'ɨrɨkɨ katiniutamɨni teewa kaniukaweni.
Hikɨ kepauka 'ɨrɨ makawetsie maye'a temaikɨ, Kunatani kanitahiwieni: «Humapaitɨ pekamie 'ɨrɨ. Humapaitɨ.
Xeiya keneumietɨ, pepɨka'ukukiekani». Kunatani mɨpaɨ tiuhiwatɨ pɨkatihayewakai. Hikɨ temaikɨ heiku'ɨka hetsɨana kaninuani minɨ'a hetsɨa.
Ketɨtɨ mɨtiuyuriekai temaikɨ 'atsipɨkaretima, ketɨtɨ memɨteyuriekai.
Hikɨ Kunatani yuparewiwame yu'ɨrɨte katiniyetuirieni, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: «Kenemie kiekaritsie 'a'utɨma ketinakunuitɨa».
Hikɨ 'iparewiwameya heyaku, Rawiri mɨwayu'awietakaitsie kaniwayeyani, haikakɨa 'akatutsitaka kwiepa kaniukahɨximakeni. Hikɨ 'itsiyakɨ me'utitsuatɨ, kepaukake Rawiri muyunɨtɨa.
Hikɨ Kunatani Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe:

Hikɨ Rawiri Nuwi mɨrakutewatsie kaneyani mawari wewiwame 'Akimereki heu'iwatamieka, hikɨ Rawiri 'uxeiyaka kaniutimani. Mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Titayari 'axaɨta pereyetɨa? ¿Kehapaɨtɨtɨri xewitɨtɨma pɨkamatsi'aweiya?
Mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya Rawiri: —Ti'aitame netsihetanɨ'aku nepeyetɨa, titakɨ mɨnereyenɨ'a nixewitɨ tɨma mɨpaɨ pɨkatimaika. temetakaxeiya.
¿Tita tikwaiwame perexeiya? Paa 'auxɨwime keneneumikwa, yatsepa tita tawarita pemɨrexeiyani.
Mawari wewiwame mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Paa kwaiwame nepɨkahexeiya. Paa tukita mieme mɨpatsie xeikɨa nekameniumiweni, xɨka xeikɨa 'ateɨterima 'ukarawetsixi mekawarekumaɨwani meta 'ekɨ.
Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Tame matsi kepauka temayekɨka hurawa tekaniyukahɨweni ta'ɨitama tepɨkawakumaɨwa. Matsi hikɨ teewa temetanɨ'arie tekanitahɨkatɨtɨri.
Hikɨ mawari wewiwame Rawiri paa mɨpatsie kaniyetuirieni, hipatɨ mumawekaikɨ. Mɨkɨ paa pɨhɨkɨtɨkai Yawé hɨxie memɨwakatɨkɨkai, hipame pɨta hehekwame xɨxɨkame meneutiyatsakaitɨniri tukaritsie mieme.
Hikɨ mɨkɨ tukaritsie xewitɨ muwa kaniyeyeikakaitɨni Tsahuri hetsɨa ti'uximayatame Yawé tukita kani'iwatakaitɨni. pɨtitewakai, muxatsi wahɨwemete Tsahuri hetsɨa miemete tiwa'aitɨwame pɨhɨkɨtɨkai.
'Arikeketa Rawiri 'Akimereki kaniuta'iwawiya: —¿Tepɨa pitsikayari pekarexeiya yatɨni 'ixipara? Ti'aitame mexɨima kanenetanɨ'ani, ne'ixipara nemakwenikekai nepɨkaheyɨwekaxɨa yaxeikɨa tihipame.

Mawari wewiwame mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kuriyati piritsiteu tewiyari 'ixiparaya xeikɨa nepexeiya, 'Era mayeweritsie pemími. Mana kanakani 'ixurikikɨ kani'eimeni, mawari wewiwame kamixaya warie kanakukani. Xɨka pe'awaɨriyani pemeikweni kaniyɨweni, 'ixiparate hipame nepɨkahexeiya. Rawiri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Keneneukweitɨa, mɨkɨ 'aixɨa kaniyɨmɨkɨ.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'ana tukariyaritsie, Tsahuri hepaɨtsita 'akuxi kaniyu'unarɨmekaitɨni, Kahati kiekariyaritsie kaneyani, mana ti'aitame 'Akihitsi hetsɨa kanekuyeixɨani.

'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ mekateniutahɨawe 'iparewiwametemama: —¿'Ikɨ Rawiri katihɨkɨ naitsarie kwiepa ti'aitame? ¿Mɨkɨ katihɨkɨ kɨmanaya memɨte'utinei, mɨpaɨ mete'ukwitɨ: «Tsahuri kuyaxi xeimiriyari xeikɨa kaniwaruka'una, matsi Rawiri tamamata miriyari kaniwarukwini»?
Hikɨ Rawiri mɨkɨ tiu'enieka, kaniutimani waɨkawa 'Akihitsi hepaɨtsita, Kahati kiekariyaritsie ti'aitame.
Hikɨ 'ayumieme kepauka memiwiyarɨmekai, meuyuyehɨani hepaɨ kaniuyɨni, kanitsutɨani yɨmɨireme wahɨxie 'axayɨanetɨ tawekame hepaɨ 'itupari kanitixutsinakaitɨni 'aɨrikayatɨ.
Hikɨ 'ayumieme 'Akihitsi yuparewiwamete mɨtiwa'aitɨa mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —¿Neuxei perutsɨ xekateyuku'ɨwiya? Pɨtawe mɨkɨ tewi. ¿Titayari xenete'atɨiri?
¿'Akuxi meteheuyewetse memɨtarɨwe,

Merikɨtsɨ Rawiri Kahati mɨrakutewatsie kaniyeyani, kaniyuta'una terɨta 'Arurani mɨrakutewatsie 'aurie. 'Ukiyarimama meta hipatɨ maremama kepauka mɨpaɨ memɨtehetima, mekanekɨne muwa paitɨ meheixeiyayuka.
Hikɨ 'ana yumɨiretɨ mekanitinɨni memɨneniyɨakai, memɨtehapitɨkatei meta memɨte'uka'eniwakai. 'Ana mekanitinɨni nauka tsienituyari, Rawiri tiwa'aitɨwame hɨkɨtɨtɨ kaniyuhayewa.

Mana kaniyeyani Mitsipa mɨrakutewatsie Muhawi kwieyaritsie, mana ti'aitame mɨpaɨ katiniutawawirieni: «Nepaapama memɨ'axɨanikɨ 'ena xehamatɨa nepɨmatsiwawirie, kepauka yanemɨretimani Kakaɨyari kemɨtiyurimɨkɨ nehetsiemieme 'anake nekaniwarawitɨmieni».
Hikɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwaruhɨrita yupaapama Muhawi kwieyaritsie ti'aitame hetsɨa, mana mekanititekaitɨni kepauka Rawiri muyu'awietakai xeikɨa.

Merikɨtsɨ Kakaɨyari niukameya Kahari Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Matsi pɨkaheuyewetse pemɨ'a'awietaneni. 'Aixɨa matsi pɨyɨni xɨka penuani Kura kwieyaritsie». Hikɨ 'ayumieme makɨkɨyexiya kaneutiyune. kemɨtiwarukwi
Merikɨtsɨ Kiweya hɨriyaritsie Tsahuri 'etɨpiwari hetɨa kaniukateitɨni, mana pɨtiutamari Rawiri yaxeikɨa teɨterimama wahepaɨtsita. Tsahuri pitsika 'amɨtewi kanakwekaitɨni, yunaitɨ,

mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: ¿xemeta yuri xete'erie 'Itsahi nu'aya kename kwie xeyetuiriexɨani yaxeikɨa kaxie haraweriyari meta kuyaxi xeimiriyaritsie miemete meta xeitsienituyaritsie miemete wa'ukiyarima xehayeitɨanike xete'erie?

Hikɨke mɨpaɨ nepɨretima yunaitɨ titayari xemɨnete'uku'eiri, titayari nixewitɨ mɨkaneraxaxatɨwa neniwe meta 'Itsahi nu'aya hamatɨa tɨratu kememɨte'uwewi. Xeme nixewitɨ tɨma pɨkaneraxaxatɨwa neniwetɨtɨ Rawiri kemɨtiuparewi netsi'aye'unietɨ mayanikɨ, hikɨ kememɨ'ane.

Hikɨ Ruheki 'erumi tewiyari, mana Tsahuri parewiwamete wahamatɨa muyeikakai, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Merikɨte ne Nuwi kiekariyaritsie 'Itsahi nu'aya nekanexeiya 'Akimereki 'Akituwi nu'aya hamatɨa katinekuxatakaitɨni.
Meta 'Akimereki Yawé kanetahɨawe Rawiri hetsiemieme meta 'ikwaite katineimini metatsiere Kuriyati 'ixiparaya kaneiyetuirieni.
Hikɨ mawari wewiwame 'Akimereki 'Akituwi nu'aya mɨwitɨkiemiekɨ ti'aitame katiniutanɨ'ani, yaxeikɨa yunaitɨ 'iwamama, Nuwi kiekariyaritsie mawari memɨwewiwametetɨkai. Kepauka memu'axɨa,
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ 'Akimereki katiniutahɨawe: —'Akituwi nu'aya, keneu'ena. 'Akimereki mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya. —Neti'aitɨwame, yakeneutayɨki nepɨmatsi'enieni.

Hikɨ Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —¿Titayari 'ekɨ 'Itsahi nu'aya matɨa xenete'ayeheka? 'Ikwai pepɨtiyetuiri meta xeime 'ixipara pepikweitɨa. Yaxeikɨata Kakaɨyari peputahɨawixɨ hetsiena mieme, miparewienikɨ netsi'aye'unietɨ mayanikɨ, hikɨ kememɨ'ane.
Hikɨ 'Akimereki Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniuta'eiya: —Ti'aitame, ¿kemɨ'ane yunaitɨ te'a'uximayatsiriwamete 'aixɨa pɨtiuyeika, Rawiri 'amune hepaɨ, kuyaxi tiwa'aitɨwame meta paratsiyuta 'aixɨa mɨtixeiyarie?
¿Hikɨke kuta netiuyuri Kakaɨyari nemutahɨawixɨ hetsiena mieme? Pɨkatixaɨtsietɨ. pemɨrahɨpani, yaxeikɨata netɨɨriyama wahetsie matsi ne ti'a'uximayatsiriwame 'atsinepɨkatimate ketɨtɨxemɨyɨa.
Hikɨ ti'aitame mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Akimereki, 'atukariri kanaye'ani, 'ekɨ xeikɨa pɨkatixaɨ 'atɨɨriyamata.

Merikɨte yapauka ti'aitame 'iparewiwamete memeweiyakai mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'aitɨani: —Mawari wewiwamete Yawé hetsɨa miemete xekeniwarukuya, mɨkɨta Rawiri meputinɨi. Kemɨtiyu'unarɨmekai mepɨtemaikai, peru mɨpaɨ mepɨkanete'utahɨawixɨ. mawari wewiwamete memɨwakwinikɨ.
'Ayumiemeti'aitame, Ruheki mɨpaɨ katiniuta'aitɨani: —Kamɨtsɨ 'ekɨ keniwarukuya. mɨwakwinikɨ. 'Ana tukariyaritsie nauka tewiyari heimana 'auxɨwi meyupaɨmeme kaniwarukwini mawari wewiwamete.
Hikɨ meta Nuwi kiekariyaritsie kaneyani, mawari wewiwamete wakie, 'ixiparakɨ kaniwarekwini 'ukitsi, 'ukarawetsixi, tɨɨri meta memutinunuiwaxɨke, tuurutsixi, puxuri meta muxatsi.
Peru xewitɨ 'Akimereki nu'aya, 'Awiyataxi titewatɨ kaniuyuta'una, kaneyani Rawiri hetsɨa.
Hikɨ 'Awiyataxi kepauka Rawiri mɨtiutaxatɨa kename mawari wewiwamete Yawé hetsɨa miemete Tsahuri warekwi,

hikɨ Rawiri 'Awiyataxi mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —'Ana paitɨ Ruheki 'Erumi tewiyari kepauka nemexeitsie Nuwi kiekariyaritsie, mɨpaɨ nekatinetimani Tsahuri katinitaxatɨanikekaitɨni. yunaitɨ mekaniukwi'iwa.
Peru pepɨkaheumaka. Nehamatɨa

passage_titles.title: Rawiri mana mɨyetɨa kaneyani Kareti hɨriyaritsie

verses.text: Merikɨtsɨ piritsiteutsixi Kehira kiekatari mekaniwarutakwini, watɨriku meta tinaime wapiini mekateniwarunawatsirieni. Kepauka Rawiri mɨtiutamari kemɨtiuyɨkai,
Yawé kaniuta'iwawiya: —¿Reuyewetse piritsiteutsixi nemɨwakwimiekɨ? Yawé mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kenemie, piritsiteutsixi keniwaretakuya, Kehira kiekariyari kenetawikweitsitɨa.
Matsi kuyaxi Rawiri mɨpaɨ mekateniutahɨawe: —'Ena Kura takwieyaritsie te'u'uwatɨtɨ tekanimamaka, matsi Kehira kiekariyaritsie xɨka tehekɨne kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi temɨwaretakwinikɨ.
Hikɨ Rawiri tawarita Yawé kaniutahɨawe, Kakaɨyari mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kenemie Kehira kiekariyaritsie, piritsiteutsixi nepɨmatsiyetuirieni pemɨwara'iwakɨ.
'AyumiemeRawiri yuteɨterima wahamatɨa mana mekanekɨne, piritsiteutsixi mekaniwaretakwini. Mewara'iwaka Rawiri piritsiteutsixi watewama mekaniwarehapani. kaniwarutawikweitsitɨani.
Hikɨ kepauka 'Awiyataxi Kehira paitɨ metɨa munuakakɨ 'ana mawari wewiwame kamixaya kanehuriekaitɨni.
Merikɨtsɨ kepauka Tsahuri mɨtiutaxatɨarie kename Rawiri Kehira kwieyaritsie heyakai mɨpaɨ katiniuhiwa: «Kakaɨyari kaneniyetuirieni. reukunakameta, muyuta'una pɨkayɨwe muwa».
Hikɨ yukuyaxima yunaime kaniwarukuxeɨrieni Rawiri memɨmieyukɨ meta teɨterimama, Kehira kiekariyari warie meha'utɨkɨneme.
Kepauka Rawiri mɨpaɨ mɨretima kename Tsahuri 'imiemɨtɨ 'uhamiekai. Hikɨ 'Awiyataxi kaniuta'inieni mawari wewiwame kamixaya mihuritɨanikɨ.
Rawiri kaniyutanenewieni: —Yawé 'ixaheritsixi wakakaɨyari, ne ti'a'uximayatsiriwame, nekatinimaika neya'aneme newiwiekaku, Tsahuri 'unamieni Kehira kiekariyari ka'unake.

¿'Ena kiekatari meneteyetuani Tsahuri hetsɨa? ¿Mɨpaɨ memɨnetekuhɨawe, tiyuri kename Tsahuri 'uhamie? Yawé ne nemaniwawirieka, 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya, nemɨtimaikakɨ kenetineutaxatɨa. Yawé mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Huu, kaninuamɨkɨ.
Rawiri tawarita kanitahɨawe: —¿Kehira memɨtama metateyetuani Tsahuri hetsɨa? Yawé mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Huu, mekanixeyetuakuni.

Hikɨ 'ayumieme Rawiri yuteɨterima wahamatɨa 'ataxewi tsienituyari meyupaɨmeme warawitɨtɨ Kehira mekanayekɨne, mekaniyu'unarumekaitɨni xaɨtsie meta xaɨtsie mehau'uwatɨ. Kepauka Tsahuri mɨtiutamari Rawiri kename Kehira hayeyakairi, kaniuta'imani memɨkayutakwinikɨ.
Merikɨte Rawiri kaniyu'awietakaitɨni makumawetsie, muwakitsie Tsipi hɨriyaritetsie. Tsahuri tukarikɨ tɨkarikɨ kaniwaunekaitɨni, matsi Kakaɨyari pɨka'iyetua hetsɨana.
Hikɨ Rawiri Huretsi 'uyeikatɨ, makumawetsie Tsipi kwieyaritsie, mɨpaɨ katinetimani kename Tsahuri 'ayeyakai 'ikuwaunetɨ 'imienike.
Kunatani Tsahuri nu'aya, Rawiri kanekɨhɨawe Huretsi mɨrakutewatsie, katinitaxatɨani mɨkatihayewanikɨ Kakaɨyaritsie tiwiyatɨ.
Mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: «Pepɨkaheumaka, nepaapa pɨkayɨwekaxɨani mɨmatsimieni. 'Ekɨ 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie ti'aitame pepayani, neta 'a'aurie mutikeni nepayani. 'Ikɨ hepaɨtsita nepaapa katinimaikari».
Merikɨte 'ayumieme yuhutatɨ tɨratu me'uwewieka Yawé hɨxie, Kunatani yukie kaneyani, Rawiri meta Huretsi kaniyuhayewa.

Hikɨta Tsipi kiekatari Kiweya mekanekɨne, Tsahuri mɨpaɨ mekateniutahɨawe: —'Ekɨ pekatimate takwieyaritsie Rawiri kaniyu'awietani. Kakira hɨriyaritsie kaniuyeikani, terɨta Huretsi mɨrakutewatsie kaniyu'awietani makumawe tserietana.
'Ekɨ ti'aitame kepauka pemɨmie, Rawiri tekamaniyetuiriekuni.
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Yawé 'aixɨa kexeyurieka waɨkawamekɨ xemɨnete'utaxatɨakɨ.
Xekenehu, kemɨrekuyeika xekenetaxeiyani, yaxeikɨa xekeneku'iwawani kemɨ'ane meixeiya mɨpaɨ nekatinimarieka kename kwinimieme mɨkɨ reuyuta'awietawe.

'Aixɨa xeketeneti'iwau naitsarie hakewa meyu'awietane, hikɨ xepɨnetehaxatɨayuta yemekɨ hakewa meyu'awietani. Hikɨ 'ana ne xehamatɨa nekaniyemieni xɨka 'aku Rawiri muwa heyeikani, nekaneitiwaumɨkɨ yunaime Kura
Merikɨte Tsipi kiekatari Tsahuri mekaniutateutɨani, yukwieyaritsie mekanekɨne. makumawetsie mekaniu'uwakaitɨni, 'Arawa mɨrakutewatsie makumawe tserieta.
Kepauka Rawiri mɨtiutaxatɨarie kename Tsahuri yuteɨterima warawitɨtɨ 'iwaunekai, Mahuni makumawe 'aiyaritɨa kanikayune. Mɨpaɨ retimaikata Tsahuri kaneyani kaniwaranukuweiya wa'utɨma.

Hikɨ Tsahuri hɨri warie mekaniutihukaitɨni, warienata pɨta Rawiri mekaniutihukaitɨni, memɨyuta'unakɨ meyumexɨitɨatɨ. Peru Tsahuri yuteɨterima wahamatɨa wahɨxie mepu'ukairi naitsarie. Kepauka 'ari memɨwa'axirɨmekai,
xewitɨ tixaxatame kaninuani, Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Mexɨima ti'aitame piritsiteutsixi takwieyaritsie mepeye'axɨa mepɨtatsihekwitɨwe».
Hikɨ 'ayumieme Tsahuri katiniuhayewa Rawiri 'uweiyatɨ, kaniukunuani piritsiteutsixi pɨta mɨwaretakwinikɨ. Tsera-'Amarekuti mana 'ayumieme katinakutewaka.
Rawiri mana mɨyetɨa kaneyani 'Enikari
Merikɨtsɨ kepauka Tsahuri Piritsiteutsixi wakwinetɨ munua, katiniutaxatɨarieni kename makumawetsie.
'AyumiemeTsahuri kuyaxi me'ayehaikame kaniwarukuha'aritɨani, kuyakɨ 'aixɨa memɨ'anene 'Ixaheri kiekatari, mekanekɨne Kapura hɨriyaritsie meta mematihɨriwatsie Rawiri kuwaunetɨ meta kuyaximama.
Hikɨ muwa huyeta, muxatsi wakuraru makumane mekaneye'axɨani, mana 'ahurawa kaniterɨtatɨkaitɨni, muwa kaneutahani takwitake. Peru Rawiri 'upaitɨ kaneyu'awietakaitɨni terɨta, yukuyaxima wahamatɨa,

hikɨ mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mekatenitahɨawe: —Hikɨrixɨa kanaye'ani, Yawé kepauka mɨpaɨ mɨmatiutahɨawixɨ: “Ne memɨmatsi'aye'unie nekamaniyetɨiriemɨkɨ, kemɨmatinake yapemɨtiyurienikɨ wahetsie”. kaneyani Tsahuri manukateitsie, 'ana kamixaya kɨtsimeyari kaneukuxiteni.
Hikɨ kaniyuhɨawekaitɨni mɨya mɨtiuyuri hepaɨtsita,
'ayumieme yukuyaxima mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Yawé 'aixɨa kenetsiyurieka para ti'aitame 'axanemɨkayurienikɨ xeme kemɨxetinake, ne hetsiena 'axanepɨkatiyurieni, mɨkɨ Yawé menayexei kanihɨkɨtɨni.
'AyumiemeRawiri yukuyaxima kaniwaruta'imaiya, pɨkawarupitɨa Tsahuri memɨwiyakɨ. Hikɨ terɨta wayeyaka kaneyani huyeta.

Peru Rawiri pitaxeiyakai huyeta 'uyeneyuke mitahiwienikɨ, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe 'ehiwiwatɨ: —Neti'aitɨwame, Neti'aitɨwame. Tsahuri yu'utɨma kananakuniere, 'ana Rawiri kwiepa kaniukahɨximakeni titunumawetɨ,
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —¿Titayari yuri petiwa'eririe 'ekɨ mɨpaɨ memɨmatekuhɨawe, kename nematsi'unie?

'Ekɨtsɨ pekatinetimani meta pekaniuniere hikɨ kemɨtiuyuri Yawé 'uwa terɨta. Ne neteɨterima mepɨnetsi'iniekai temɨmatsimienikɨ, peru ne nepɨkanewaɨri nemɨmatsimienikɨ, mɨpaɨ pɨta nepainekai: “Ne nepɨkanewaɨriya ti'aitame 'axanemɨyurienikɨ, mɨkɨ Yawé menayexei kanihɨkɨtɨni”.

Neuxei nepaapa, keneuxeiya 'a'ixuriki kɨtsimeyari nepahurie. Ne 'ikɨ 'etsiyeume nekaneukɨxiteni nepɨkamatsi'umi. Mɨpaɨ ketinemaika nehetsie tixaɨ 'axati'anetɨ pɨkatixuawe. 'Ekɨ matsi pekanenikuwauneni penetsimiemɨtɨ, tsepa ne 'axanekamatsi'uyuri.
Yawé tame teyuhutame tahetsie kerahɨani. Yawé katinimaika kemɨ'ane mɨtikɨhɨwirieni, peru ne hatsuaku nepɨkamatikwinitɨani.
Xatsika meripai mieme maine hepaɨ: “'Axamɨti'ane 'axamemɨte'u'iyari pɨwahetsiemieme”, 'ayumieme ne hatsuaku 'ekɨ 'axanepɨkamatsiyurieni.
»¿Kemɨ'ane pepukumiene 'ixaheritsixi tiwa'aitɨwame? ¿Kemɨ'ane pepukuhupiene? Mɨkamatsi'aye'unie pepɨkuweiyane, tsɨkɨ mɨmɨki nekanihɨkɨtɨni yatɨni tepɨ.
Yawé kehɨkɨtɨni tame teyuhutame tahetsie kerahɨani, yaxeikɨa ke'uniere kemɨ'ane 'axamɨtiyuriene, ne kenemɨtiyuriene ke'utiniere, kenetsi'utawikweitsitɨani».
Hikɨ Rawiri kepauka tikuxatatɨ mɨtiuhayewaxɨ, Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —Rawiri neniwe, 'ekɨ pepetaine pemɨnetikuxaxatɨwa. Mɨpaɨ 'utayɨka kaniutatsuani karima.
Hikɨ Tsahuri Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinikuhɨawekaitɨni: —'Ekɨ matsi 'aixɨa pepɨtiuyeika keyuri ne, 'axamɨti'anekɨ 'aixɨa pepɨnetsi'uyuri.
'Ayumiemehikɨ pepɨnetsixeitsitɨa nehetsie ke'aixɨa pemɨtiuyuri, Yawé 'ahetsɨa pɨnetsiyetuakai peru 'ekɨ pepɨkanetsi'umi.
Xɨka matsi'aye'unie xewitɨ miemɨkɨni, mɨkɨ kaniyɨwenikeyu mimienikɨ. Yawé waɨkawa 'aixɨa kematsiyurieka pemɨnereuyehɨwirikɨ.
'Ayumiemehikɨ mɨpaɨ nepɨretima, 'ekɨ ti'aitame pekanayeimɨkɨ, 'Ixaheri kiekatari 'aixɨa mete'u'uwatɨ mekanakɨnikuni 'ahamatɨa.
Yurikɨ Yawé hɨxie yakenetineutahɨawi, nenuiwarima memɨkakwi'iwanikɨ meta kememɨtetetewa memɨkahatɨmaiyarienikɨ.
Hikɨ Rawiri yuri katinita'eririeni
Merikɨtsɨ Tsamuheri kaniumɨni, Xamatsie kaniukateukieni matawerixɨtsie. 'Ixaheritsixi yunaitɨ mekaniyukuxeɨrieni meyuhiwerietɨ hetsiena mieme. Mɨyatiuyɨku Rawiri Mahuni makumawetsie kanakayune.

Merikɨte Mahuni mɨrakutewatsie mana tewi xewitɨ kaniukateitɨni waɨkawa rexeiyatɨ, xeimiriyari kapuratsixi meta haika miriyari muxatsi, Kaximeri mɨrakutewatsie wahuxari kanikaxikakaitɨni, yukwie mana mexeiyakaikɨ.
Nawari katinitewakaitɨni, Karewi kaninuiwarieyatɨkaitɨni. 'Awikahiri 'ɨyaya katinitewakaitɨni, mɨkɨ witsikatini'ɨimarikaitɨni timaiwetɨ, matsi Nawari pɨkayukɨhɨawekai 'axakatiniuka'iyarikaitɨni.
Hikɨ Rawiri makumawetsie 'uyeikatɨ, mɨpaɨ katinetimani kename Nawari yumuxatsi wahuxari hexinekai.
Merikɨte 'ayumieme temari tamamata kaniwarenɨ'ani mɨpaɨ tiwakuhɨawetɨ: «Kaximeri xekenehu, Nawari waɨritsika nehetsiemieme xekeneyetuiri.
Mɨpaɨ xeketenetahɨawi: “'Aixɨa xeketeu'erieka kayuwatɨ xehexeiyatɨ, yaxeikɨata 'atɨɨriyama meta 'ahetsɨa miemete te'uximayatamete.

Mɨpaɨ nepɨtiu'enaxɨ kename 'amuxatsima pewarexine. Meta pekatinimaika kepauka 'amuxatsi wahɨwemete tahamatɨa memu'uwakai, tepɨkawaru'uximatɨa hatsuaku. Kaximeritsie kepauka memɨtehɨtɨwekai, tixaɨtɨ tepɨkatewarunawatsiri.

Merikɨte te'a'uximayatsiriwamete keniwaruta'iwawiya, mɨkɨ mematenitaxatɨakuni. 'Aixɨa nepaineni 'ahepaɨtsita, xɨka 'aixɨa 'anemekɨ neteɨterima pewaranunake, 'ikɨ tukariyaritsie temawierika tekewewieka. Ximɨxi neuxei ketiniwayetuiri te'a'uximayatsiriwamete meta 'aniwe Rawiri tita pemɨrexeiyani”».
Hikɨ kepauka Rawiri kuyaximama memu'axɨa, Nawari mɨpaɨ mekateniutaxatɨani Rawiri kemainekai, hikɨ mana mekaniti'uni meta'ikwewatɨ.
Merikɨte Nawari mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —¿Kemɨ'aneri mɨkɨ Rawiri pɨhɨkɨ? ¿Kemɨ'ane te'uximayatamete mekaniwaruku'e'eiriwani yukutsiyarima.
¿Titayari nepaa, nehaa, newai neteɨterima wahetsiemieme nemɨrexeiya, titayari netiwamikwani teɨteri nekawamateme hakewa memeyekɨ?
Hikɨ Rawiri nɨ'arimama yu'utɨma mekanekɨne. Kepauka memuta'axɨa naime mekatenitaxatɨani Nawari kemɨtiwarutahɨawixɨ.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'aitɨani: «Naime 'ixiparate xeketeneukuha'arita». Hikɨ yunaitɨ mekaniyukuha'aritɨani meta Rawiri. Kuyaxi nauka tsienituyari Rawiri mekaneweiya, huta tsienituyari mekaniyuhayewa tita memɨtehexeiyakai memɨte'ɨwiyanikɨ.
Hikɨ xewitɨ ti'uximayatame 'Awikahiri katiniutaxatɨani, Nawari 'ɨyaya: «Rawiri yuteɨterima makumawetsie heyeikatɨ kaniwareyenɨ'ani tati'aitɨwame memɨtawaɨritɨanikɨ, peru mɨkɨ 'axakatiniwaru'eiya.
Mɨkɨ teɨteri 'aixɨa mepɨtatexeiyakai. yeuta, hatsuaku mepɨkatatsi'u'uximatɨa, nitixaɨ mepɨkatate'unawatsiri.
Mɨkɨ tukarikɨ tɨkarikɨ mepɨtatsi'ɨwiyakai, mexi muxatsi tewahɨtɨwekai mana wa'aurie.
Hikɨ 'ekɨ 'aixɨa kepemɨtiyurieni keneutimaixɨa, karikɨtsɨ tati'aitɨwame hetsie tahetsie. Mɨkɨ tewi 'axamɨtiuka'iyari pɨhɨkɨ, xewitɨ hamatɨana mɨtikuxatani pɨkayɨwe».

Hikɨ yapauka 'Awikahiri paa huta tsienituyari kaniukuxeɨrieni, winu hutame nawi kɨxauriyaritsie yemaneme, muxatsi yu'aɨxɨwime mewawarikime, tɨriku xarikiyari xeitewiyari heimana tamamata heimana 'auxɨwi kiruyari, kaxie takari patsaruyari tsuirayari mekaniutiwewieni xeitsienituyari meta huta tsienituyari xapa makaka patsaruyari tsuirayari mekaniutiwewieni. Hikɨ mɨkɨ naime tiuti'ikataka puxuri wahetsie,
mɨtiwa'aitɨa mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: «Xeme meri xekeneuhuni neta xe'utɨma nepɨyemie». Peru yukɨna Nawari 'ikɨ hepaɨtsita pɨkatitaxatɨa.
'Awikahiri puxutsie 'anakaitɨ hɨritsie hepana me'ahukame, hikɨ mekananuyukunake.
Merikɨte Rawiri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨkaitɨni: «Yakɨ xeikɨa pɨratɨa mɨkɨ tewi ketemɨte'ita'ɨwiri tewamama makumawetsie, para tixaɨ mɨkareuyehɨanikɨ. Hikɨ matsi pɨta hepaɨtsita.
Hikɨ matsi Kakaɨyari 'axakenerakapitɨani kanetsinenimayatɨ xɨka yunaime Nawari teɨterimama nekawarukwini mexi kakahekɨariweni».
'Ayumiemekepauka 'Awikahiri Rawiri muxei, mexɨima yupuxutsie 'anakayaka hɨxiena kaniutihɨximakeni kwiepa paitɨ.
Hetɨana 'ukaweka mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Neti'aitɨwame, neuxei hikɨ keneneupitɨa nemɨmatitaxatɨanikɨ, pemɨnetsi'enienikɨ nekamaniwawirieka, ne nekaneyɨni nehetsie kerahɨiyani.

'Ekɨ matsi Nawari yuri pepɨkati'eririeka, kemɨtitewa yurikɨ yapɨtiuka'iyari. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ panuyɨne, “mɨka'uka'iyari” mɨpaɨ katinimariwani naitsarie. Ne matsi neti'aitɨwame 'anɨ'arima pemɨwarenɨ'a nepɨkawarexei.

»Peru hikɨ Yawé pɨkamatsipitɨa xuriya pemɨtayeurienikɨ 'ekɨ 'akɨmana yapetiwarakapitɨanike. Kaniyuritɨni Yawé kanayeyurini meta 'ekɨ. 'Ayumiemenepiwawirie kemɨ'ane memɨmatsi'aye'unie meta yunaitɨ memɨmatsimieku, Nawari hepaɨ mekatenikwinitɨariekuni.
Keneutanaki'eri 'ikɨ 'imikieri mati'uximayatsiriwame matsi'atɨiri, ketiniwarutamikwa 'ateɨterima.
Ne nepɨmatsiwawirie ti'a'uximayatsiriwame xɨka 'axanetiuyurieni kenetineuyehɨwirieka. memɨkaheuyeweni mete'aitatɨ, nixewitɨ matsi 'ekɨ 'axapɨkamatsiyurieni, 'ekɨtsɨ Yawé hetsiemieme pekani'amieneni.
Kepauka xewitɨ mɨmatsi'uweiyani matsimiemɨtɨ, Yawé 'akakaɨyari 'atukari pɨ'ɨwiyani, peru matsi memɨmatsi'aye'unie 'ateewa mepexɨriyani memeuyewenikɨ.
'Ayumiemekepauka Yawé 'ixaheritsixi tiwa'aitɨwame mɨmatsi'ayeitɨa kemɨmatiutahɨawixɨ, meta 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie kepauka mexɨakame mɨmatsi'ayeitɨa.

Merikɨte kepauka mɨpaɨ mɨtiyɨni, 'ekɨ 'ahetsie pepɨkarahɨpani, 'ahaxɨakɨ teɨteri pemɨwarukwikɨ 'atsimekateyuriekame. Mati'uximayatsiriwame matsi 'ekɨ kenena'eriwani kepauka Yawé 'aixɨa mɨtiyurieni 'ahetsiemieme».
Merikɨte 'ayumieme Rawiri 'Awikahiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Yawé 'aixɨa kerahɨawaruwani 'Ixaheri Kakaɨyarieya, hikɨ mɨmatsiheyenɨ'akɨ temanuyukunakekɨ.
'Aixɨa peke'itɨarieka 'ekɨ 'aixɨa pemɨnetiutahɨawixɨkɨ, xuriya kenemɨtitayeurienikekai nekɨmana.

Yawé 'ixaheritsixi takakaɨyari, pɨkanetsi'upitɨa nemɨmatikwinitɨanikɨ kenemɨtiyuriemɨkɨkai. Hikɨ matsi yanematinahɨaweni, xɨka xeiya pekaheyeyanike temanuyukunakekɨ, 'uxa'a Nawari meta teɨterimama nixewitɨ pɨkahayenierenikekai. Yurikɨ Yawé kanayeyurini.

Merikɨte Rawiri mɨpaɨ titahɨaweka, tita mɨkɨ mɨti'atɨiriekai katinanupiini. Mɨpaɨta katinitahɨawe: —'Akie kenemie peka'a'iyaritɨatɨ, pekatinimaikari nekamananu'enieni. Kepemɨnetiutahɨawixɨ yanepɨtikayani.
Hikɨ kepauka 'Awikahiri yukie munua, waɨkawa kanitawekaitɨ, 'ayumieme mɨkɨ 'atsipɨkatitahɨawixɨ 'uxa'ariekake.
Merikɨte 'uxa'ariekake kepauka Nawari mukatawaipiekai 'anake katinitaxatɨani kemɨtiuyɨkai. Nawari matsi 'u'enaka yu'iyaritsie katiniutakwine hikɨ kaniuhurieni naitɨ.
Hikɨ tamamata tukari 'anukayaku, Yawé Nawari katiniukwinitɨani hikɨ kaniumɨni.

Kepauka Rawiri mɨpaɨ mɨretima kename Nawari hemɨkai, mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: «Yawé 'aixɨa ketikuxaxatsiwani kemɨtiuyuri, Nawari hepaɨtsita kenemɨtiyurienikekai, Yawé 'aixɨa pɨtiuyuri mati'uximayatsiriwame 'axamɨkatiyurienikɨ, matsi yapɨtiuyuri Nawari yamɨyɨnikɨ ke'axamɨtiuyuri hepaɨtsita». kanenɨ'ani, 'iwawirietɨ mitiwitɨnikɨ 'ɨyaya mayanikɨ.
Kepauka nɨ'ariekate Kaximeri memu'axɨa, metenitahɨawe: —Rawiri kataneyenɨ'ani kamaniwawirieka matsitiwitɨnikɨ.
Hikɨ mɨkɨ 'ukatunumakeka kwiepa tihɨximawetɨ mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Ne Rawiri ti'uximayatsiriwame nekanihɨkɨtɨni, kemaineni yanetiniyurimɨkɨ. wa'ɨkate nemɨtihauxinanikɨ.
Merikɨte yapauka 'Awikahiri kaniyukuha'aritɨani mɨyemiekɨ puxutsie nanutiyerɨni, te'i'uximayatsiriwamete mekaneiweiya, hikɨ Rawiri teɨterimama wa'utɨa mekanekɨne. 'Anari mɨkɨ kanitiwitɨni.
Meta Rawiri 'Akinuhani Ketsireri kiekame kanawitɨkɨkaitɨni, merikɨte mɨkɨ yuhutatɨ mepɨ'ɨitamamatɨkai.
Tsahuri yuniwe Mikari Rawiri muwitɨtɨakai
Merikɨtsɨ Tsipi kiekatari Kiweya mekanekɨne Tsahuri mɨpaɨ metetaxatɨanike: —¿Ti'aitame petimate, Rawiri Kakira yemuriyaritsie makumawe 'aurie meyu'awieta?
Hikɨ 'ayumieme Tsahuri kuyaxi kaniwarukuha'aritɨani haika miriyari 'ixaheritsixi mɨwaranayexei, Tsipi makumawetsie kanakayune Rawiri kuwaunetɨ.
Kakira yemuriyaritsie mekaniyuhayewa, makumawe hɨxie huye 'aurie. Hikɨ Rawiri makumawe 'uyeikatɨ, mɨpaɨ katinetimani kename Tsahuri 'iweiyakai,
'awie nenieremete kaniwarenɨ'ani hakewa meyeikakai timaimɨtɨ.

Hikɨ Tsahuri manuyeika kaneyani meta hakewa mehupukai katinetimani, yaxeikɨata 'Awinexi Nexi nu'aya kuyaxi tiwa'aitɨwame. Tsahuri hupaitɨ kanayekateitɨni, waritana naitsarie kuyaxi mekana'utɨkateitɨni.

Hikɨ 'ayumieme Rawiri 'Akimereki heti tewiyari meta 'Awitsahi Tsariwiya nu'aya Kuhawi 'iwaya kaniwaruta'iwawiya: —¿Kemɨ'ane nehamatɨa puyuwaɨriya Tsahuri manuka temuhukɨ? 'Awitsahi mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Ne 'ahamatɨa nekanimieni.

Merikɨte Rawiri 'Awitsahi hamatɨa 'ana tɨkariyaritsie mana mekaniye'axɨani, Tsahuri mekaniuxeiya mana mematiteitsie wahixɨapa kutsume, manutimu'utsie yupitsika 'uketɨ. kaniukateitɨni kuyaxita wawarita mekanaheitɨkateitɨni.
'Awitsahi Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Hikɨ Kakaɨyari matsiyetuirie mɨmatsi'aye'unie. Nemimienikɨ keneneupitɨa. Pitsikayakɨ nekanenukatseixɨamɨkɨ, xeimieme nekatiniyuriemɨkɨ, pɨkaheuyeweka tawarita.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'Awitsahi mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Pepɨka'ikumemiwani, Yawé pɨka'ihayewa matsi pi'uximatɨani kemɨ'ane menayexei mɨmieni.
Tawarita mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Kaniyuritɨni Yawé kemɨrayeyuri, mɨkɨtɨtɨ kanimiemɨkɨ. Yatɨni yɨkɨmana kanimɨmɨkɨ, yayumienetɨ kanemieriemɨkɨ.
Merikɨte Yawé ne kenetsiparewieka, para menayexei hetsie 'axanemɨkatiyurienikɨ, pitsikaya xeikɨa keneutikwe'i meta tekɨxieya haa muyema manutimu'utsie muwe keneutihani, kɨmɨ tekaniyehuni.
Hikɨ Rawiri yukɨmana pitsika kaniutikweni meta tekɨxi haa muyema, Tsahuri manutimu'utsie muwekai hikɨ mekanekɨne. 'atsipɨkaretima yunaitɨ mekanikutsukaitɨni. Yawé waɨkawa mɨwareukutsitɨakɨ.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'anutaɨye kananuyani yemuritsiepai kaneutiyani, manari 'apautatewakai Tsahuri mematiheteitsie.
'Ayumiemekuyaxi kaniwarutahiwieni meta 'Awinexi Nexi nu'aya: —'Awinexi. ¿Penere'enie? 'Awinexi kanita'eiya: —¿Kemɨ'ane pepetaine ti'aitame pemehiwie?

Merikɨte Rawiri kanita'eiya: —'Awinexi, heiwa xeniu 'ekɨ kuya 'aixɨa pemɨ'ane petihɨkɨtɨni 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie pemɨmariwa. ¿Titayari hikɨ mati'aitɨwame pekati'ɨwiyakai? Matsi nematinitaxatɨamɨkɨ xewitɨ kuya mana 'ahetsɨa kanitahani ti'aitame miemɨtɨ.

Kepemɨtiuyuri 'aixɨa pɨka'ane, kaniyuritɨni Yawé kemɨrayeyuri. 'Ekɨ matsi peuyewetse pemumɨnikɨ meta 'akuyaxima tixe'aitɨwame xemɨka'uta'ɨwiyaxɨkɨ Yawé menayexei. Tsiparatsɨ ¿hakewa ti'aitame pitsikaya pewe, meta haa muyema tekɨxi manutimu'ukai muwekai?
Merikɨte Tsahuri Rawiri niukieya hetimaika, mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Rawiri neniwe, 'ekɨ peretaine. Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: ―Huu neti'aitɨwame ne nekaniutaineni.
¿Titayari neti'aitɨwame mati'uximayatsiriwame penetiuweiya? ¿Kekuta netiuyuri? ¿Ketitakɨkuta 'axanetiuyuri?

Hikɨ 'ekɨ ti'aitame nemaniwawirieka pemɨnetsi'enienikɨ. Xɨka Yawé tiyurieneni, 'ekɨ ti'aitame pemɨnetsi'aye'uniekakɨ, kenereuyehɨwirieka Yawé meta nemawarika kenaki'erieka. Mexɨka teɨteri meteyurieka, Yawé 'axakewaruyurieni, mekanenayeweweiyani 'ena kwie Yawé mɨnetsi'uxatɨatsie mɨpaɨ menetekɨhɨawetɨ, hipame pɨta kakaɨyarixi tiwa'uximayatsiriwame mekanenayeitɨwani.
Hikɨ matsi 'ekɨ 'aixɨa pɨkayɨni, pemɨnetsi'uweiya penetsimiemɨtɨ. ¿Titayari nemɨhɨkɨtɨni hepaɨ, yanutsutɨni xɨ'au 'ɨtsita kiekame hepaɨ? Ne nemaniwawirieka 'ekɨ kanierekaku.
Hikɨ Tsahuri mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Ne 'axanepɨtiuyuri, Rawiri neniwe nehetsɨa kenenua. Nepɨkamatikwinitɨaniri. 'Ekɨ matsi pepɨkanetsi'umi pepɨnereuyehɨwiri, ne matsi nemɨka'uka'iyarini hepaɨ nepɨyɨane.
Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Ekɨ ti'aitame, 'apitsika 'ena puwe, xeime kenetanɨ'a mati'uximayatsiriwame mekweimiekɨ.

Merikɨte Yawé tame taxexuime ketarakapitɨani heitseriemekɨ kemɨtiyupitɨwa, yurikɨ kemaine. Yawé hikɨ pɨnetsi'atɨakai hakewa nemɨyɨwekai nemɨmatsimienikɨ, ne matsi nepɨkanewaɨri 'ekɨ Yawé matsi'anayexei pemɨhɨkɨkɨ.
Hikɨ mɨpaɨ nepɨretima 'atukari waɨkawa pɨraye'akai, Yawé hikɨtane netukari raye'akame kehayeitɨaka meta kenetsiwikweitsitɨaka naimekɨ kenemɨtiuka'eniwa.
Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya:

Merikɨtsɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniyukɨhɨawekaitɨni: «Tsieretsɨ hatsuaku Tsahuri pɨnetsimieni. 'Aixɨa kaniyɨmɨkɨ piritsiteutsixi wakwietsie nemɨneta'unakɨ mana nemekanikɨ. Mɨpaɨ Tsahuri netsiwaunetɨ 'Ixaheri kwieyaritsie kaniti'uximɨkɨ».
Rawiri meta kuyaximama 'ataxewi tsienituyari me'eweiyatɨ mekanekɨne Kahati kwieyaritsie mekaniye'axɨani, 'Akihitsi Mahuki nu'aya mɨra'aitakaitsie.

Hikɨ Rawiri meta kuyaximama mana mekaniyuhayewa, 'Akihitsi mana kaniwaruta'ɨwiya. Kuyaxi yuxexuitɨ yu'ɨitama meta yuniwema mekaniwaruwitɨkɨkaitɨni. Meta kaniwarawitɨkɨkaitɨni, 'Akinuhani Ketsireri kiekame meta 'Awikahiri Kaximeri kiekame, Nawari 'ɨyayatɨkai.
Kepauka Tsahuri mɨpaɨ mɨretima kename Rawiri Kahati kwieyaritsie 'uyuta'unakai, 'iweiyatɨri katiniuhayewa.

Merikɨte Rawiri 'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «Xɨka yuritɨni 'ekɨ ti'aitame 'aixɨa penetiuxeiya, nekamaniwawirieka kiekari xaɨtsie pemɨnetsiyetuirienikɨ mana nekaniuyeikamɨkɨ, pɨkaheuyewetse 'ena 'ahurawa temukutenikɨ».
Hikɨ 'Akihitsi 'ana tukariyaritsie kwitɨwa Tsikɨraki kwieyari kaniyetuirieni, 'ayumieme hikɨ Tsikɨraki Kura kwieyaritsie te'aitamete katiniwapiinitɨni.
Merikɨte Rawiri piritsiteutsixi wakwietsie xeiwiyari heimana nauka metseri kaniuyurieni mana 'uyeikatɨ.

Rawiri kaneyeikakaitɨni yukuyaxima wahamatɨa metewanawatsirietɨwetɨ ketsureutsixi, kiritsitsixi meta 'amarekitsixi wahetsɨa, mɨkɨ mɨixa mekaniyuriekaitɨni mana mekutetɨ, Tsuhuxi kwieyaritsie 'Ekipitu kwieyaritsie paitɨ.

Merikɨte kepauka Rawiri wahetsɨa mɨye'axekai yunaime kaniwatakukuyakaitɨni 'ayeniereme pɨkakuhayeikawakai. Meta katiniware'arɨwakaitɨni muxatsi, wakaitsixi, puxuri, kameyutsixi meta wakemarite. Hikɨ 'Akihitsi hetsɨa kani'axeikaitɨni.
Hikɨ xɨka 'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ re'iwawiyani: «¿Kemɨ'ane kwieyaritsie pepɨrenawa?», Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniku'eiyakaitɨni: «Kura kwieyari hetɨa meukayunetsie», yatɨni: «Kerameri kenitsixi memanu'uwatsie».

Rawiri xeime 'uki ya 'ukaratsitɨme pɨkawakuhayeikawakai 'ayeniereme, mɨpaɨ tiku'eriwatɨ xɨka Kahati kwieyaritsie xeime 'atɨani, mekanitaxanetakekaitɨni kemɨtiyurienekai hepaɨtsita. 'Ikɨ mɨya tiyurienetɨ xeikɨa piritsiteutsixi wakwietsie kaniuyeikakaitɨni, kepaɨmexɨa tukari muyuri mana 'uyeikatɨ.
Hikɨ 'Akihitsi Rawiri yuri katini'eririekaitɨni,

Merikɨtsɨ 'iya tukariyaritsie, piritsiteutsixi yukuyaxima mekaniwarukuxeɨriexɨani 'ixaheritsixi memɨwakwiyukɨ. 'Ayumieme 'Akihitsi Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Mɨpaɨ ketinemaika 'ekɨ meta 'akuyaxima nehamatɨa tekanitakwiyuni tanaitɨ.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Aixɨa kaniyɨmɨkɨ, yapekatinetimaimɨkɨ 'ekɨ neti'aitɨwame, ne mati'uximayatsiriwame kenemɨtiyɨwe. 'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —Xɨka mɨpaɨ 'aneni, 'ena mɨtiyehane netsihɨweme pekanayeimɨkɨ.

Merikɨte kepauka Tsamuheri mumɨ, hetsiena mieme, Xamatsie menikateuku mana mɨkiekarieyatɨkaikɨ. Tsahuri mɨkɨ kwieyaritsie, memɨtemaikai mɨkite wahamatɨa memɨtekuxata meta memɨteyukewaiya kaniwarayeweiyaxɨakaitɨni.
Hikɨ piritsiteutsixi me'uyukuxeurieka Tsuneni mɨrakutewatsie mekanikuyaxe. Meta mekanekɨne, Kiriwuha paitɨ mekanitiyaxe.
Peru kepauka Tsahuri piritsiteutsixi mɨwaruxei, kaniutimani waɨkawa yu'iyaritsie kaneuyuyehɨani.
'AyumiemeYawé kaniutahɨawe, peru mɨkɨ pɨka'ita'ei, niheinɨtsitana ni'inɨari mupatsie Yawé hetsiemieme meta Kakaɨyari niukametemama waniuki.

Merikɨte 'ayumieme Tsahuri kuyaxi tewa'aitɨwamete, mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'aitɨani: —Mɨtimaiwe xekenenekuwawiri mɨkite wahamatɨa mɨtikuxata, para nemumiekɨ nemeita'iwawiyakɨ. Mɨpaɨ mekatenita'eiya: —Xewitɨ 'Eniruxi kiekariyaritsie kanekani.

Hikɨ Tsahuri kemarite yukɨ 'anenekame 'anakatɨxɨaka, teɨteri yuhutatɨ mekaneiweiya 'uyɨwikaku 'ukaratsi hetsɨa. Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —'Iyari kene'atɨa mɨyuhekɨatakɨ nemixeiyakɨ. Mɨpaɨ ketineuyuri kemɨ'ane nemɨmatsitaxatɨani.

Merikɨte 'ukaratsi mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —¿Xɨari 'atsipepɨkatimate Tsahuri kemɨtiuyuri? memɨtekuxata meta memɨteyukewaiya kaniwarayeweiyaxɨani. 'Ekɨ penetsiwiniyamɨtɨ xeikɨa pekaniutaineni nemɨmierienikɨ.
Merikɨte Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kaniyuritɨni Yawé kemɨrayeniere, yurikɨ ne nematinikuhɨaweni nixewitɨ matsi pɨkamatikwinitɨani 'ikɨ hepaɨtsita.
'Ukaratsi mɨpaɨ kaniutayɨni: —¿Kemɨ'anekuta pepɨxeiyamɨkɨ? Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Tsamuheri nekanixatani.
Hikɨ 'ukaratsi Tsamuheri 'uxeiyaka kaniutahiwa marikakɨ. Mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kari 'ekɨ Tsahuri pepɨyɨane. ¿Titayari peneti'itaiyane?
Hikɨ ti'aitame mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Hawaikɨ pepɨkaheumaka. Tita pemɨtiuxei kenetineutaxatɨa. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Iyari kwieta maukatewatsie 'atimieme nepɨxeiya.

Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Kehapaɨ tiyuxexeiya? Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kani'ukiratsitɨni matakɨ kaniyu'eimani kwieta maukatewatsie kanatimieni. mɨyɨanekaikɨ, kaniutihɨximakeni titunumawetɨ kwiepa.

Hikɨ Tsamuheri Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —¿Titayari peneti'uximatɨa tawarita nemɨnuanikɨ? Tsahuri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Waɨkawa matsi nekanine'iyaritɨaka piritsiteutsixi mekanenimietɨweni meta Kakaɨyari kaneniuku'eirieni. Pɨkanetsiku'eiya nineheinɨtsikatsie meta Kakaɨyari niukametemama wahetsie. 'Ayumieme nemɨmatsitahɨawekɨ nekaninewaɨriya, kenemɨtiyurieni yapemɨnetitahɨawekɨ.
Hikɨ Tsamuheri mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kamɨtsɨ xɨka Yawé matsi'uku'eirieni matsi'aye'unietɨ pɨta xɨka yuhayewa, ¿Titayari ne penera'iwawiya?
Matsi Yawé yakatinaye'atɨani kemutayɨkai meripaitɨ: Mɨkɨ matsi kamaniunawairieni kepemɨti'aitametɨkai, Rawiri pɨta kaniyetuirieni.
'Ekɨ Yawé pemɨka'anu'enikɨ, 'amarekitsixi kemɨtiwahekakai pepɨkawarukwi, 'ayumieme hikɨ mɨkɨ mɨyakamatinikwinitɨaka.
Merikɨte Yawé piritsiteutsixi wahetsɨa kamaniyetuamɨkɨ meta 'ixaheritsixi. 'Ekɨ meta xekaniyuhayewakakuni meta 'ixaheritsixi mekana'iwariekuni.
Hikɨ Tsahuri Tsamuheri 'u'enieka yapauka marikakɨ kanatiweni. Waɨkawa kaniutimani kanimɨximekaitɨni, tɨkarikɨ tukarikɨ tixaɨ pɨkatitakwaiwekai.
Merikɨte 'ukaratsi Tsahuri 'uxeiyaka, mana 'ukaikame, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Ne ti'a'uximayatsiriwame yanepɨtikatɨa kepemɨnetiu'aitɨa kepemɨnetiutahɨawixɨ, netukari neyetuatɨ.
Hikɨta 'ekɨ kenenanu'eni pekatinikwaimɨkɨ 'ikwai nepɨkawewieni, mɨpaɨ peyukamaime 'ahuyeta pekaniyemieni.
Hikɨ Tsahuri kaniyuku'imawakaitɨni. mekatenikɨhɨawekaitɨni 'ukaratsi kemɨtikɨhɨawekai, 'imatɨrieka kaniyuwaɨriya. Kwiepa 'anukukeka 'utatsie kanayerɨni.
Merikɨte 'ukaratsi yukie tsikeru kaniweriyakaitɨni, mɨkɨ kaniumieni meta tɨriku tɨxiyari kaniupɨna, tsuirayari kaniutiwewieni kanitikwaxiya.
Hikɨ Tsahuri katiniukwani meta
Merikɨtsɨ piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiyarima yukuyaxima yunaime 'Apeki kiekariyaritsie mekaniwarukuxeɨrieni. Meta 'ixaheritsixi haixa mawietsie 'aurie Ketsireri mɨrakutewatsie mekaniyuhayewa.

Hikɨ kuyaxi wa'ukiyarima piritsiteutsixi mekaniwaruti'inɨata, hipatɨ wa'ukiyarima xeitsienituyari mekaniwaruwitɨkɨkaitɨni, hipatɨta xeimiriyari. 'Akihitsi meta Rawiri yukuyaxima warawitɨtɨ wa'utɨa mekaniuhukaitɨni.

Hikɨ kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiyarima 'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ mekateniuta'iwawiya: —'Ikɨ hepɨrayutsixi teɨteriyari, ¿'ena kemeteyurie? 'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ katiniwaruta'eiya: —Neuxei 'ikɨ Rawiri kanihɨkɨtɨni meripaitɨ ti'aitame. Matsi hikɨri xeiwiyari heimana nehamatɨa kaniuyeikani, kepaukapai temuyutaxewirixɨtsie, tixaɨ hetsiena nepɨkatikaxeiyawe para yuri nemɨkati'eririekakɨ.

Hikɨ kuyaxi piritsiteutsixi wa'ukiriyama, mekatenita'aitɨani: —Keniwaranɨnɨ'a memɨyehukɨ hakewa kwie pemɨwarexatɨa. Temɨtakwiyutsie memɨtatsi'anuweiyakɨ pepɨkawapitɨaka, nɨkahɨrixɨa tame pɨta metatsihetakwini. 'Aixɨa kaniuyuyuriweni tiyu'aitɨwame hetsɨa mɨreiyehɨwirienikɨ takuyaxima watayuniyame.
'Ikɨ Rawiri kanihɨkɨtɨni 'ixaheritsixi meminɨawa mete'ukaye'atɨ mɨpaɨ mete'ukwitɨ: «Tsahuri xeimiriyari kaniwarukwini, peru Rawiri tamamata miriyari».

Hikɨ mɨpaɨ tikuhɨawaruwatɨ 'Akihitsi Rawiri kaniuta'inieni, mɨpaɨ katinitahɨawe: —Kaniyuritɨni Yawé kemɨrayeniere, 'ekɨ tewi 'aixɨa pemɨtiuka'iyari pekanihɨkɨtɨni, ne yanepɨra'eriwakaku temɨtakwiyutsie pemɨnetsi'anuweiyakɨ. Kepauka pemɨnua nehetsɨa tixaɨ nepɨkatikaxeiyawe 'ahetsie 'axamɨti'ane, para yuri nemɨkamati'eririekakɨ. mepɨkamatexeiya.
'Ayumiemene mɨpaɨ nepɨra'eriwa, 'akie kenemie 'aixɨa 'iyari pekawahaxɨatɨatɨ.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ 'Akihitsi katiniutahɨawe: —¿Ketita petiukaxei 'axamɨti'ane? ¿'Ekɨ neti'aitɨwame tita petiukaxei mati'uximayatsiriwame hetsie, kepauka nemɨnetaxewirixɨtsie paitɨ 'atsita hikɨ? ¿Titayari mekanetepitɨa neti'aitɨwame meta ti'aitame memaye'unie wahamatɨa nemɨnetamienikɨ?

'Akihitsi mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Ne nekatinimaika nehetsie 'ekɨ Kakaɨyari niuki tuayameya hepaɨ pekani'aneni. Peru piritsiteutsixi tewa'aitɨwamete mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuani pemɨkamiekɨ 'ekɨ tahamatɨa temɨtakwiyutsie.
Hikɨ 'uxa'a ximeripai 'ekɨ meta mati'aitɨwame te'uximayatsiriwamete 'ahamatɨa memeyekɨ, 'amɨtikahekɨare xekaniyehuni.
Hikɨ 'uxa'arieka Rawiri meta kuyaximama
Merikɨtsɨ Rawiri kuyaximama, hairieka tukaritsie Tsikɨraki mekaniu'axɨani, mana mekanitahaxɨakaitɨni meta Tsikɨraki kiekariyari mekaniutataiya.
'Ukarawetsixi mekaniwarehapani, mana yunaime memɨte'u'uwakai 'amemɨyumate meta 'etsimemɨyumate. Peru 'ayɨwekatɨka nixeime mepɨka'umi.
Hikɨ kepauka Rawiri yukuyaxima wahamatɨa memu'axɨa, wakiekari kaniutataiyariekaitɨni, wa'ɨitama meta waniwema mekanehapaniekaitɨni.
Merikɨte Rawiri, hamatɨana memu'uwakai mekaniutitsuani me'utihiwatɨ kepaukake memuti'uxixɨ mepɨte'uhayewaxɨ.
Rawiri 'ɨitamama yuhutatɨ mekananutaxɨriyakaitɨni, 'Akinuhani Ketsireri kiekame meta 'Awikahiri Nawari Kaximeri kiekame 'ɨyayatɨkai.

Hikɨ Rawiri kaneumakaitɨni, karikɨ kuyaximama me'itituaxixɨanike pɨ'eriekai mɨpaɨ memɨtekuxatakaikɨ, memɨte'uka'eniwakaikɨ yuniwema yunaime memɨwarutatɨmaikɨ. Matsi Rawiri kaniutɨrɨkariyarieni, Yawé yukakaɨyari hetsie yuri ti'erietɨ.
'Ayumiememawari wewiwame 'Awiyataxi 'Akimereki nu'aya mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: —Mawari wewiwame kamixaya 'etsimɨnena kenehurimie. 'Awiyataxi yapauka kani'atɨirieni,
Rawiri Yawé kaniutahɨawe: —¿'Ikɨ tenawayamete netiwaranukuweiya? ¿Netiwaranuku'axiwe? Yawé mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Keniwaranukuweiya. pekaniwaretawikweitsitɨamɨkɨ.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'ataxewi tsienituyari yukuyaxima wahamatɨa kaneyani, Wetsuxi 'akiyaritsie meheye'axɨanike. Mana mekaniyuhayewa
huta tsienituyari kuyaxi, 'akitsie memanukɨnekɨ mepɨka'uyɨwekaxɨa memu'u'uxekaikɨ. Hikɨ Rawiri nauka tsienituyari yukuyaxima xeikɨa warawitɨtɨ kaneyani.
Hikɨ Rawiri teɨterimama xeime 'ekipitutanaka makumawetsie mekaniutaxeiya, Rawiri hetsɨa mekani'atɨani. Hikɨ mekatenimini meta mete'enuharitɨa,
xapa takari makaka tsuirayari xeime mekanimini meta hutame kaxie patsaruyari tsuirayari, matsi haika tukari haika tɨkari tixaɨ pɨkatikwakai. 'Ekipitu kiekame tiukwaka 'aixɨa katineka'erietɨyani.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: —¿Kemɨ'ane rahetsɨa pepɨti'uximaya? ¿Hakewa pepeyetɨa? Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —'Ekipitutanaka nepɨhɨkɨ, waɨriyarika ti'uximayatame xeime 'amareki tewiyari hetsiemieme. Haika tukari nanukamieni nemɨtikuyekai, neti'aitɨwame kaneniuku'eirieni.
Kereteutsixi* tau manatineika tserieta memɨtamakai tekateniwarekunawatsirieni, Kura kwieyaritsie meta Karewi kwieyaritsie meta Tsikɨraki kiekariyari tetehetataiyaxɨ.

Hikɨ Rawiri mɨpaɨ katinita'iwawiya: * 30:14 30:14 Kereteutsixi. Piritsiteutsixi panuyɨne. —¿Mɨkɨ tenawayamete hakewa mepe'uwa wahetsɨa ketananuwitɨki? 'Ekipitu kiekame mɨpaɨ katinita'eiya: —Kakaɨyari hɨxie 'ekɨ yakenetineutahɨawi, kename pekanetsimieni meta neti'aitɨwame hetsɨa pekanetsiyetuani. Mɨpaɨ netimaitɨ nekaxenanuwitɨmɨkɨ hakewa memekutei tenawayamete.

Merikɨte 'Ekipitu kiekame 'amarekitsixi wahetsɨa kaniwarewitɨni, mɨkɨ mana memakutekaitsie mepakɨnɨkai mekaniyutemamawiekaitɨni, metekwatɨ meta me'ietɨwetɨ, piritsiteutsixi wapiini memɨtewarunawatsiriekaikɨ meta Kura kiekatari.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'ukahekɨareku kanitsutɨani wakwinetɨ, 'uxa'arieka taikaike katiniutahayewa. mekaniyuta'una yukameyutsixi wahetsie.
Merikɨte Rawiri naime katiniukaxeiya yupiinite tita 'amarekitsixi memɨte'inawairiekai meta yu'ɨitama yuhutame kaniwarutawikweitsitɨani.
Tixaɨtɨ reuyewetɨ pɨkaratɨa memɨwaraye'unie tita memɨtewarunawatsiriekai, ni waniwema 'ukari, tixaɨtɨ wapiinite reuyewetɨ pɨkaratɨa.
Hikɨ Rawiri muxatsi tewaxi yunaime katiniware'arieni, metewaru'ariximetɨ kuyaximama mɨpaɨ mekateniuhiwakaitɨni: «'Ikɨ Rawiri katinipiinieyatɨni».

Merikɨte Rawiri Wetsuxi 'akiyaritsie kanakunuani, huta tsienituyari kuyaxi memayuhayewaxɨtsie memɨ'u'uxekaikɨ memɨkaheiwei. Mɨkɨ mekanayekɨne kuyaximama mewaranunakeke, Rawiri meta 'ahurawa kaniuyani watahɨaweke.
Hikɨ Rawiri memaweiyakai hipatɨ kuyaxi mɨpaɨ mekaniutiyuani: —'Ikɨ matsi tahamatɨa mepɨka'anukɨ, temɨtehekaxei mɨkɨta temɨwayetuiriwanikɨ. yuniwema.
Merikɨte Rawiri mɨpaɨ katiniwarutahɨawe: —Neuxei ne'iwama mɨpaɨ xepɨkateyurieka. mɨtatsi'uta'ɨwiyaxɨ, tenawayamete tahetsɨa mɨwayetua memɨtatsi'utakwi.
¿Kemɨ'anekuta yuri pɨtixeta'eririeni kexemɨteku'eriwa? Tita temɨtewarunawairi piinite teyunaitɨ katinitahetsiemiemetɨni, tekatenitapixɨakuni memuyutakwi meta memɨtehɨkai.
Hikɨ Rawiri 'ana tukaritsie mɨkɨ 'aitsika kaniutsutɨani 'ixaheritsixi wahetsiemieme, hikɨ mekanaye'atɨaka.
Merikɨte manata Tsikɨraki me'u'axɨaka, katiniwarenɨ'airieni piinite memɨtehekaxeiyakai, mɨpaɨ tiwakɨhɨawetɨ: «'Ikɨ 'imikieri 'ena katinitipika Yawé memaye'unie wapiini temɨtehekuwikweitsitɨa».
Hikɨ mɨkɨ 'ukirawetsixi Weteri kiekatari 'imikierite mekatenanupini, Xamuti Nekexi, Katixi,
'Aruhexi, Tsipimuti, 'Etsitemuha,
Xakari, Kerameri nuiwarimama wakiekarite meta kenitsixi wakiekarite,
Kuxima kiekatari, Kuratsani, 'Ataki,
meta Hewuruni memɨtamakai, yaxeikɨa

passage_titles.title: Yawé xeikɨa kanihɨkɨtɨni mɨkɨ naime mɨtatiyetuiri

verses.text: Merikɨtsɨ piritsiteutsixi 'ixaheritsixi mekaniwarutakwini, peru mewaruxeiyaka mekaniuyuta'una 'ixaheritsixi. Kiriwuha yemuriyaritsie mɨkɨ yumɨiretɨ mekaniukwi'iwa.
Hikɨ piritsiteutsixi Tsahuri mekananukuweiya meta niwemama. Mekaniwarekwini meri Kunatani, 'Awinarawi meta Marikitsuha.
Kuyaxi matsi waɨkawa Tsahuri hepaɨtsita mekaniuyeha'ani, mekanenukuweiya 'ɨrɨkɨ me'imɨiximetɨ. Matsi piritsiteutsixi mehe'iwakakuri waɨkawa tiuka'eniwatɨ,

Tsahuri yɨhɨweme mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe: «'A'ixipara kenewatihanaka keneneumi'a, yaketineuyuri mexi 'iya xitekiya 'inɨariyari memɨkahexeiya meka'axɨawawe, mɨkɨ xeikɨa mekanenitinanaimakuni». Merikɨte mi'ɨwiyakai waɨkawa kanimakaitɨni, mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ mɨtiuyurieni pɨkayuwaɨriyakai, watihanaka kaniuyumieni.
Kepauka 'i'ɨwiyame Tsahuri muxei mɨkime, mɨkɨta yu'ixiparakɨ kaniuyumieni yukɨmana.
Xei tukaritsie Tsahuri, niwemama yuhaikatɨ, mekateniukwini.

Kepauka 'ixaheritsixi muweritsie 'anutaɨye memɨtamakai meta Kurutani 'anutaɨye memɨtamakai memɨte'utamari kename kuyaxi 'ixaheritsixi meyuta'unakai, meta kename Tsahuri niwemama mehekwi'iwakai, mɨkɨta yukiekarite mekaniuku'eiriexɨani mekanekɨne. mekaniyuhayewa.
Hikɨ 'uxa'arieka piritsiteutsixi mana me'u'axɨaka mɨkite wapiini mete'anupinike, niwemama mekaniwarutaxeiya mekwikwi'ime.

Hikɨ mu'uya mekananutixiteni, piiniteya pitsikaya, 'ixiparaya meta menakekai mekateninawairieni. Naitsarie piritsiteutsixi wakwieyaritsie texaxatamete mekaniwareutanɨ'axɨani yutukiteta kakaɨyarixi memɨwayewetɨkatsie meta yunaime yuteɨterima wahɨxie.
Merikɨte Tsahuri 'ixiparaya, pitsikaya meta menakekai 'Atsitaruti kakaɨyariyari hetɨa mekatenetipini meta kaxarieya Wetitsani kuraruyari 'ematitewatsie mana mekanikuwieni.
Hikɨ Kawetsi kiekatari Karaha kwieyaritsie mɨpaɨ mekatenetimani, piritsiteutsixi Tsahuri kememuyuriekai,

mɨkɨ hipatɨ mekamamatɨ metɨrɨkawitɨ tɨkarikɨ Wetitsani kiekariyaritsie mekanekɨne, Tsahuri meta niwemama wakaxarite meheu'ɨiyuka mana kurarutsie memukuwɨkai, hikɨ mewarakahapaka Kawetsi kiekariyaritsie mekanakunuaxɨani. Mana mekaniwarutitaiya,
hikɨ wa'umeyarite me'uti'ɨka xiutɨa
